announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.en: I don't know, Woby! Must be a bad connection!
announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.trans: 我搞不清楚了，沃比！也许是接触不良吧！

announce_elixir_player_speed.en: I bet I could carry you, Woby!
announce_elixir_player_speed.trans: 我敢打赌我可以背起你了，沃比！

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: I think it needs a story or two to cheer it up!
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 我想它需要一两个故事来振作!

announce_lunar_rift_max.en: Look, Woby! Something's glowing over there!
announce_lunar_rift_max.trans: 看，沃比！那里有东西在发亮！

announce_cold.en: Brr... I sh-should find a way to w-warm up.
announce_cold.trans: 冷啊……我要想办法赶快暖起来。

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.en: Hey, I think I can make a new beefalo costume!
announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 嘿，我要做新的皮弗娄牛礼服了！

announce_elixir_ghostvision.en: It's the best of both worlds!
announce_elixir_ghostvision.trans: 汇聚了两个世界的精华！

announce_firenettle_toxin_done.en: Whew... I-I think I'm okay now.

1.en: More plant facts for my mental handbook!
1.trans: 又可以在我大脑的手册里记录植物知识了!

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.en: I'm pretty sure that's supposed to be attached to something!
announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 这东西应该跟别的东西连起来才对！

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: It doesn't make sense to build it so far away...
announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.trans: 建在这么远的地方没有意义……

announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 让我们看看会长出什么，沃比！

announce_hot.en: Whew... come on Woby, we'd better find some shade.
announce_hot.trans: 哎呀……快来，沃比，我们找块阴凉地。

announce_research.en: I memorized my Pinetree Pioneer handbook, I can memorize this!
announce_research.trans: 我背下了松树先锋队手册，我也一定能背下这个！

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: Woby, did you see that hand? It's cheating!
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 沃比，你看到那只手了吗？它在作弊！

announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.trans: 为什么在这里不起作用？

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.trans: 哎呀！沃比，是什么咬了我？

announce_is_feasting.en: Don't worry Woby, I'll save some for you!
announce_is_feasting.trans: 别担心，沃比，我会给你留点的！

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: I think he smells something nearby!
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 他好像闻到了附近有什么！

out_of_water.en: I'll need to get more water.

burning.en: Ouch! Fire saftey!
burning.trans: 哎哟！注意防火安全！

inuse.en: That pumpkin is being carved, Woby!
inuse.trans: 那颗南瓜正在被刻着呢，沃比！

mismatch.en: Wait... these aren't even the right plans.
mismatch.trans: 等一下……这些不是正确的草图。

inuse.en: Are you busy? Wanna hear about the bug I found yesterday?
inuse.trans: 你很忙吗？想听听我昨天发现了什么虫子吗？

notready.en: Maybe I'll try when the ground isn't shaking.
notready.trans: 我等地面不摇晃的时候再试试。

empty.en: I need some supplies!
empty.trans: 我需要一些补给品！

hermitcrab_relocate.en: Aww, it's dry. Let's try again later!
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 噢，是干的。我们晚点再试试吧！

toofar.en: Hey, slow down! I just want to eat you!
toofar.trans: 喂，慢一点！我只是想吃掉你！

inmood.en: Maybe we should wait for them to calm down...
inmood.trans: 也许我们应该等他们冷静下来...

beef_hitched.en: Don't worry, my beefalo isn't going anywhere.
beef_hitched.trans: 别担心，我的皮弗娄牛不会乱跑了。

needbeef.en: Sorry Woby, I need a real beefalo for this.
needbeef.trans: 抱歉，沃比，我这个只能用在皮弗娄牛身上。

needbeef_closer.en: I should call my beefalo over here.
needbeef_closer.trans: 我应该把我的皮弗娄牛叫过来。

dead.en: Oh, uh... I think they're busy. Being dead.
dead.trans: 哎呀……人家即使去世了，但是还很忙呢。

sleeping.en: Hey Woby, should we wake them up?
sleeping.trans: 沃比，我们要不要叫醒人家呢？

full.en: Looks like you've already got enough supplies.
full.trans: 看来你已经走足够的补给品了。

unsuitable_for_plants.en: Maybe if I was growing a garden full of seaweed.

notamerm.en: I don't want to make the bog monsters mad at me!
notamerm.trans: 我可不想招惹沼泽怪兽！

inuse.en: Do you like radio shows? There was this great horror one I used to listen to-
inuse.trans: 你喜欢听广播吗？我以前很爱听一个很精彩的恐怖节目……

notmasterchef.en: I'll go check on my own supplies.
notmasterchef.trans: 我去检查一下自己的补给品。

notsouljarhandler.trans: 沃比，那些是灵魂，不是零食。

generic.en: That's against the rules.
generic.trans: 这违规了。

generic.en: I probably shouldn't...
generic.trans: 最好还是别乱写乱画吧……

noslingshot.en: I don't have a slingshot to mod!

notdish.en: That... doesn't look like something anyone would eat.
notdish.trans: 那个……看起来应该不会有人吃吧。

carnivalgame_invalid_item.en: I had a feeling that wouldn't work...

nogeneratorskill.en: That's probably not going to work.

nomoon.en: I'll have to wait until the moon's out.

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: I need to forage for mushrooms! C'mon Woby!
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 我要去采蘑菇了！来吧，沃比！

dead.en: Oh, uh... I think they're busy. Being dead.
dead.trans: 哎呀……人家即使去世了，但是还很忙呢。

foodfull.en: There's some provisions in there already.

wrongshadowform.en: Did I put it together wrong? I wish it had instructions...
wrongshadowform.trans: 我装错了吗？要是有说明书就好了……

sleeping.en: Hey Woby, should we wake them up?
sleeping.trans: 沃比，我们要不要叫醒人家呢？

notamonkey.en: Um. Sorry, could you repeat that please?
notamonkey.trans: 嗯，对不起，请你再说一遍好吗？

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: One of those haunted logs should do the trick.
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 只需要找跟木头应该就能搞定。

ghostheart.en: They seem pretty committed to their lifestyle. Or lack of one?
ghostheart.trans: 不知道人家是喜欢这种生活呢，还是根本没有了生活？

pigkinggame_danger.en: Huh? My attention's kind of divided right now.
pigkinggame_danger.trans: 哈？我的注意力现在有点分散。

notgem.en: That's probably not going to work.

carnivalgame_already_playing.en: We can wait till they're done. Right Woby?
carnivalgame_already_playing.trans: 我们让他们先玩。好不好，沃比？

terrarium_refuse.en: I guess that was a silly thing to try...

terrarium_cooldown.en: There's no tree to give anything to yet!

queenbusy.en: Sorry ma'am, I'll wait until you're ready.
queenbusy.trans: 对不起，女士，那我就等你有空再给吧。

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: I don't think they'll grow here.

pigkinggame_messy.en: Can't do anything until the area's been cleared up!
pigkinggame_messy.trans: 这里这么乱，要清理一下才行！

generic.en: I don't think I should put that there... should I?
generic.trans: 那个东西不应该放在这里吧？

spidernohat.en: I don't think that would be very comfy for the spider.
spidernohat.trans: 我不认为这对蜘蛛来说会很舒服。

abigailheart.en: If it makes you feel better, ghosts are way more interesting anyway.
abigailheart.trans: 没事的，我觉得鬼魂比人有意思多了。

notatriumkey.en: I'll have to keep looking for the right key.
notatriumkey.trans: 我要去找到正确的钥匙。

notsculptable.en: I'm not even going to try sculpting that.

notstaff.en: That's not going to fit there.

hashat.en: Hey, there's a hat in the way!

melting.en: Oh no, it's melting! We can't decorate it anymore, Woby.
melting.trans: 不好了，它在融化！我们没法再装饰它了，沃比。

stackedtoohigh.en: I can't build it taller than that, Woby!
stackedtoohigh.trans: 我没法把它堆得更高了，沃比！

too_super.en: I don't think my tummy can handle that.
too_super.trans: 我觉得我的肚子受不了那个。

nospace.en: Guess I'll just have to find another spot!
nospace.trans: 看来得找个别的地方了！

targetincombat.en: Hey, calm down! Let me on!

inuse.trans: 看来这个位子已经有人坐了。

sleeping.en: Sorry to wake you, but could you give me a ride?
sleeping.trans: 很抱歉弄醒你，能载我一程吗？

alreadyknown.en: We already know this one, don't we Woby?
alreadyknown.trans: 我们已经知道这个了，对吧，沃比？

nohealth.en: I can't! I need medical attention! Where's the first aid kit?!
nohealth.trans: 不行！我需要医疗救治！急救箱在哪？！

not_night.en: I should wait until it's dark, for maximum spookiness.
not_night.trans: 我要等到天黑之后再讲，这样才有恐怖的气氛。

no_fire.en: I need a fire, it adds to the atmosphere!
no_fire.trans: 我需要一个火堆烘托一下气氛！

generic.en: This isn't really the place for a scary story...
generic.trans: 这里不适合讲恐怖故事……

charge_full.en: We got a full charge, Woby!

burning.en: That goes against everything we learned about fire safety.
burning.trans: 这违背了我们所学到的一切关于消防安全的知识。

nooccupant.en: Uh, I think we're forgetting something...
nooccupant.trans: 呃，我们好像忘了什么东西...

inuse.en: Did you get lost in there? Ha... ha... uh, that was a joke.
inuse.trans: 你在里面迷路了吗？哈哈哈，开玩笑的。

notenoughhair.en: I'll have to wait till their hair grows back.
notenoughhair.trans: 我得等到它们的毛发长回来。

generic.en: What I'm wearing is fine.
generic.trans: 我现在穿的衣服已经很好了。

nocarnival.en: Aw, looks like they all left...

mannequin_equipswapfailed.en: Sorry, I guess you can't wear that.
mannequin_equipswapfailed.trans: 对不起，我猜你是不能穿那个的。

notmybernie.en: I guess I can't tell a stuffed bear what to do either.
notmybernie.trans: 即便是玩具熊，我也不能随便指挥。

notmerm.en: I tried speaking in bog monster, but I think I just offended them.
notmerm.trans: 我试着和沼泽怪兽说话，但是我好像冒犯了他们。

empty_catcoonden.en: It's empty? Well now I feel kind of bad...
empty_catcoonden.trans: 是空的？我的情绪有些低落了……

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: Uhh, I'm not sure where they could even hide around here.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 呃，我不知道他们在这里能藏在哪。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: It would be a pretty short game, maybe I should find more first.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 参与者少游戏结束的也快，也许我应该先找到更多参与者。

carnival_host_here.en: I thought I saw him around here somewhere...
carnival_host_here.trans: 我感觉好像在哪见过他……

hostbusy.en: Excuse me, mister...? Hm, looks like he's busy.
hostbusy.trans: 你好，先生……？嗯，他看起来在忙。

kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.en: Sorry kitties, I can't play with you all day!
kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.trans: 对不起，小猫们，我不能整天和你们一起玩！

noresponse.en: He must be wandering around somewhere.

alreadyactive.en: There must be another contest going on somewhere else.
alreadyactive.trans: 别的地方一定还有别的比赛。

doesntwork.en: Maybe he took the day off?

professionalchef.en: I should probably leave that alone.

shadowmagic.en: Maybe you could teach me some magic tricks? I'm a quick learner!
shadowmagic.trans: 你可以教我一些魔术戏法吗？我学得很快！

toodeep.en: A Pinetree Pioneer knows to use the right equipment. And this isn't it.
toodeep.trans: 松树先锋队员知道怎么正确使用工具。这个工具不能用在这里。

wrongpiece.en: No, see? That doesn't fit together at all!
wrongpiece.trans: 不行啊，你没看到吗？那个不匹配啊！

wronggear.en: Hm... my handbook says I need a different kind of fishing rod.
wronggear.trans: 嗯……手册上说我需要用另一种钓竿。

quagmire_wrongkey.en: I guess I need another key.
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 可能需要一把其他钥匙。

wrongkey.en: I don't think that's what I'm supposed to use in this situation.

klaus.en: Wait, I want to get a closer look at that monster!
klaus.trans: 等等，我想靠近点看看那个怪兽！

empty.en: Darnit, I forgot to get something to wrap.
empty.trans: 啊呀，我忘记了怎么捆绑东西了。

generic.en: I've already learned everything I need to know about that one.
generic.trans: 我已经知道了我需要知道的一切。

fertilizer.en: I think I know everything I need to.
fertilizer.trans: 我需要知道已经都知道了。

duplicate.en: Heh. I learned that ages ago!
duplicate.trans: 呵呵。我好久之前就知道了！

not_merm.en: No Woby, that's for bog monsters only.
not_merm.trans: 不行，沃比，那是沼泽怪兽专属。

dead.en: Oh, uh... I think they're busy. Being dead.
dead.trans: 哎呀……人家即使去世了，但是还很忙呢。

sleeping.en: Hey Woby, should we wake them up?
sleeping.trans: 沃比，我们要不要叫醒人家呢？

full.en: Looks like you've already got enough supplies.
full.trans: 看来你已经走足够的补给品了。

glassed.en: I don't think that's going to work.

already_bombed.en: I don't want to waste supplies.

awakebeefalo.en: Wouldn't that be kind of rude?

nobits.en: He's already had a close shave. Heh, good one Walter.
nobits.trans: 他已经剃的很干净了。呵呵，干得好，沃尔特。

generic.en: Maybe if I ask nicely...
generic.trans: 也许要是我好好跟他说一下的话……

notarget.en: Guess we should pick another spot, Woby.

out_of_water.en: Well, that's the last of the water.

webberonly.en: They're not listening to me! Maybe Webber can talk to them...
webberonly.trans: 它们不听我的！也许韦伯可以跟它们聊聊……

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: I was trying to scratch behind his ears... but I don't think he has any.
doer_isnt_module_owner.trans: 我本想替他抓抓耳朵后面……但他好像没有耳朵。

inuse.en: Hey while you're here, wanna hear a scary story I heard on the radio?
inuse.trans: 你想听听我从收音机里听来的恐怖故事吗？

generic.en: If only I had some marshmallows... oh well.
generic.trans: 我现在好想吃棉花糖啊……哎。

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: Come on Walter, gotta focus! Don't get distracted!
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 加油，沃尔特，要集中精神！不要分散注意力！

wrongworld.en: Wait... this map looks all wrong.
wrongworld.trans: 等一下……这张地图看起来都是错的。

stash_map_not_found.en: Um... those monkeys aren't very good at making maps.
stash_map_not_found.trans: 呃……那些猴子不擅长绘制地图。

cantlearn.en: Sorry, I kind of lost interest.

1.en: One more time, just like in the handbook.
1.trans: 再试一次，按手册里说的做。

3.en: This is harder than the diagrams make it look...
3.trans: 真做起来可比图册上的要难啊……

1.trans: 哎呀……原来你不是我的胡萝卜鼠啊！

2.en: Mine was the OTHER orange one.

full_of_curses.en: I really shouldn't pick up things that don't belong to me.
full_of_curses.trans: 我真的不应该捡起不属于我的东西。

noimage.en: Wait... Woby, do you remember what it looked like?
noimage.trans: 忘记了……沃比你还记得它是什么样子吗？

inuse.en: "A Pinetree Pioneer is patient and polite." But uh, hurry up please?
inuse.trans: “松树先锋队员有耐心，讲礼貌。”额，请你快一点好吗？

notmasterchef.en: I'd rather cook over a campfire, honestly...
notmasterchef.trans: 老实说，我宁愿用营火做饭。

notsouljarhandler.trans: 沃比，那些是灵魂，不是零食。

generic.en: I can't fit anything else in there.
generic.trans: 里面什么都放不下了。

notempty.en: I should make sure it's empty first.
notempty.trans: 我应该先把里面的东西清理掉。

haspet.en: I think Woby might get jealous if I keep collecting pets.
haspet.trans: 我要是再养别的宠物，沃比会嫉妒的。

ticoon.en: One of these guys is enough to keep track of.
ticoon.trans: 有一个这样的家伙就够我忙了。

mounted.en: I've got to get down if I'm going to do that properly.
mounted.trans: 我要先下来才能做好它。

bad_timing0.en: Wait, I can do it! Just need to get the hang of it.
bad_timing0.trans: 耐心点，我能做到的！只是还没掌握窍门。

bad_timing2.en: Come on Walter, follow the timing, just like in the handbook.
bad_timing2.trans: 加油，沃尔特，像手册里教的一样，抓准时机。

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: I've already got as many big fuzzy friends as I can manage.
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 再多几个毛绒绒的大家伙我就要忙不过来了。

beef_bell_invalid_target.en: I don't think that's going to work.

not_participant.en: Woby and I will just watch for this round.
not_participant.trans: 这一轮我和沃比看看就好了。

samedish.en: That just looks like the same dish...
samedish.trans: 看起来是同一只碟子啊……

mismatch.en: I need to use a different dish. Apparently.
mismatch.trans: 很明显，我要换一只碟子。

announce_nohungersleep.en: I can't sleep on an empty stomach...
announce_nohungersleep.trans: 肚子饿的咕咕叫，睡不着啊……

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: I can't rest now! There's too much to look at down here!
announce_nonightsiesta_cave.trans: 我睡不着！下面有好多东西可以看！

announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.en: Hey! We need to start over, mine's asleep!
announce_carrat_error_fell_asleep.trans: 嘿！我们重新来过吧，我的选手睡着了！

8.en: Who's the smartest, Wobers? Yup, it's you!
8.trans: 是最聪明的，沃比？对，就是你！

10.en: You're the best best friend, Woby.
10.trans: 你是最好最好的朋友，沃比。

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: I should probably do some weeding.

announce_worms_boss.trans: 有东西来了。很大的东西。

announce_nonightsiesta.en: I'd rather just go to bed.

announce_dusk.en: It's getting late, better set up camp soon.
announce_dusk.trans: 有点晚了，最好赶快搭营吧。

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: I didn't know there was so much to learn about this stuff.
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 我不知道这东西有这么多学问。

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: Don't worry Woby, we're gonna catch them by surprise!
announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 别担心，沃比，我们抓他们措手不及！

3.en: Do you think we should try somewhere else Woby?
3.trans: 我们要不要换个地方试试，沃比？

4.en: I wonder if fish tell scary stories about us?
4.trans: 不知道鱼儿会不会也讲我们的恐怖故事？

announce_cozy_sleep.en: Wow, that was a good night's sleep!

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: Wow, it's hard to miss a signal that bright!
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 哇，这么亮的信号弹想没看到都难！

quagmire_announce_win.en: Aw, do we really have to leave?

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.en: Woby, do you hear digging? Sounds angry!
announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 沃比，你听到挖掘的声音了吗？听起来很生气！

announce_weak_rat.trans: 这只胡萝卜鼠看起来不太健康……

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: Huh. I thought that would go alright together.
quagmire_announce_notrecipe.trans: 哈。我还以为这些可以放在一起呢。

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: I think we might've planted these too close together, Woby.

yotb_post.en: It's pretty hard to teach a beefalo "sit" and "stay".
yotb_post.trans: 想教会皮弗娄牛“坐下”和“别动”真的很难。

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: Woby, wanna help me put this together?

gnarwail_horn.en: If they're not using it anymore, might as well keep it.
gnarwail_horn.trans: 如果他们不用了，我就留着了。

quagmire_casseroledish.trans: 一道加了各种调料的菜。

generic.en: Wow, fancy!
generic.trans: 哇，高级啊！

empty.en: Whoops, looks like I'll have to find some water.
empty.trans: 哎呀，看来我得去找点水了。

held.en: Look, the antlers aren't held on with paste or anything!
held.trans: 你看，鹿角不是用浆糊或其他东西粘起来的！

generic.en: A real jackalope! Come here little guy!
generic.trans: 一只真正的鹿角兔！过来，小家伙！

leif_idol.en: What a neat way to start a campfire!

beetletaur.en: I can smell him from here!
beetletaur.trans: 我在这里都能闻到他的气味！

twinofterror2.en: Somewhere, some poor giant robot is walking around completely blind...
twinofterror2.trans: 此时此刻，在一个未知的地方，一定有个可怜的巨型机器人在失去光明后焦急地踱步……

twinofterror1.en: Somewhere, some poor giant robot is walking around completely blind...
twinofterror1.trans: 此时此刻，在一个未知的地方，一定有个可怜的巨型机器人在失去光明后焦急地踱步……

chesspiece_anchor.en: Technically this could still work as a real anchor.
chesspiece_anchor.trans: 它这么重，真的可以拿来当锚。

chessjunk1.en: I don't think they're going to get up anytime soon.
chessjunk1.trans: 它们短期内应该起不来了。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

slurtle.en: What is that slimy thing? I've gotta get a closer look!
slurtle.trans: 那个黏糊糊的东西是什么？我得仔细看看！

chessjunk3.en: I don't think they're going to get up anytime soon.
chessjunk3.trans: 它们短期内应该起不来了。

frognewton.en: Hey, that's pretty good! What's in it?
frognewton.trans: 哇，那个真不错啊！里面是什么呢？

chessjunk2.en: I don't think they're going to get up anytime soon.
chessjunk2.trans: 它们短期内应该起不来了。

moose.en: Woah! Now THAT should be Canada's national animal!
moose.trans: 哇！那个应该是加拿大的国兽了！

dragon_scales.en: Was she a bug or a lizard?

reviver.en: Did you ever hear the story about the beating heart hidden under the floorboards?
reviver.trans: 你听过藏在地板下的跳动的心脏的故事吗？

trinket_9.en: Never know when you'll need a spare button.
trinket_9.trans: 你永远不知道什么时候会需要一个备用按钮。

boat_magnet_kit.en: I hope I get Mr. Wilson's instructions right... he kind of muttered through a lot of it.
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 我希望弄明白威尔逊先生的指示……但他很多地方都喃喃自语，没说清楚。

trinket_8.en: I'm sure I'll find a use for it.

trinket_6.en: Uh oh, did the robot drop these?

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: Looks like it amplifies healing expertise.

ghost.en: Woby, fetch! A heart! ...Okay, I'll get it myself.
ghost.trans: 沃比，去找一颗心回来！……好吧，我自己去找。

firestarter.en: You said you were listening when I was talking about fire safety!
firestarter.trans: 我在讲消防安全的时候，你还说你在听！

murderer.en: Get her Woby! She's a killer!
murderer.trans: 咬她，沃比！她是个杀手！

attacker.en: %s? Why are you looking at me like that...?
attacker.trans: %s？你为什么这样看着我…？

reviver.en: Now I know why Woby likes you!
reviver.trans: 现在我知道沃比为什么喜欢你了！

generic.en: Hey %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s！

trinket_5.en: I wonder if we'll ever explore outer space.
trinket_5.trans: 我想知道我们是否会探索外太空。

honeycomb.en: Just don't use it to comb your hair.

trinket_4.en: Is it just me, or do his eyes follow me around?
trinket_4.trans: 是我的错觉，还是他的眼睛一直盯着我？

trinket_3.en: That's easy, I know how to tie lots of knots!
trinket_3.trans: 这很简单，我什么结都会打!

eating_corpse.trans: 快看它大快朵颐的样子，沃比！

generic.en: I think it's a very bad sign.
generic.trans: 我觉得这是个非常不好的征兆。

trinket_1.en: These will make perfect slingshot ammo.
trinket_1.trans: 这些将是完美的弹弓弹药。

warn.en: Things are starting to get exciting!

waning.en: I think they're running out of energy...
waning.trans: 我想它已经没有能量了……

waxing.en: I think the monsters are coming!

steady.en: Just a steady stream of monsters!

minisign_item.en: Where's the perfect spot to put this...
minisign_item.trans: 哪里是放这个的最佳位置呢……

fruitfly.en: They're just doing what bugs do! I wish they wouldn't do it to my plants though...
fruitfly.trans: 它们只是在做虫子做的事！真希望它们能放过我的植物……

generic.en: Guess we're stuck here Woby.
generic.trans: 我猜我们被困在这里了，沃比。

full.en: There's too many people outside... let's just wait here.
full.trans: 外面人太多了……我们在这里等吧。

tree_rock_seed.en: Where should we plant this little one, Woby?
tree_rock_seed.trans: 我们把这个小家伙种在哪里好呢，沃比？

livinglog.trans: 没错，这根木头绝对是被鬼附身了。

halloweenpotion_moon.trans: 我们应该先让什么变异？

beargervest.trans: 嘿，沃比，我们穿了一样的衣服了！

wereitem_moose.en: So how does the curse work? When did it start?
wereitem_moose.trans: 那么，这个诅咒是如何运作的呢？什么时候开始的？

bigfoot.trans: 我就知道他是真的存在的！

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: Woby, now you don't have to carry everything!
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 沃比，现在你不用背东西了！

froglegs.en: I don't think they're ripe yet, they're still green.
froglegs.trans: 我觉得它们还没有成熟，还是绿色的。

ipecacsyrup.en: Er... thanks, but I don't think I'm hungry...

burnt.en: Darnit, there goes my evidence.
burnt.trans: 糟糕，我的证据不见了。

generic.en: Woah, it's not made of rubber! I think it's real!
generic.trans: 哇，这不是橡胶做的！我觉得是真的！

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: Hmm, I wonder where we should start the race.
boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.trans: 呣，从哪里开始比赛好呢？

generic.en: This is very serious training equipment.
generic.trans: 这是非常严肃的训练设备。

burnt.en: Oh no!!
burnt.trans: 哦不！！

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: Should it go there... no, no, maybe over there...
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 把它放在这……不对，往那边移一点！

leif.en: They've come to take their revenge!

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: I could grind it up to make a spice.
quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 我可以把它磨碎了做香料。

pigtorch.en: Handy for finding your way in the dark.

boatrace_primemate.en: We're not afraid of a little friendly competition. Right, Woby?
boatrace_primemate.trans: 友谊第一，比赛第二。对吧，沃比？

book_research_station.en: It's almost as useful as my Pinetree Pioneer handbook.
book_research_station.trans: 几乎就和我的松树先锋队手册一样有用。

beef_bell.en: The beefalo seem to really like the sound it makes!
beef_bell.trans: 这只皮弗娄牛似乎很喜欢它发出的声音!

corn_cooked.en: I don't have anything to fund-raise for out here...
corn_cooked.trans: 在这里卖爆米花也没人买，筹集不了资金……

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: It looks like it belonged to someone important.
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 看上去是重要人物的东西。

haunted_ground.en: I'd die to find out what it does.
haunted_ground.trans: 我会查明它到底做了些什么。

level1.en: Oh, Abigail! I didn't recognize you.
level1.trans: 噢，阿比盖尔啊！我都没认出你。

haunted_pocket.en: I don't think I should hang on to this.

long.en: It hurts my soul to look at that thing.
long.trans: 看到那东西时，我的灵魂受伤了。

level3.en: You're not really as spooky when you're a flower.
level3.trans: 你变成一朵花以后一点都不吓人了。

soon.en: Something is up with that flower!

generic.en: Did that flower just whisper something?
generic.trans: 刚刚那朵花说了什么悄悄话？

level2.en: Don't eat the haunted flower, Woby!

foliage.en: This would be great for starting a campfire.
foliage.trans: 这个用来点篝火应该很好用。

kitcoon_desert.en: Hmm, do you think they'd eat granola?
kitcoon_desert.trans: 嗯，你觉得它们喜欢吃格兰诺拉吗？

ghost.en: Don't worry little guy, Woby and I will take care of it.
ghost.trans: 别担心，小家伙，我和沃比会处理好的。

firestarter.en: We need to have a group meeting about fire safety.
firestarter.trans: 我们得开个防火安全群组会议。

murderer.en: Hey %s! That's going too far!
murderer.trans: 嘿，%s!那样太过了！

attacker.en: I guess he IS a monster... it's only natural.
attacker.trans: 他本来就是一直野兽……所以兽性大发也是自然。

reviver.en: Thanks for the help! You'll make a great Pinetree Pioneer someday!
reviver.trans: 谢谢你的帮助! 你总有一天会成为一名优秀的松树先锋队员的!

generic.en: Hi %s!
generic.trans: 你好%s！

pitchfork.en: I'm more of a forager than a farmer.
pitchfork.trans: 与其说我是个农民，不如说我是个觅食者。

charcoal.en: You find a lot of these in fire pits.
charcoal.trans: 你能在营火里找到很多这样的东西。

chesspiece_catcoon.en: It's not quite as exciting as a monster statue, is it?
chesspiece_catcoon.trans: 完全不如怪兽雕塑来的刺激，对吧？

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: It's probably a good idea to add a steering wheel.
yotd_steeringwheel_item.trans: 加个方向盘也许是个好主意。

klaussackkey.en: There's something weird about this antler.

slingshotammo_gold.trans: 这些子弹是金子做的！真的！

active.en: It's ready to take us somewhere!
active.trans: 它准备带我们去某个地方了！

generic.en: No wonder she was grumpy, there was a pit in her stomach!
generic.trans: 难怪她脾气暴躁，肚子里有个坑！

ratatouille.en: Apparently there's no actual rats in it.
ratatouille.trans: 显然，这里面没有真正的老鼠。

has_item.en: Woby, no paws on the table!

generic.en: Woby, no paws on the table!
generic.trans: 沃比，爪子不能上桌！

wall_ruins_2.trans: 我喜欢这种诡异的气氛。

standing.en: Maybe it wants to roast marshmallows too?

sitting.en: Woby, what's wrong? It's just a table.
sitting.trans: 沃比，怎么了？只是一张桌子而已。

oceanfishingbobber_oval.trans: 一个稍微不那么简单的浮漂。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: I'm starting to get hungry just looking at it...

hermitcrab.en: Hello ma'am! Can I help you with anything?
hermitcrab.trans: 你好，女士！有什么需要帮忙的吗？

carnivalcannon_kit.en: I just hope it doesn't startle Woby.

chesspiece_clayhound.en: He wasn't a very good dog.

potato_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
potato_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: I think there's a badge for helping the elderly move. But we'll do it just 'cuz, right Wobers?
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 帮助老人搬家应该是有徽章奖励的。但我们做好事不求回报，对吧沃比？

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: This story could use a few more monsters.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 这个故事再多几个的怪物就合理了。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: Do you think it's powered by magic?
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 它会不会是魔法驱动的？

halloweencandy_12.en: I think these might be real bugs!
halloweencandy_12.trans: 我想这些可能是真正的虫子！

halloweencandy_14.en: Oh! I wasn't expecting it to actually be spicy!

goldenshovel.en: Instead of digging up gold, I can dig with gold!
goldenshovel.trans: 与其挖金子，不如用金铲子来挖！

palmcone_scale.en: My handbook doesn't say anything about trees having scales...
palmcone_scale.trans: 我的手册没提过树木会长鳞片……

target_too_far_away.en: Maybe we should try looking somewhere else.
target_too_far_away.trans: 也许我们应该在其他地方找找。

lost_track.en: Maybe he doesn't know where he's going after all.

tracking_not_mine.en: Whoops, sorry! All man-eating tigers look so alike...
tracking_not_mine.trans: 哎呀，抱歉！食人虎长得都太像了……

nothing_to_track.en: It doesn't look like he's picking up any scents.
nothing_to_track.trans: 看起来他没有捕捉到任何气味。

abandoned.en: I hope he's not too upset at me...

tracking.en: Come on Woby, let's follow him!
tracking.trans: 来吧，沃比，咱们跟着他走！

nearby.en: I think he smells something nearby!
nearby.trans: 他好像闻到了附近有什么！

generic.en: Is that a real man-eating tiger? I thought they'd be bigger.
generic.trans: 这是真正的食人虎吗？我还以为它们会更大一点。

feather_crow.en: Looks like a black bird feather.

generic.en: Come on Woby, let's make something!
generic.trans: 来吧，沃比，让我们做点东西！

burnt.en: This is exactly why learning fire safety is so important!
burnt.trans: 这就是不好好学习消防知识的后果！

empty.en: I know a lot about dogs, but what do cats like?
empty.trans: 我对狗了解很多，但猫喜欢什么呢？

halloweencandy_10.en: Is it made with real tentacles?

halloweencandy_11.en: I'm far too mature for trick or treating.
halloweencandy_11.trans: 我都这么大了，不适合玩不给糖就捣蛋了。

quagmire_pot_syrup.en: I need to sweeten this pot.
quagmire_pot_syrup.trans: 我需要给这锅东西增加甜味。

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: Is it just me, or did that mask get even spookier?
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 只有我觉得那张面具变得更吓人了吗？

redmooneye.trans: 这只眼睛看起来有血丝！

lordfruitfly.en: Neat! I mean, uh... I should probably get him out of the garden.
lordfruitfly.trans: 厉害啊！ 我是说，呃……我也许应该把它赶走。

wereitem_beaver.en: I knew the Werebeaver was real! Nobody believed me!
wereitem_beaver.trans: 我早就知道海狸人是真的存在！就是没人相信我！

boat_rotator.en: Rudders are very important for sailing!
boat_rotator.trans: 转向舵对于航海来说非常重要！

wrong_tile.en: It just doesn't seem to want to grow here.
wrong_tile.trans: 它好像就是不想在这长。

wrong_season.en: It seems happy there, I guess now I just need to be patient.
wrong_season.trans: 它在那里看起来很开心，现在我只需要耐心等待。

generic.en: I can't wait to see what kind of tree it grows into!
generic.trans: 我迫不及待地想看看它能长成什么样的树！

ripe.en: I could've sworn it was green a second ago.
ripe.trans: 我发誓前一秒钟它还是绿色的。

generic.en: It's a little lizard thing!
generic.trans: 这是一只小蜥蜴！

sleeping.en: They're even cuter when they're sleeping.
sleeping.trans: 他们睡觉的时候更可爱。

rope.en: An essential part of any adventuring kit.
rope.trans: 是任何冒险装备的重要组成部分。

hedgehound.en: Maybe he just has a thorn stuck in his paw?
hedgehound.trans: 也许他只是爪子里扎了一根刺？

general.en: It's nice to have a little extra firelight!

out.en: Don't worry, Woby and I will find some kindling for it.
out.trans: 别担心，我和沃比这就去拾点柴火。

general.en: It's nice to have a little extra firelight!

out.en: Don't worry, Woby and I will find some kindling for it.
out.trans: 别担心，我和沃比这就去拾点柴火。

mulleddrink.en: I like to use the cinnamon stick as a straw.
mulleddrink.trans: 我喜欢用肉桂棒做吸管。

petals_evil.en: I feel funny... did I accidentally pick some poison oak?
petals_evil.trans: 我不太对……我是不是不小心摘了一些毒橡果？

statueharp.en: I don't think it has an ear for music. Heh... good one, Walter.
statueharp.trans: 我觉得它没有欣赏音乐的耳朵。嘿……说得好，沃尔特。

burning.en: It's on fire!
burning.trans: 着火了啊！

picked.en: We already gathered all the fruit.
picked.trans: 我们已经收集了所有的水果。

diseased.en: Maybe that's how a moon bush is supposed to look?
diseased.trans: 也许这就是月亮上花丛的样子？

withered.en: I don't think it likes the heat.

generic.en: Is that tree growing... rocks?
generic.trans: 那棵树长的是... 石头吗？

barren.en: I don't think it'll be making fruit anytime soon.
barren.trans: 我想它短期内不会结出果实了。

meatysalad.en: What are those chunks in it?
meatysalad.trans: 里面的那些块状物是什么？

lowered.en: Soon I'll be roasting fish over a campfire.
lowered.trans: 很快我就能在营火上烤鱼了。

fixed.en: That wasn't so hard to fix.

generic.en: Nets sure do make fishing easier.
generic.trans: 有渔网，捕鱼就变简单了。

lavaarena_armorheavy.en: That's as good as it gets.

picked.en: Maybe it will grow back eventually.
picked.trans: 也许以后还会再长出来。

inground.en: Woby, do you think you could dig it up? Guess not.
inground.trans: 沃比，你觉得你能把它挖出来吗？看来不能。

generic.en: Hm... there's no blue mushrooms in my handbook...
generic.trans: 嗯……我的手册里没有蓝色的蘑菇……

antlionhat.en: I've always wanted to look like bug royalty!
antlionhat.trans: 我早就想扮演一回王虫了！

generic.en: I can't wait for it to hatch!
generic.trans: 真期待它孵化啊！

blue_cap.en: I'm preeetty sure this isn't the poisonous kind...

wetgoop.en: Er... maybe Woby will want it...

monkeyisland_portal.en: Neat, a portal! Is... it supposed to look like that?
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 太好了，是传送门啊！传送门……都是这个样子吗？

yots_lantern_post_item.en: Light it up, post to post!
yots_lantern_post_item.trans: 点亮它，让每根柱子都亮起来！

done_salt.en: Look at all that salt, Woby!

dryinginrain.en: Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!
dryinginrain.trans: 不好，下雨了肉就晾不干了！

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 不好，下雨了肉就晾不干了！

done_notmeat.en: Your dried goods are ready, ma'am!

abandoned.en: I don't know if we can fix this, Woby...
abandoned.trans: 不知道我们能不能修好这个，沃比……

done.en: Your dried goods are ready, ma'am!

burnt.en: It burned up!
burnt.trans: 烧起来了！

generic.en: Oooh, we can dry so many things, Woby!
generic.trans: 喔，我们能风干好多东西呢，沃比！

adventure_portal.en: Don't be scared Woby, we'll do this together!
adventure_portal.trans: 别害怕，沃比，我们一起过去！

umbrella.en: It'll stop the raindrops from falling on my head.
umbrella.trans: 它可以阻止雨滴落在我的头上。

treeclump.en: Come on, trees! I just want to see what's over there!
treeclump.trans: 得了，大树！我只是想看看那边有什么！

rook.trans: 我想知道它是如何工作的？

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: I guess it's safer than having a campfire on the deck...
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我想这比在甲板上生营火更安全……

noeyeball.en: Something is missing. Woby, that eyeball is not a toy!
noeyeball.trans: 缺少一些东西。沃比，那个眼球不是玩具！

generic.en: The way it just stares at me is so creepy. I love it.
generic.trans: 它盯得我汗毛直立。我太爱了。

quagmire_casseroledish_small.trans: 可以做各种杂七杂八的小菜。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: I'd better build it if I want to catch any fish.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 想抓鱼的话，我还是把它建好吧。

hungry.en: Feeling a bit... peckish? Heh... you know, because you're a bird?
hungry.trans: 感觉有点……想啄东西？呵……你懂吧，因为你是一只鸟？

starving.en: Oh no! Did I forget to feed you?
starving.trans: 哦，不！ 我忘了喂你了吗？

generic.en: Hey little bird! Anything you want to tell me?
generic.trans: 嘿，小鸟！你有什么想告诉我的吗？

sleeping.en: Shhh, you have to be extra quiet Woby.

mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

yotd_anchor.en: That's gotta be the fanciest anchor I've ever seen.
yotd_anchor.trans: 这是我见过的最大的船锚！

salty_dog.en: He's not technically a dog, but he's still a good boy!
salty_dog.trans: 严格来说他不是狗，但仍旧是个好男孩！

spear_gungnir.en: I could do a quick charge with that.

forgetmelots.en: I keep forgetting to look them up in my handbook.
forgetmelots.trans: 我老是忘了在我的手册上找他们的名字。

sandspike.en: Hey, careful! You almost hit me with that!
sandspike.trans: 嘿，小心！你差点用那个打我！

spice_chili.en: A little bit of spice never hurt anyone.
spice_chili.trans: 一点点的调味品不会伤害任何人。

wetpaper.en: Better than a wet blanket! Heh... good one Walter.
wetpaper.trans: 比湿毯子好！嘿…… 好样的，沃尔特。

generic.en: If you read the books out loud it's almost like listening to a radio play.
generic.trans: 放声读书的感觉跟收听广播剧很像。

burnt.en: Poor Ms. Wickerbottom...
burnt.trans: 可怜的薇克巴顿女士……

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: It's always best to be prepared!

razor.en: I found a whisker on my chin, I'm sure my beard will come in any day now.
razor.trans: 我在下巴上发现了一根胡须，我相信我的胡须随时会出现的。

dumbbell_heat.en: I can warm up without lifting anything! N-not that I can't!
dumbbell_heat.trans: 我不需要举铁就能热身！不是说我拿不起来啊！

slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 现在我们变得讲究起来了！

kitcoon_moon.en: Hmm, do you think they'd eat granola?
kitcoon_moon.trans: 嗯，你觉得它们喜欢吃格兰诺拉吗？

pudgy.en: We might need to cut back on the treats...
pudgy.trans: 我们要少吃一些甜食了……

mypartner.en: I'm glad you and Woby get along so well. We're like a team!
mypartner.trans: 我很高兴你和沃比相处得这么好。我们就像是一个团队的！

follower.en: Look Woby, we made a new friend!
follower.trans: 看啊，沃比，我们交到了一个新朋友！

dead_mypartner.en: D-don't worry! I know first aid!

domesticated.en: He's almost as friendly as Woby now.
domesticated.trans: 他现在几乎和沃比一样友好了。

naked.en: Don't worry Woby, I'd never do that to you... unless you had mats.
naked.trans: 别担心，沃比，我不会这样对你的。

generic.en: He's almost as big as you are, Woby!
generic.trans: 他几乎和你一样大，沃比！

burnt_marsh_bush.en: Guess it wasn't a bog monster after all.
burnt_marsh_bush.trans: 看来它并不是什么沼泽怪兽。

quagmire_oven.en: It needs ingredients to make the science work.
quagmire_oven.trans: 需要加些材料才会有化学反应。

coolant.en: I don't know what that stuff is, but I love it.
coolant.trans: 虽然不知道是什么，但我超喜欢它。

playing.en: I just need to hit it at the right time...
playing.trans: 我只需要在正确的时间打中……

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

bird_mutant_spitter.en: Maybe it's a cardinal? A... really sick cardinal?
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 也许它是凤头鸟？病的凤头鸟？

powder_monkey.en: Maybe they're pirates cursed to be monkeys! Or monkeys cursed to be pirates...
powder_monkey.trans: 也许他们是被诅咒成猴子的海盗！或者是猴子被诅咒成了海盗……

greenstaff.en: I wish I had this when I had to break camp in the Pinetree Pioneers...
greenstaff.trans: 在松树先锋队的拆帐篷训练时有这个就好了……

blueprint.en: I see it too, Woby! Should we get it?
blueprint.trans: 我也看到了，沃比！我们要把它拿下来吗？

generic.en: Careful Woby, it doesn't look very stable.
generic.trans: 小心沃比，它看起来不是很稳定。

bandage.en: You can never be too prepared when you're out in the wilderness.
bandage.trans: 当你在野外的时候，一定要做好应对各种情况的准备。

voltgoatjelly.en: It definitely has a zing to it.

costume_fool_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_fool_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

generic.en: I think something lives in there!
generic.trans: 应该有人住在里面！

empty.en: Nobody's home.
empty.trans: 家里没人。

battlesong_sanitygain.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_sanitygain.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: Woah, that's a lot of wings for one hat!
wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 哇，一顶帽子有这么多翅膀！

tallbird.en: Woah! Do you fly? Or are you more like an ostrich?
tallbird.trans: 哇！你会飞吗？还是你更像一只鸵鸟？

vault_lobby_exit.en: You think this is the way out, Woby?
vault_lobby_exit.trans: 你觉得这是出路吗，沃比？

greengem.trans: 这是一颗很大的绿宝石！

kelp_dried.en: Crunchy and salty. It's not bad.
kelp_dried.trans: 脆脆的，咸咸的。味道还不错。

oceantree_pillar.en: It's a pretty swell shade tree!
oceantree_pillar.trans: 这是一棵很好的遮阳树！

battlesong_healthgain.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_healthgain.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

ghost.en: I'll get you fixed up lickety-split!
ghost.trans: 我会马上救你的！

firestarter.en: %s! Did you not get your fire safety badge yet?
firestarter.trans: %s！你拿到了消防安全奖章了吗？

murderer.en: You'll be kicked out of the Pioneers for this, %s!
murderer.trans: 你会被开除出松树先锋队的，%s！

attacker.en: Hey, that's not how a Pinetree Pioneer acts!
attacker.trans: 嘿，松树先锋队员不应该这样做！

reviver.en: I knew I could count on a fellow Pinetree Pioneer.
reviver.trans: 我就知道我可以指望松树先锋队的同伴。

generic.en: Hi %s! You kind of remind me of someone...
generic.trans: 嗨，%s！你有点让我想起了一个人……

generic.en: It looks like they're building something, but what?
generic.trans: 看起来他们好像在建造什么东西，但是是什么呢？

burnt.en: Darnit! Now I'll never know what it was!
burnt.trans: 糟糕！现在我永远不会知道那是什么了！

moonglass_wobster_den.en: That's where the Wobsters make camp.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 那里就是月光龙虾的窝。

armor_lunarplant.en: It makes me feel so safe, it's scary!
armor_lunarplant.trans: 它竟然给了我安全感，可怕！

record_creepyforest.en: It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.
record_creepyforest.trans: 虽然不是《午夜广播》，但也挺不错。

waterplant_baby.en: I think I'm getting better at gardening!
waterplant_baby.trans: 我觉得我的园艺技术越来越好了！

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: What if the race just went on forever?
yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.trans: 如果比赛就这样一直进行下去会怎么样？

tentacle_pillar.en: I kind of want to poke it.

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: It's always best to be prepared!

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: This doesn't look hard to set up.

slingshotammo_rock.en: They're not the best, but they'll work.
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 虽然不是最好的，但也能用。

strawhat.en: That hat would never pass uniform inspection.
strawhat.trans: 那顶帽子绝对不能通过统一检查。

monkeytail.en: I wonder if there's any real monkeys hiding in there?
monkeytail.trans: 我想知道里面是不是藏了真正的猴子？

generic.en: It hasn't grown back yet.
generic.trans: 它还没有长回来。

burnt.en: That wasn't kindling!
burnt.trans: 那个不是柴火！

generic.en: It's fishing for kits!
generic.trans: 这就是猫咪们的钓鱼！

burnt.en: I guess it was too convincing, someone tried to cook it!
burnt.trans: 可能因为太逼真，有人拿去做饭了！

generic.en: I wonder if the kits think it's a real bird?
generic.trans: 不知道小猫咪们会不会觉得是一只真鸟？

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.en: Where should we toss this, Woby?
boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我们往哪丢这个呢，沃比？

cotl_trinket.en: I hope whoever lost it isn't missing it too much.
cotl_trinket.trans: 我希望把它弄丢的人不会太想念它。

undrawn.en: Woby, sit still! I'll draw your portrait.

generic.en: Who drew this?
generic.trans: 这是谁画的？

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: This armor has been petrified for maximum protection.
lavaarena_armorextraheavy.trans: 这副盔甲已经石化，提供最大程度的保护。

cutless.en: Toy swords are for little kids.
cutless.trans: 玩具剑是给小孩子用的。

pocketwatch_parts.en: Woah, these gears are kind of spooky!

blowdart_pipe.en: It's not as good as my slingshot, but it'll do the trick.
blowdart_pipe.trans: 虽然没有我的弹弓好，但是也有些作用。

burnt.en: That's not good...
burnt.trans: 这可不好……

generic.en: What should we make, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该做什么，沃比？

empty.en: I should offer it something, but what should it be...
empty.trans: 我应该给它贡点东西，但应该是什么呢……

record_drstyle.en: Woby likes to howl along, don't you girl?
record_drstyle.trans: 沃比想跟着嚎叫，对不对，小姑娘？

skeletonhat.en: Good thing they had such a thick skull, this makes a great helmet!
skeletonhat.trans: 好在他们有这么厚的头骨，这是个不错的头盔！

hermitcrab_shell.en: Aw, we can visit Ms. Pearl instantly!
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 哇，我们能瞬间拜访珍珠女士了！

mutator_hider.en: Hey, cookies! Um... what are these made of, exactly?
mutator_hider.trans: 嘿，居然是曲奇饼！呃……到底是用什么做的呢？

undrawn.en: Woby, wanna do a pawprint painting?

generic.en: Is it upside down?
generic.trans: 上下颠倒了吗？

ghost.en: See, you do have a soul! Now all you need is a heart.
ghost.trans: 你看，你也是有灵魂的！现在就差一颗心脏了。

firestarter.en: Hey! You'll burn down the camp!
firestarter.trans: 嘿！你这样会烧掉营地的！

murderer.en: You're a killer robot? Amazing! Wait, no Walter, not amazing!
murderer.trans: 你是机器人杀手？太神奇了！等等，不，沃尔特，这不是好事！

attacker.en: Is... something wrong with %s?
attacker.trans: %s出了问题吗？

reviver.en: Aw, you do care about us "meatsacks"!
reviver.trans: 嗷，你还是很关心我们这些“肉袋”嘛！

generic.en: Hey %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s！

eyeturret.en: It's keeping an eye on me! Get it? Because it's... you know...
eyeturret.trans: 它一直盯着我。明白了吗？因为它是……你懂的……

formal_blueprint.en: This doesn't seem very practical for the outdoors.
formal_blueprint.trans: 这在户外似乎不太实用。

held.en: The bugs in my pocket might like some light.
held.trans: 我口袋里的虫子可能会喜欢光。

generic.en: Don't eat the spores Woby, a mushtree might grow in your stomach!
generic.trans: 不要吃孢子，沃比，你的胃里可能会长出一棵蘑菇树来。

glass.en: It's like it's frozen in time.
glass.trans: 仿佛是冻结在了时间里一样。

generic.en: This would make a great swimming hole! It's even heated!
generic.trans: 在这里游泳很不错！水还是热的！

empty.en: It's a crater, I guess that's pretty common on the moon.
empty.trans: 这是一个月坑，在月球上应该很常见。

dragonboat_pack.en: Wow, how did they pack this all up so tightly?
dragonboat_pack.trans: 哇，这么多东西是怎么打包到一起的？

hermit_bundle.en: I think she's really warming up to us, Woby!
hermit_bundle.trans: 她开始对我们热情起来了，沃比！

marblebean.en: I'm pretty sure it's just a rock.
marblebean.trans: 我很确定这只是一块石头。

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: It's a real dog and pony show without the dog, Woby!
playbill_the_princess_yoth.trans: 这就是一场马戏，不是狗戏，沃比！

mutator_moon.en: Hey, cookies! Um... what are these made of, exactly?
mutator_moon.trans: 嘿，居然是曲奇饼！呃……到底是用什么做的呢？

ice_blueprint.en: I guess a beefalo's own fuzzy coat isn't enough to keep warm.
ice_blueprint.trans: 看来皮弗娄牛自己的绒毛还不够保暖。

spider_healer.en: Aw, what a helpful little guy!
spider_healer.trans: 嗷，多么乐于助人的小家伙啊！

friendlyfruitfly.en: I'm going to call you Buzzy!

generic.en: Look at the colouring on that one!
generic.trans: 快看那家伙的颜色！

sleeping.en: I should probably leave them alone...

statue.en: I wonder who made these statues? They look so real!
statue.trans: 不知道是谁做的这些雕像？看起来好逼真！

generic.en: Who's a good boy?
generic.trans: 你是不是乖狗狗？

generic.en: Is there a badge for winning all the prizes?
generic.trans: 如果赢得所有奖品，会颁发额外的勋章吗？

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: I think there's something in there...

generic.en: Do you hear that whispering, Woby?
generic.trans: 你听到那低语声了吗，沃比？

security_pulse_cage.en: It's empty, Woby. Let's find something to put in there.
security_pulse_cage.trans: 它是空的，沃比。让我们找到一些东西放进去。

picked.en: I can't get anymore out of that shrub.
picked.trans: 从那丛灌木中采集不到更多果实了。

generic.en: It reminds me of those tentacle monsters.
generic.trans: 它让我想起来那些带触手的怪物。

fishsticks.en: Delicious, nutritious and full of fishes.
fishsticks.trans: 美味可口，营养丰富，满满都是鱼肉。

generic.en: Can I cook marshmallows over it though?
generic.trans: 不过我可以在上面烤棉花糖吗？

marbletree.en: I don't think it'll make for good firewood.

quagmire_park_fountain.en: Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 它和水连在一起很长时间了。

waterplant_planter.en: Don't worry, we'll find a nice rock to plant you on.
waterplant_planter.trans: 别担心，我们会找一块好石头把你种上的。

sketch.en: I think I could sculpt this! I'm pretty good at arts and crafts.
sketch.trans: 我想我可以雕刻这个！我很擅长艺术和手工。

humanmeat.en: Flesh is flesh. Where do I draw the line?

watermelon_cooked.en: It's still sweet, but not as refreshing...
watermelon_cooked.trans: 还是很甜，但没有那么清爽了……

cave_fern.en: There's some weird plants growing down here.
cave_fern.trans: 下面长了一些奇怪的植物。

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: I kind of wish they had a bigger one.
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 我还指望他们有更大的呢。

mutator_healer.en: Neat! There aren't any actual spider bits in these though, right?
mutator_healer.trans: 漂亮! 不过这里面没有真的蜘蛛肉，对吧？

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

acorn.en: I wonder if there's any squirrels around.
acorn.trans: 不知道周围有没有小松鼠。

healingsalve_acid.trans: 咱们早都准备好了，沃比！

shadow_beef_bell.trans: 看起来像急救术一样，但却是魔法。

record_danger.en: Woby likes to howl along, don't you girl?
record_danger.trans: 沃比想跟着嚎叫，对不对，小姑娘？

dryinginrain.en: Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!
dryinginrain.trans: 不好，下雨了肉就晾不干了！

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 不好，下雨了肉就晾不干了！

generic.en: Those are some pretty swell looking drying racks.
generic.trans: 这些晾肉架看起来真不错。

burnt.en: It burned up!
burnt.trans: 烧起来了！

beehat.en: I can finally walk among the bees!
beehat.trans: 我终于可以和蜜蜂们亲密接触了！

handpillow_steelwool.en: It's not so bad, I once made a bed out of pine needles.
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 这就不错了，我曾经用松针铺过一张床。

lunarfrog.en: I wonder what it's like to see through so many eyes?
lunarfrog.trans: 不知道透过这么多双眼睛之后会看到什么？

gunpowder.en: I better make sure none of the younger kids play with this.
gunpowder.trans: 这个不能让年幼的孩子玩。

spiderhole.en: Someone needs to dust more often, everything's covered in cobwebs!
spiderhole.trans: 需要经常除尘，所有的东西都布满了蜘蛛网！

yoth_knighthat.en: I need to practice my gallop!

yotp_food1.en: We'll have his head on a platter!
yotp_food1.trans: 我们会把他的头放在盘子里！

yotp_food2.en: Well, at least the worms are enjoying it.
yotp_food2.trans: 好吧，至少虫子们很喜欢它。

nonslipgrit.en: Heh. My tools won't give me the slip with this!
nonslipgrit.trans: 嘿。有了这个，我的工具就不打滑了！

yotp_food3.en: Who ate all the good parts?

spiderhole_rock.en: Someone needs to dust more often, everything's covered in cobwebs!
spiderhole_rock.trans: 需要经常除尘，所有的东西都布满了蜘蛛网！

armorsnurtleshell.en: I'm the terrifying snail boy! Part boy, part snail!
armorsnurtleshell.trans: 我是可怕的蜗牛男孩！一半是男孩，一半是蜗牛！

chesspiece_crabking.en: The crabbiest sea monster I've ever met!
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 这是我见过的最像螃蟹的海怪!

kitcoon_yot.en: Hmm, do you think they'd eat granola?
kitcoon_yot.trans: 嗯，你觉得它们喜欢吃格兰诺拉吗？

sculpture_bishophead.trans: 那个在这里是做什么的？

boat_rotator_kit.en: A rudder might come in handy.
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 转向舵可能会派上用场。

warg.en: Are they a friend of yours, Woby?

quagmire_coin1.en: I'd like more than a penny for my thoughts.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 我的想法可值不止这点钱。

monkeyqueen.en: Hello ma'am! Do you need help getting down from there?
monkeyqueen.trans: 你好，女士！你需要帮助从那里下来吗？

quagmire_coin4.en: We can use these to reopen the Gateway.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 可以用它们重新打开大门。

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: I bet we'll be floored by this!
wagpunk_floor_kit.trans: 我赌这东西能把我们惊到地板上！

follower.en: See? We can all get along!
follower.trans: 看到没？大家是可以和睦相处的！

brokenhorn_follower.en: I sure hope your horn grows back.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 你的角一定会长回来的。

brokenhorn.en: Oh no! You lost your horn!

generic.en: Unicorns of the sea.
generic.trans: 海中的独角兽。

fem_puppet.en: Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer always helps those in need!
fem_puppet.trans: 别担心，松树先锋总能帮助到需要帮助的人！

unwritten.en: Well... I guess SOMETHING is in that direction.
unwritten.trans: 好吧……我猜那边有个什么东西。

generic.en: Someone has bad handwriting.
generic.trans: 这字写的真难认。

burnt.en: Hopefully it didn't say anything important.
burnt.trans: 希望不是重要的标识物吧。

flowersalad.en: Even scavenged leaves can be food in the wilderness!
flowersalad.trans: 即使是捡来的树叶，也可以成为荒野中的食物！

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: Maybe I'll put it over here... no, over there!
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 把它放在这……不对，往那边移一点！

construction_plans.en: I'm good at following instructions! I have a badge for it!
construction_plans.trans: 我很会按图索骥！我还得过这方面的奖章！

steeringwheel.en: Come on First Mate Woby, we're going sailing!
steeringwheel.trans: 来吧，大副沃比，我们要出海了！

book_birds.en: I don't want to brag... but I do have a badge in birdwatching.
book_birds.trans: 我不是吹牛……我真的有一个观鸟的奖章。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: I never knew skills could be measured by weight.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 我从来不知道技能可以用重量来衡量。

record_main.en: Woby likes to howl along, don't you girl?
record_main.trans: 沃比想跟着嚎叫，对不对，小姑娘？

staffcoldlight.en: I just got a chill up my spine.

polishcookie.en: There's fruit inside, it has to be at least a little healthy.
polishcookie.trans: 里面有水果，应该是比较健康的。

megaflare.en: We don't want anyone feeling left out, right Woby?
megaflare.trans: 我们不希望有人感到落单，对吗，沃比？

drumstick.en: Is it a good idea to eat raw meat...?

pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 时间旅行简直太神奇的！

mask_mirrorhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

merm_tool.en: It must be really hard to make things when you have claws for hands.
merm_tool.trans: 没有双手，只有爪子的话制作东西一定非常困难。

slurper_pelt.trans: 有人知道懂的标本学吗？

footballhat.en: Oh, football! Yeah I'm uh... great at football...
footballhat.trans: 哦，足球！是的，我……很擅长足球……

support_pillar_scaffold.en: I bet there's some interesting secrets hiding under there!
support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 我敢打赌，这里面一定隐藏着一些有趣的秘密！

burning.en: Hey! That's not a fire pit!
burning.trans: 嘿，那不是火坑！

has_item_light.en: Er... it's not even registering on the scale...
has_item_light.trans: 额……它都没在秤上显示出来……

burnt.en: That's what happens when you don't practice fire safety.
burnt.trans: 这就是你不演练消防安全的后果。

generic.en: Is there a badge for growing the biggest vegetable?
generic.trans: 种出最大的蔬菜发奖章吗？

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

tillweedsalve.en: Even weeds can be helpful in the wilderness!
tillweedsalve.trans: 即使是野草，也能在荒野中也是有用的!

archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 想解决一个难题吗，沃比？

watertree_pillar.en: Woah, would you look at the size of that tree!

picked.trans: 我猜这就是普通的海带。

generic.en: It's kelp... or a sea monster DISGUISING themselves as kelp.
generic.trans: 是海带……或者是海怪把自己伪装成了海带。

shovel.en: You never know what you'll find if you do a little digging.
shovel.trans: 永远都不知道会挖出什么来。

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: This one looks way fancier... but still can't get us home.
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 这个看起来更漂亮……但还是不能让我们回家。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: He looks so happy! And hoppy!
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 他蹦蹦跳跳看起来真开心！

trailmix.en: The snack of choice for all intrepid explorers!
trailmix.trans: 是所有勇敢的探险家的首选零食!

pomegranate_oversized.en: Do pomegranates usually get that big?
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 通常石榴能长这么大吗？

woodcarvedhat.en: Mr. Woodie said he and Ms. Lucy would teach me how to whittle!
woodcarvedhat.trans: 伍迪先生说他和露西女士会教我怎么做！

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Don't worry, Woby. Your teeth are safe.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 别担心，沃比。你的牙齿是安全的。

brush.en: Woby loves getting her fur brushed.
brush.trans: 沃比喜欢让人给她刷毛。

sentryward.en: Map making is so much more interesting here!
sentryward.trans: 在这里，地图制作变得更加有趣了！

short.en: It'll hatch any day now, I'm positive!
short.trans: 它随时都会孵化，我很肯定！

cold.en: Come on Woby, help me warm it up.
cold.trans: 来吧，沃比，帮我一起让它暖起来。

hot.en: Uh oh, it's going to be a fried egg if we don't cool it down.
hot.trans: 呃哦，再不降温就成煎蛋了。

generic.en: It's hatching! It's really hatching!
generic.trans: 在孵化了！真的在孵化！

long.en: How long does it take for these to hatch?
long.trans: 孵化这些需要多长时间？

burning.en: Smells kinda yummy.
burning.trans: 闻着有点香呢。

generic.en: Stay away from it, Woby!
generic.trans: 离它远点，沃比！

critter_puppy.en: You and Woby will get along great!
critter_puppy.trans: 你和沃比会相处得很好！

burning.en: Ah!! That's how forest fires start!
burning.trans: 啊！！森林火灾就是这么发生的！

generic.en: To defend our camp!
generic.trans: 可以保护我们的营地！

burnt.en: There go our defenses...
burnt.trans: 我们的防线崩溃了……

off.en: It doesn't look like it's working.
off.trans: 看起来好像没有在工作。

skeleton_notplayer.en: Think it's a monster skeleton, Woby?
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 应该是怪兽的骸骨吧，沃比？

boat_bumper_shell.en: Don't worry Woby, I'm really good at sailing. That's just a precaution!
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 别担心，沃比，我真的很擅长航海。这只是一个安全措施！

chesspiece_moon.en: It tells folks to be-were! Get it?

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: Hope I never have to use it, Woby!
wendy_resurrectiongrave.trans: 希望我永远用不上它，沃比！

farm_plow.en: Hey, farming doesn't seem too hard!

birchnutdrake.en: Hey little guy! What's got you all worked up?

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Now I can hit'em with the moon!
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 现在我可以用月亮打他们了！

tillweed.en: Hey! No weeds allowed in the garden!

walking_stick.en: Sorry Woby, maybe we can play fetch later.
walking_stick.trans: 抱歉沃比，也许晚点再玩接球游戏。

polly_rogers.en: Thanks for the help, Polly! You'd make a great Pinetree Pioneer.
polly_rogers.trans: 谢谢你的帮助，波莉！你会是一个很好的松树先锋队队员。

perd.en: Hey, come back! We just want to eat you!
perd.trans: 嘿，回来！我们只是想吃你！

construction1.en: We've still got a ways to go.

generic.en: Wow! I wonder what it's for?
generic.trans: 哇！不知道这是用来做什么的？

chesspiece_beequeen.en: At least I'm not allergic to bees made out of stone.
chesspiece_beequeen.trans: 至少我对石头做的蜜蜂不过敏。

generic.en: I guess it's kind of like a compass.
generic.trans: 我猜它应该是某种指南针。

batnosehat.en: Milk is good for your skeleton!

saddle_race.en: See? Bugs are helpful in lots of ways!
saddle_race.trans: 看到了吗？虫子在很多方面都能帮到我们！

trident.en: This looks like it could cause some damage.
trident.trans: 这看起来像是会造成一些伤害。

pumpkincookie.en: It's made from a vegetable, so it's healthy.
pumpkincookie.trans: 它是用蔬菜做的，所以很健康。

walkingplank_ancient.en: Oh, I'm good at diving! I got a badge for it!
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 哦，我擅长跳水！我有一个跳水奖章！

moonrockcrater.en: I feel like it's looking at me.

book_gardening.en: I already have my gardening badge.

burning.en: We gotta make sure it doesn't rise from the dead!
burning.trans: 我们得确保它不会死而复生！

reviving.en: Woby! It's back from the dead!

generic.en: That's just how things go in the wilderness, sometimes.
generic.trans: 荒野里有时候就会这样。

gingerbreadhouse.en: What do they do when it rains?

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: Uhh Woby? Do you want this one?

turf_beard_rug.en: It has to be a monster, I'm sure I saw it twitching!
turf_beard_rug.trans: 它一定是个怪物，我确定我看到它在抽搐！

merm_toolshed.en: I wonder what kind of bog monster secrets they're hiding in there...
merm_toolshed.trans: 我想知道他们在里面藏了什么沼泽怪兽的秘密

shadow_forge_kit.en: Don't worry, I'm great at setting things up!
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 别担心，我可擅长组装了！

generic.en: You're right, people SHOULD listen to me more often.
generic.trans: 你是对的，人们应该多听我的话。

moon_altar_wip.en: Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer finishes what they start!
moon_altar_wip.trans: 别担心，松树先锋向来有始有终！

unhappy.en: It's hard to read her expression...

generic.en: Hi!
generic.trans: 你好！

monkeypillar.en: I wonder if I could climb all the way to the top...
monkeypillar.trans: 不知道我能不能爬到顶上去……

cactus_meat_cooked.en: At least it's safe to eat now.

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: This looks like instructions for a beefalo costume! Only part of one, though...
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 这个看起来像制作皮弗娄牛礼服的指南！可惜只有一件……

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: This looks like instructions for a beefalo costume! Only part of one, though...
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 这个看起来像制作皮弗娄牛礼服的指南！可惜只有一件……

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: This looks like instructions for a beefalo costume! Only part of one, though...
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 这个看起来像制作皮弗娄牛礼服的指南！可惜只有一件……

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: It looks like it packs a wallop.

wx78_moduleremover.en: Should I start carrying something like this in my first aid kit?
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 我要不要在急救箱中加入它？

goldenpickaxe.en: It makes sense if you don't think about it.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 如果你不去想，就会觉得很有道理。

weed_ivy.en: It looks like it has a little monster claw, ready to grab you!
weed_ivy.trans: 它好像有个小怪爪，随时准备抓住你！

inactive.en: That's definitely got a supernatural explanation.
inactive.trans: 这绝对有超自然的解释。

handpillow_kelp.en: Well, um... I guess there are worse things to use for a pillow?
handpillow_kelp.trans: 额，啊……还有比它更不适合当枕头的东西吗？

trap.en: We learned how to make them in the Pinetree Pioneers.
trap.trans: 我们在松树先锋队学过怎么设置陷阱。

ruinshat.en: I'm the king! You have to listen to what I say!

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

mosquitobomb.en: Watch out, Woby! We don't wanna get caught up in the buzz!
mosquitobomb.trans: 当心了，沃比！咱们可别炸到自己！

bloom.en: They only bloom spore-adically. Heh... nice one, Walter.
bloom.trans: 它们只会周期性开花。呵……沃尔特，你懂的真多。

generic.en: That one's not in my handbook...
generic.trans: 这个不在我的手册里……

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: I'm great at putting things together!

generic.en: There's a neat little switch that turns it on and off!
generic.trans: 有个精巧的小开关控制着！

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: It should only be handled by someone who knows fire safety. Like me!
halloweenpotion_fire_fx.trans: 只能由懂得消防安全的人处理。比如我！

nightlight.en: It really adds to the atmosphere.

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

cactus_meat.en: Maybe I should take out the spines first.
cactus_meat.trans: 也许我应该先把刺拔下来。

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Icky. Just the way I like it!
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 黏黏黏。正是我喜欢的样子！

deck_of_cards.en: Woby! Pick a card, any card!

moonrock_pieces.en: Should we try to break it apart Woby?
moonrock_pieces.trans: 我们要不要试着把它拆开，沃比？

atrium_key.en: It's the key to this whole mystery!
atrium_key.trans: 这是解开所有谜底的钥匙！

featherhat.en: And I thought my bird watching badge was a feather in my cap!
featherhat.trans: 我还以为我的观鸟奖章会是帽子上的一根羽毛呢！

pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 制作钟表看起来挺复杂的。

balloonvest.en: I guess it's better than not having a life jacket at all...

line_1.en: It looks like things weren't going so well for the people here.
line_1.trans: 看来这里的人原来日子并不好过。

line_2.en: I can't tell what's happening in this one, the picture's worn off.
line_2.trans: 我看不出它记录了了什么，画面已经剥落的难以辨认了。

line_5.en: That must be what the city looked like a long time ago.
line_5.trans: 远古时候，城市一定就是那个样子。

line_3.en: There's... a shadow? Or something... they took some artistic liberties.
line_3.trans: 这是……影子？还是别的什么……这里有一些艺术发挥。

line_4.en: Woah, looks like they all started changing.
line_4.trans: 哇哦，看来他们都开始变了。

destabilizing.en: Is it supposed to be making that sound?
destabilizing.trans: 它发出这种声音正常吗？

charging.en: I guess we'll have to wait for it to power up.

cooldown.en: I guess I should give it a rest for now.
cooldown.trans: 我想我应该让它暂时休息一下了。

off.en: It looks like it's missing a piece.

abandoned.en: Aw, I don't think we can fix that.
abandoned.trans: 哦，我觉得我们修不好它。

generic.en: I hope Ms. Pearl likes it!
generic.trans: 希望珍珠女士会喜欢！

burning.en: Doing what logs do.
burning.trans: 它在做木头应该做的事。

generic.en: Firewood!
generic.trans: 柴火！

spider_repellent.en: Aw, why would I want the spiders to go away?
spider_repellent.trans: 噢，我怎么会想要让蜘蛛离开呢？

trails.en: He's got a strong arm on him.

generic.en: My handbook doesn't show them in this colour...
generic.trans: 我的手册上没有这个颜色的……

pigtent.trans: 这是一个相当不错的帐篷。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 真是熊险的逃脱！听懂没？

carnival_vest_c.en: It really helps in hot weather!
carnival_vest_c.trans: 天气热的时候穿很有帮助！

carnival_vest_b.en: I can blend in with the trees!
carnival_vest_b.trans: 这样我就可以跟树打成一片了！

waxpaper.en: Mom used to use something like this for baking.
waxpaper.trans: 妈妈曾经用这样的东西来烘焙。

emberlight.en: There's no wood in this campfire. Oh well.
emberlight.trans: 营火里没有一丁点木头。哎，算了。

growing.trans: 我很高兴它们能长回来！

generic.en: Maybe there's a Medusa nearby... a salt Medusa...
generic.trans: 也许附近有一个美杜莎……一个盐美杜莎……

book_bees.en: There aren't real bees inside, right? Heh, no, that would be silly.
book_bees.trans: 里面没真的蜜蜂吧？哈哈，应该不至于那么疯。

burning.en: You're supposed to chop the tree first, THEN build the fire!
burning.trans: 你应该先砍树，然后再生火！

chopped.en: This tree looks stumped. Heh, nice one Walter.
chopped.trans: 这棵树成为树桩了。嘿，干得漂亮，沃尔特。

burnt.en: That tree just couldn't wait to be a campfire...
burnt.trans: 那棵树只是迫不及待地想成为一堆篝火……

generic.en: What a scraggly tree.
generic.trans: 好消瘦的一棵树。

revealed.en: He was hiding in plain sight!
revealed.trans: 他刚刚藏得很显眼，可就是不容易发现！

generic.en: You're right, Woby. That's an odd one.
generic.trans: 你说得对，沃比。那人确实古怪。

gazpacho.en: (Sigh) I know it's probably good for me...
gazpacho.trans: (叹气)我知道这可能对我有好处……

archive_lockbox.en: I wish it came with instructions...

carnival_vest_a.en: I wonder if those bird kids would want to join my Pioneer troop...
carnival_vest_a.trans: 不知道那些鸟儿想不想加入我的先锋队……

hound.en: Hey Woby, another dog for you to play with!
hound.trans: 嘿，沃比，又有一只狗可以和你玩了！

firestarter.en: Who gave the monkey a torch?
firestarter.trans: 谁给了猴子一个火把？

ghost.en: Somehow a monkey ghost just isn't as spooky.
ghost.trans: 说来也怪，猴子的鬼魂并不吓人。

murderer.en: Killer monkey!!
murderer.trans: 杀人猴！！

attacker.en: I don't think that monkey's friendly.
attacker.trans: 我认为那只猴子不太友好。

reviver.en: This is why you should always be kind to animals.
reviver.trans: 这就是为什么大家要善待动物。

generic.en: Huh. That monkey seems weirdly familiar...
generic.trans: 怪事。这只猴子好像很熟悉……

generic.en: I guess you're in charge around here?
generic.trans: 我猜你是这里的老大？

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: These notes contain important clues to a mystery, Woby.
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 这些笔记包含了一个谜团的重要线索，沃比。

mask_queenhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: It was more exciting when it was moving.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 它能动弹的时候更有意思一点。

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

yotb_post_item.en: This looks easy enough to put together.

inspectself.en: A Pinetree Pioneer through and through!
inspectself.trans: 意气风发的松树先锋队员！

book_brimstone.en: Wendy already spoiled the ending for me...
book_brimstone.trans: 温蒂已经跟我剧透过了。

fused_shadeling.en: Woby, look! It has a ball on its tail!
fused_shadeling.trans: 沃比，快看！它的尾巴上有颗球！

glassed.en: Wait, this isn't ice... it's glass!

cave.en: I can't see through stone... or can I? ...Nope.

night_new.en: I know all the moon phases, this one's a new moon.
night_new.trans: 我知道所有的月相，这个是新月。

night_full.en: The full moon, a.k.a. best time to spot a werewolf!
night_full.trans: 月圆之夜，也就是发现狼人的最佳时机！

generic.en: Huh? I can see the moon!
generic.trans: 咦？我可以看到月亮！

archive_security_pulse.en: Come on Woby, let's see where it goes!
archive_security_pulse.trans: 跟我来，沃比，我们去看看会通向哪里！

generic.en: A little extra flavour never hurt anyone.
generic.trans: 一点额外的味道不会伤害任何人。

tomato_oversized.en: It's bigger than you Woby! Well, one version of you at least.
tomato_oversized.trans: 它比你都大，沃比！嗯，至少比你的一个版本大。

driftwood_log.en: You'll float too, if you hold onto it!
driftwood_log.trans: 只要你抓住它，你也会浮起来的！

burning.en: If it's a bog monster, it's pretty committed to its disguise.
burning.trans: 如果是沼泽怪兽的话，那它的伪装也太逼真了。

picked.en: Ow!! Does anyone have a bandage?!

burnt.en: Guess it wasn't a bog monster after all.
burnt.trans: 看来它并不是什么沼泽怪兽。

generic.en: It might be a bog monster in disguise.
generic.trans: 这可能是沼泽怪兽的伪装。

infused.en: Look at that, Woby! It's glowing!
infused.trans: 快看那个，沃比！它在发光！

generic.en: I've never seen glass made by lightning before!
generic.trans: 我以前从来没见过雷劈出来的玻璃！

succulent_potted.en: I guess it's nice. I prefer plants outdoors though.
succulent_potted.trans: 还不错。不过我更喜欢野外的植物。

dug_sapling.en: Hey Woby, do you see a good spot to plant this?
dug_sapling.trans: 嘿，沃比，你看有什么好地方可以种这个吗？

generic.en: I always sleep better in a tent.
generic.trans: 我总是在帐篷里睡得更好。

burnt.en: I guess I set it up too close to the campfire.
burnt.trans: 搭的离营火太近了。

boat_grass_item.en: You have to make do with what you have out in the wilderness!
boat_grass_item.trans: 在野外，必须充分利用一切可用物资！

moonglassaxe.en: Hey... it just occurred to me that this might be dangerous.
moonglassaxe.trans: 嘿... 我突然想到这可能很危险。

bodypillow_petals.en: Don't worry, I already checked it for bees.
bodypillow_petals.trans: 别担心，我检查过，没蜜蜂。

pocket_scale.en: Do you think there's a badge for catching the biggest fish?
pocket_scale.trans: 抓到最大的鱼会有奖章吗？

giftwrap.en: I'm not great at wrapping things... it always ends up a crumpled ball.
giftwrap.trans: 我不擅长包装东西……它总是最后变成一个皱巴巴的球。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

moon_cap_cooked.en: This doesn't seem like the smartest idea.

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: Aww, merms get all the good stuff.
mermarmorupgradedhat.trans: 嗷…鱼人们得到了所有好东西。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: There's a real kick to it!

dreadstone_stack.en: I bet there's more buried deep underground!
dreadstone_stack.trans: 我敢打赌，地下肯定埋藏着更多东西！

quagmire_sapling.en: I can't get anything else out of that.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 我从中弄不到其他东西。

milkywhites.en: Woby, can you find me a stick? I want to poke it.
milkywhites.trans: 沃比，你能给我找一根棍子吗？我想捅捅它。

picked.en: Invisible eggs? Oh, no it's just empty.
picked.trans: 隐形蛋？哦，不，它只是空的。

generic.en: She was protecting her nest...
generic.trans: 她在保护她的窝……

eyemaskhat.en: Don't worry Woby. It's just a hat, see?
eyemaskhat.trans: 别担心，沃比，就是一顶帽子，看到没？

meat.en: I hope I don't get sick from eating this...
meat.trans: 我希望我不会因为吃这个而生病……

lightbulb.en: Will I start glowing if I eat it?
lightbulb.trans: 我吃了会不会开始发光？

locked.en: It won't open without the key.

generic.en: It's a safe. For keeping things safe.
generic.trans: 这是保险箱，用来保护物品安全的。

rock_petrified_tree_old.en: What could've turned it to stone?

burning.en: You're supposed to make a pit, gather the firewood and THEN make a fire!
burning.trans: 你应该挖一个坑，收集木柴，然后生火！

burnt.en: That could've been bad.
burnt.trans: 这可能会很糟糕。

generic.en: Looks kind of eerie, doesn't it?
generic.trans: 看起来有点诡异，不是吗？

mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

yots_worm.en: Woby, watch out for that worm!

honeynuggets.en: I loved these when I was little.
honeynuggets.trans: 我小的时候很喜欢这个。

desiccantboosted.en: It sure keeps me nice and dry.

armormarble.en: Will I be able to walk in that?
armormarble.trans: 穿了以后还能走得动吗？

ghost.en: We didn't cover this in first aid, but I'm sure I can figure it out!
ghost.trans: 我们在急救课上没有讲过这个，但我相信我能想出办法来！

firestarter.en: Uh, Ms. %s... that's not how you make a campfire.
firestarter.trans: 呃，%s小姐……营火不是这么生的。

murderer.en: Watch out Woby, she's a murderer!
murderer.trans: 小心了，沃比，她是个杀人犯！

attacker.en: You're making Woby nervous, Ms. %s...
attacker.trans: 你让沃比警张起来了，%s小姐……

reviver.en: Thanks for patching me up, Ms. %s!
reviver.trans: 多谢你救我，%s小姐！

generic.en: Hey Ms. %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s小姐！

charlie_npc.en: Excuse me, ma'am! It's dangerous here, do you need any assistance?
charlie_npc.trans: 打扰了，女士！这里很危险，有什么能帮到您的吗？

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: I'd better start training my carrat.
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 我最好早点开始训练我的胡萝卜鼠。

record.en: I could listen to this forever!

fossil_piece.en: The bones of an ancient creature!

follower.en: See? We can all get along just fine.
follower.trans: 看吧？我们都可以相处得很好。

generic.en: It's a walking, talking pig!
generic.trans: 这是一只会走路、会说话的猪！

burnt.en: Not mush we can do now.
burnt.trans: 有点无能为力。

off.en: It's pretty... but I can't roast marshmallows over it.
off.trans: 很漂亮... 但我不能在上面烤棉花糖。

ready.en: Maybe I can unlock it with something...
ready.trans: 也许我可以找到解锁的东西……

generic.en: This looks important.
generic.trans: 这个看起来很重要。

firenettles.en: They're even worse than poison oak!

shroombait.en: Don't eat that Woby! It'll knock you right out.
shroombait.trans: 别吃那个沃比！它会让你昏过去的。

scrap_monoclehat.en: Woah! It's like binoculars, but... well, the opposite of that!
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 哇哦！就像是双筒望远镜，不过……额，正好相反！

wilted.en: Those flowers are looking pretty sad.

oldlight.en: Looks like we need to replace a bulb.
oldlight.trans: 看来我们需要更换一个灯泡。

generic.en: Is somebody decorating out here?
generic.trans: 有人在这里装修吗？

burnt.en: That's how forest fires get started!
burnt.trans: 森林大火就是这样引发的！

empty.en: Hey... I think I saw something move under there.
empty.trans: 嘿，我看到下面有东西在动。

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: It's always best to be prepared!

beargerfur_sack.en: We can keep our snacks cold when we go exploring, Woby!
beargerfur_sack.trans: 我们探索的同时也能让零食保持凉爽了，沃比！

papyrus.en: Just some paper with nothing on it.
papyrus.trans: 只是一些纸，上面什么都没有。

shadowthrall_parasite.en: I think it just wants a friend.
shadowthrall_parasite.trans: 依我看它就是想找个朋友。

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: If only we could've gotten along.
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 如果我们能好好相处就好了。

lavae_tooth.en: Aw, they lost their first tooth!

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: Wobes! I think we're the unfinished business for these ghosts!
gestalt_guard_evolved.trans: 沃比! 这些幽灵多半是惦记着我们！

mask_kinghat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

dug_trap_starfish.en: I'm putting them in time out.

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: Cooking's easy if you understand chemistry.
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 懂化学的话做饭就非常简单了。

batwing_cooked.en: Uh... Woby, do you want this?

deflated.en: It's pretty much just a regular balloon now.
deflated.trans: 它跟一只寻常的气球没什么两样。

generic.en: Clowns have strange and mysterious ways...
generic.trans: 小丑既古怪又神秘……

some_kelp.en: More kelp is on the way! Get it, Woby?
some_kelp.trans: 更多海带还会再来！听懂了没，沃比？

lots_of_kelp.en: This is kelpful. Hah! Where are you getting this stuff, Walter?
lots_of_kelp.trans: 海带满溢在外。哈！你都是从哪学的，沃尔特？

generic.en: Need a little kelp? Heh. Good one, Walter.
generic.trans: 拜拜海带？嘿……说得好，沃尔特。

froglegs_cooked.en: It doesn't look as fancy as I imagined.
froglegs_cooked.trans: 看起来并不像我想象的那样花哨。

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: Come on berry bush, we're going on an adventure!
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 来吧，浆果丛，我们要去冒险了！

burning.en: Hey! Brush fires destroy forests!
burning.trans: 嘿，灌木丛火灾会烧毁森林！

diseased.en: That's... not how it's supposed to look, is it?
diseased.trans: 这... ... 不是它应该有的样子，是吗？

withered.en: It's too hot out for anything to grow.
withered.trans: 外面太热了，什么都长不出来。

generic.en: A patch of grass. With bugs in it, if we're lucky.
generic.trans: 一片草地。如果我们幸运的话，里面也许能抓到虫子。

barren.en: This grass needs something to help it grow.
barren.trans: 这种草需要一些东西来帮助它生长。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: I'm good at planting trees, we did it all the time in the Pioneers!
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 我擅长栽树，以前在先锋队我们经常栽。

barnaclinguine.en: Just about anything tastes good with pasta.
barnaclinguine.trans: 任何东西和意大利面一起吃都很美味。

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: It must be some kind of swamp witchcraft!
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 一看就是某种沼泽巫术！

dead.en: I guess it's properly dead now.
dead.trans: 我想它现在已经彻底死了。

generic.en: It's a penguin, risen from the grave!
generic.trans: 是一只企鹅，从坟墓里复活的！

sleeping.en: I think it's sleeping, but it's hard to tell.
sleeping.trans: 我想它是在睡觉，但是很难说。

generic.en: Come on Woby, let's see if the plants need some water.
generic.trans: 来吧，沃比，让我们看看这些植物是否需要水。

empty.en: Maybe I can find a pond around here somewhere...
empty.trans: 也许我能在这附近找到一个池塘……

boatrace_seastack.en: Buoy off the port side! Er, I mean starboard! I'll double check my handbook...
boatrace_seastack.trans: 左舷浮标！额，应该是右舷！等我查查手册……

gems.en: I need to put in the gems first.
gems.trans: 我需要先把宝石放进去。

generic.en: That's where we keep the lightning.
generic.trans: 那就是我们保存闪电的地方。

head.en: Are two heads better than one?

flipped.en: No, Woby. I don't think it wants its belly scratched.
flipped.trans: 别，沃比。我觉得它不是想被挠肚子。

body.en: Beware of de-feet! Get it, Wobes? De-feet!
body.trans: 小心被“脚”杀！听懂没，沃比？脚杀呀！

monkey_smallhat.en: It makes me look like a real pirate!
monkey_smallhat.trans: 它让我看起来像是个真正的海盗！

boat_leak.en: Don't worry! I have a badge in sailing, I know what to do!
boat_leak.trans: 别担心！我有航海奖章，我知道该怎么做！

mutator_dropper.en: Neat! There aren't any actual spider bits in these though, right?
mutator_dropper.trans: 漂亮! 不过这里面没有真的蜘蛛肉，对吧？

dustmothden.en: Woah, so that's where that weird material comes from!
dustmothden.trans: 喔，原来那些奇怪的材料是从那里来的！

eggplant_seeds.en: We should find a place to plant these.
eggplant_seeds.trans: 我们应该找一个地方来种这些。

vegstinger.en: I've never had a spicy drink before.
vegstinger.trans: 我从来没有喝过辣的饮料。

security_pulse_cage_full.en: I wonder if there is a glowing ball trapping badge.
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 我想知道有没有发光球捕捉徽章。

penguin.en: I've never seen one up close before!
penguin.trans: 我还从来没有近距离看过呢！

rainhat.en: I wonder if I could make one for Woby too.
rainhat.trans: 不知道能不能给沃比也做一个。

burning.en: D-don't look, Woby...
burning.trans: 别，别看，沃比……

generic.en: Why couldn't we be friends?
generic.trans: 为什么我们不能成为朋友？

talleggs.trans: 这是一个怪物分量的早餐！

kitcoon_forest.en: Aww, they're so cute even Woby likes them!
kitcoon_forest.trans: 嗷，它们可爱极了，连沃比都喜欢！

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: I'll have it in the water in a jiffy!
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 有我在它很快就能下水！

fishingrod.en: It's a fishing rod, you use it for fishing.
fishingrod.trans: 这是根钓竿，用来钓鱼的。

boatpatch_kelp.en: I knew it was a good idea to pick all that kelp!
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 我就知道把海带都摘下来是个好主意！

book_tentacles.en: Oooh, this reminds me of a radio play where a ship gets eaten by a giant squid!
book_tentacles.trans: 哦，这让我想起了一个广播剧，里面有一艘船被一只巨大的乌贼吃掉了！

flower_withered.en: Should I water it more? Or water it less?!
flower_withered.trans: 我应该多浇水吗？还是少浇水？

burnt.en: Oh no, I thought I smelled a campfire burning around here!
burnt.trans: 不好，我刚刚就在附近闻到了篝火燃烧的味道！

generic.en: I don't know why some people think mannequins are scary.
generic.trans: 我想不通为什么有人会害怕假人。

burning.en: Ah!! That's how forest fires start!
burning.trans: 啊！！森林火灾就是这么发生的！

lowpower.en: I think we need to hook up a another generator to this generator.
lowpower.trans: 我想我们需要在这台发电机上再接一台发电机。

burnt.en: Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.
burnt.trans: 好吧…… 我想薇诺娜得再建一个新的了。

generic.en: A generator! Do you think she could make a radio too...?
generic.trans: 发电机！你觉得她也能做个收音机吗？

diseased.en: Oh no... I think it's sick.
diseased.trans: 哦，不…… 我想它是生病了。

generic.en: That patch of grass is alive!
generic.trans: 那片草地是活的！

generic.en: Is that an undead dog?
generic.trans: 那是一只不死的狗吗？

shieldofterror.en: I like to think it's smiling.

sandblock.en: Woah! How do you do that?

yellowstaff.en: It never hurts to have a little star power.

stash_map.en: Every Pinetree Pioneer knows how to follow a map.
stash_map.trans: 每个松树先锋队员都知道怎么看地图。

line_1.en: I sure wish I could read it.

line_5.en: I sure wish I could read it.

line_3.en: I sure wish I could read it.

pig_coin.en: It looks like a pig's snout! I wonder if that's on purpose.
pig_coin.trans: 看上去像猪鼻子！不知道是不是故意的。

fishingnet.en: Hey Woby, want to go fishing?

generic.en: What should we get, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该拿什么，沃比？

burnt.en: What a waste of supplies...
burnt.trans: 真是浪费物资……

empty.en: I think I need to offer it something for it to work.
empty.trans: 我想我需要给它一些东西才行。

eyebrellahat.en: It keeps an eye on me. Get it? Because it's a giant eyeball?
eyebrellahat.trans: 它一直盯着我。明白了吗？因为它是一个巨大的眼球？

playing_hideandseek.en: Don't give me any hints, Woby!
playing_hideandseek.trans: 不要给我任何提示，沃比！

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: I need to hurry up and find them all!
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我得赶紧把它们都找出来！

generic.en: Aww, it's like a dog house for cats!
generic.trans: 嗷，这就是猫住的狗屋！

burnt.en: I'm glad I taught those little guys how to stop, drop and roll!
burnt.trans: 我很高兴我教会了这些小家伙怎么停止、放下和翻身！

oceanfishableflotsam.en: Now that HAS to be a sea mons-- (sigh) no, just a muddy clump.
oceanfishableflotsam.trans: 抓到深海巨兽了……（叹气）不，只是一团泥巴。

bunnystew.en: There's no Pioneer that could say no to this!
bunnystew.trans: 没有哪个先锋队员能拒绝它！

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: Don't worry kitties, I'll put this together lickety-split!
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 别担心，小猫咪们，我用不了一会儿就能装好！

berries.en: They're not in the poisonous section of my handbook, must be safe!
berries.trans: 手册里有毒物种那一章没有记载它，所以它一定是安全的！

petals.en: Hope the bees aren't too mad at me.
petals.trans: 希望蜜蜂不要对我太生气。

blowdart_fire.en: It's not as good as my slingshot, but it'll do the trick.
blowdart_fire.trans: 虽然没有我的弹弓好，但是也有些作用。

gelblob_bottle.trans: 我们应该给它加上标签。

burnt.en: I guess that's it then.
burnt.trans: 可惜变成了这样。

generic.en: What should we make, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该做什么，沃比？

empty.en: I think it wants something burnt.
empty.trans: 我猜它想要烧焦的东西。

dead.en: Aww, I wanted to ask them what it's like up in space...
dead.trans: 嗷，我想问问他们宇宙是什么样子……

generic.en: Woah, is that a space creature?!
generic.trans: 哇，那个是宇宙生物吗？！

quagmire_key.en: Safe bet this'll come in handy.
quagmire_key.trans: 我敢肯定，它会派上用场的。

dead.en: At least now I can get a better look at it!
dead.trans: 起码我现在可以好好看看它了！

generic.en: I'm starting to think they might be mad at us, Woby.
generic.trans: 我觉得它们可能生我们的气了，沃比。

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: Nothing to see here, folks! Ha ha, get it Woby?
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 没什么可看的，伙计们！哈哈，听懂没，沃比？

generic.en: Why have a house when you could just camp all the time?
generic.trans: 既然你可以一直露营，为什么还要有房子呢？

burnt.en: That's why you don't play with fire.
burnt.trans: 这就是为什么你不应该玩火的原因。

full.en: I can hear oinking coming from inside...
full.trans: 我可以听到里面传来的哼哼声……

drying_notmeat.en: While we're waiting, does anyone want to see this bug I found?
drying_notmeat.trans: 反正我们也在等，有没有人想看看我刚发现的这只虫子？

drying.en: You have to be patient, Woby.

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: I probably should've planned ahead for this.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 我应该提前计划一下的。

dryinginrain.en: I don't think that's going to work.

burnt.en: Nooo the jerky!
burnt.trans: 哎呀，肉干啊！

generic.en: We should make some jerky!
generic.trans: 我们来做点肉干吧！

wx78_scanner_item.en: I guess it's taking a nap.

tomato_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
tomato_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

alterguardian_phase3.en: If I just get a bit closer... I'm sure I can convince them we just want to be friends!
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 如果我能再靠近一点的话……我一定能让它们相信我们只想做朋友！

wormlight.en: We definitely don't have these back home.
wormlight.trans: 我们家乡绝对没有这些。

moon_altar_link.en: What is it? Aaah, the suspense!
moon_altar_link.trans: 这是怎么回事？啊，引人入胜的悬念啊！

icehat.en: There's got to be a better way to stay cool...
icehat.trans: 一定有更好的方法来保持冷静……

marblebean_sapling.en: ...Okay, so I was wrong about it being "just a rock".
marblebean_sapling.trans: ……好吧，我不该说它“只是一块石头”。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

relic.en: It's even older than the knick-knacks at my grandpa's house.
relic.trans: 比我爷爷家的小摆设还要旧。

yellowmooneye.en: Y'ello to you too! Okay, that was bad.
yellowmooneye.trans: 我诚惶（黄）诚恐！好吧，这个有点冷了。

statuemaxwell.en: I'm starting to think that Maxwell guy might be a bit full of himself.
statuemaxwell.trans: 我开始觉得那个叫麦斯威尔的家伙可能有点自以为是。

deflated.en: Aw, it was nice while it lasted.

held.en: Should we brighten the mood, Wobes?
held.trans: 我们要不要点亮一下气氛？

generic.en: Look up, Woby!
generic.trans: 沃比，快抬头看！

armorwagpunk.en: I'll be part boy, part machine!
armorwagpunk.trans: 我一半是男孩，一半是机器！

rope_bridge_kit.en: This is basic Pinetree Pioneer stuff... now, where are those instructions?
rope_bridge_kit.trans: 这是松树先锋队要学的基本内容……好了，指导说明在哪里？

lavaarena_boarlord.en: That's the guy in charge here.

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Woah, it looks a lot stronger now!
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 哇哦，现在看起来强多了！

polly_rogershat.en: I have to be careful putting it on, Polly likes to sleep in it.
polly_rogershat.trans: 我戴的时候要留神，因为波莉喜欢在上面睡觉。

wagpunkhat.en: It's going to suck out my brain! Ha ha, probably not.
wagpunkhat.trans: 会把我的大脑吸出来！哈哈，也许不会。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: A good race needs some planning.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 一场好的比赛需要一些规划。

generic.en: Winona's been using them to find lots of neat stuff!
generic.trans: 薇诺娜用它找到了很多好东西！

poweroff.en: I wonder what they used it for.
poweroff.trans: 我很好奇它是做什么用的。

generic.en: That glass part looks kind of familiar.
generic.trans: 那个玻璃的零件看起来很眼熟。

steelwool.trans: 用来做非常扎人的毛衣。

lunarrift_crystal.en: I need to start a new rock collection!
lunarrift_crystal.trans: 我要新开一套岩石收藏了！

waiting.en: Ah! I-I'm sure some peroxide and a bandage will fix him up.
waiting.trans: 啊！我肯定一些双氧水和绷带会让他好起来的。

generic.en: Aww, are you lost little guy?
generic.trans: 啊，你是不是迷路了，小家伙？

red_cap_cooked.en: Did cooking it make it less poisonous?

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.en: This one is chock full of vitamins!
hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 这一杯满满都是维生素！

ancienttree_seed.en: I need to find just the right spot for this.
ancienttree_seed.trans: 我得给它找个合适的位置。

mutator_warrior.en: Hey, cookies! Um... what are these made of, exactly?
mutator_warrior.trans: 嘿，居然是曲奇饼！呃……到底是用什么做的呢？

dreadstonehat.en: Never forget to wear your dark helmet.
dreadstonehat.trans: 千万别忘记戴上你的黑色头盔。

maxwellhead.en: He sure does have a big head.

accomplishment_shrine.en: I love checking tasks off a list!
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 我最喜欢在清单上打钩了！

bell.en: What if we put it on your collar Woby?
