bell.trans: 我们把它戴在你的项圈上怎么样，沃比？

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

armorslurper.en: The smell kind of ruins my appetite.
armorslurper.trans: 这味道有点破坏我的胃口。

houndmound.en: I bet there's something interesting hiding in there!
houndmound.trans: 我打赌里面一定藏着什么有趣的东西！

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: I don't think the altar will want that.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 我认为这个不适合出现在祭坛上。

seeds_cooked.en: You make do with what you have when you're out in the wilderness.
seeds_cooked.trans: 在野外，要懂得利用身边的资源。

candybag.en: I'm too old for that stuff. But maybe I'll help out the younger kids...
candybag.trans: 我已经是大孩子了，不适合做那个了。但我也愿意帮助一下那些小孩子们……

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.trans: 大热天喝这个简直完美！

book_fish.en: Fishing is a reel-y important part of wilderness survival. Get it? Reel-y?
book_fish.trans: 钓鱼是一项无鱼伦比的荒野求生技能。是谐音梗啊。听懂没？

dragonchilisalad.en: Is it made from real dragons?

monstermeat.en: Uhh Woby? Do you want this?

turnip_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
turnip_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

sewing_kit.en: Better make sure all my badges are secure!
sewing_kit.trans: 最好检查一下我所有的奖章是不是都是安全的！

low.trans: 那块熔岩正在裹上石皮。

generic.en: A crusted over lava pit.
generic.trans: 裹了石皮的熔岩坑。

scandata.trans: 太帅了！接下来扫描我怎么样？

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Maybe this is what he's looking for?
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 也许这就是他在找的东西？

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Um... yeah, this one looks right!
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 呃……对，这个看起来应该是！

batnose.en: Looks like someone got a bit nosy. Get it? Because it's a nose?
batnose.trans: 看起来有人的鼻子嗅到这里了。听懂没？因为它是一只鼻子啊？

wagstaff_tool_3.en: What do you think, Woby? Is this the tool we're looking for?
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 你觉得对不对，沃比？这是我们在找的工具吧？

butterflywings.trans: 大自然真是神奇啊，不是吗？

wagstaff_tool_4.en: It's definitely a tool of some kind... hope it's the right one!
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 肯定是一种工具……希望是对的那种吧！

wagstaff_tool_5.en: That one looks about right... I think?
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 那个看起来就是……我觉得？

dead.en: Darnit... what did I do wrong?

generic.en: That flower isn't in my Pinetree Pioneer handbook.
generic.trans: 我的松树先锋手册里没有这朵花。

book_fire.en: There's a lot of good fire safety tips in here! Um... has Willow read it?
book_fire.trans: 里面有不少好的防火安全小贴士！嗯……薇洛读过了吗？

steeringwheel_item.en: It's probably a good idea to add a steering wheel.
steeringwheel_item.trans: 加个方向盘也许是个好主意。

cactus_flower.en: It looks nice, but getting it was a pain.
cactus_flower.trans: 昙花虽然美丽，可是得到它要冒着被刺到的危险。

torch.en: Is this what they use in England instead of flashlights?
torch.trans: 这就是英国人用来代替手电筒的东西吗？

generic.en: Sorry Woby, that's not for you.
generic.trans: 对不起，沃比，那个不是给你的，

occupied.en: Sorry Woby, that's not for you.
occupied.trans: 对不起，沃比，那个不是给你的，

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: Your bark was worse than their bite, Woby!
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 你以前吠的声音比他们的咬声还要大，沃比！

generic.en: Maybe you could teach me some magic tricks? I'm a quick learner!
generic.trans: 你可以教我一些魔术戏法吗？我学得很快！

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: Aww. Why don't I get to wear it?

moonrockseed.trans: 月亮是不是... 闹鬼了？

bunnyman.en: I've never heard of the Bunnyman before! Better make a note.
bunnyman.trans: 我还从来没听说过兔人！我要用笔记记下。

snowball.en: I've seen you a round! Heh.

generic.en: Ice to meet ya!
generic.trans: 遇“冻”你很高兴！

burnt.en: It wasn't really that useful anyway.
burnt.trans: 反正也不是很有用。

generic.en: A Pinetree Pioneer can smell rain coming a mile away.
generic.trans: 松树先锋队员能闻到一英里外雨的味道。

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: Don't drink it too fast or you'll get a headache.
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 别喝太猛，不然你会头疼的。

lavaarena_armormedium.en: It offers a decent amount of protection.

spiderhat.en: Woby keeps growling at me when I wear it...
spiderhat.trans: 当我戴着它的时候，沃比一直对我咆哮……

beefalofeed.trans: 快过来，皮弗娄牛！开饭了！

chum.en: You use it to lure the fish in.
chum.trans: 你用它来引诱鱼儿上钩。

nightcaphat.en: It's a little sleeping bag for your head.

burning.en: Someone grab some water!
burning.trans: 快取点水来！

diseasing.en: Is it supposed to look like that?

picked.en: Now it'll never grow into a tree.
picked.trans: 这下它永远长不成大树了。

withered.en: I guess it's too hot out.
withered.trans: 我猜一定是因为太热了。

generic.en: It's a baby tree.
generic.trans: 是一颗小树苗。

punchingbag.en: Don't worry Woby, it's just for practice!
punchingbag.trans: 别担心，沃比！只是用来练习的！

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: It has a gaze full of science.

voidcloth_umbrella.en: An umbrella that comes with its own lightning!
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 这把伞可以自行生成闪电！

costume_mirror_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_mirror_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

almost_done_cooking.en: So close... it smells so good!
almost_done_cooking.trans: 马上就好了……真是好闻啊！

generic.en: What a huge oven! We could feed a whole Pioneer troop!
generic.trans: 好大的烤箱啊！都够给一整队松树先锋队员做饭了！

sweatervest.en: This doesn't look like good adventuring wear.
sweatervest.trans: 这看起来不像是好的冒险服。

firecrackers.en: You're not supposed to set those off in the woods.
firecrackers.trans: 你不应该在树林里引爆这些东西。

burnt.en: Smells like burnt bacon.
burnt.trans: 闻起来像烧焦的培根。

generic.en: Don't eat it Woby!
generic.trans: 不要吃它，沃比！

generic.en: What should we make, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该做什么，沃比？

burnt.en: What a waste of good supplies...
burnt.trans: 好好的材料就这么糟蹋了……

empty.en: That's a hungry-looking rabbit statue.
empty.trans: 那尊兔子雕像看起来很饥饿。

horn.trans: 那个可以做一只响亮的号角。

moonstorm_static_roamer.en: Woby, should we name it Sparky?
moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 沃比，我们给它起名叫“火花”怎么样？

purplegem.trans: 紫色通常是一种友好的颜色。

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: The diagram in my handbook shows a bobber, that might help.
oceanfishingbobber_none.trans: 我的手册上画了个浮漂，应该需要一个浮漂。

generic.en: The Pinetree Pioneer handbook says to always bring a compass!
generic.trans: 松树先锋队的手册里说身上要常备一个指南针！

tophat_magician.en: Do you think he can teach me how to pull rabbits out of it?
tophat_magician.trans: 他能教我从里面掏出兔子的把戏吗？

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: I'd have energy for a few more stunts wearing that.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 穿上它，我就有能量多耍几招。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

farm_plow_item.en: Want to help me find a good place for the garden, Woby?
farm_plow_item.trans: 要不要帮我找个好地方种地，沃比？

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

oceanvine.en: Maybe one of them will turn out to be a snake!
oceanvine.trans: 也许其中一条会变成蛇！

corn_oversized.en: Imagine all the popcorn we could make with that!
corn_oversized.trans: 想象一下用它能做多少爆米花呢！

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: Remind me to take this when I'm feeling really funny. Okay, Woby?
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 等我脑子特别乱的时候记得提醒我喝这个，好吗，沃比？

charging.en: That's what Winona uses to control her machines.
charging.trans: 薇诺娜就是用它来控制她的机器。

charged.en: That's what Winona uses to control her machines.
charged.trans: 薇诺娜就是用它来控制她的机器。

generic.en: That's what Winona uses to control her machines.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜就是用它来控制她的机器。

wall_scrap.en: What a neat use of trash!
wall_scrap.trans: 这种利用垃圾的方式太棒了！

pumpkin_lantern.en: I heard a radio show once about a horseman with a pumpkin for a head!
pumpkin_lantern.trans: 我曾经听过一个广播节目，讲的是一个南瓜头的骑士！

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: The blossom interacts well with healing magic.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 这花朵和治愈魔法很合拍。

dumbbell_golden.en: Uh, m-maybe I should start with something a bit lighter.
dumbbell_golden.trans: 呃，也许我应该挑个轻点的入门。

decor_portraitframe.en: It really looks like them! Right, Woby?
decor_portraitframe.trans: 看起来很像！对不对，沃比？

shellweaver.en: You can make a lot of stuff out of salt!

inactive.en: I swear there was something here a second ago.
inactive.trans: 我发誓刚才这里有个东西。

active.en: Hey, where did that come from?

merm.en: A bog monster! I knew they were real!
merm.trans: 沼泽怪物！我就知道他们是真的！

batwing.en: Where did the rest of the bat go?

balloonhat.en: I'm a bit too old for this kind of thing.
balloonhat.trans: 我长大了，不玩这种东西了。

generic.en: So creepy!
generic.trans: 真吓人！

activated.en: Hey, it moves when I move!

carnivaldecor_banner.en: Wait a minute... I think it's made with cardboard and foil!
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 等一下……我想这是用纸板和铝箔做的！

backpack.en: Perfect for carrying supplies! And bugs!
backpack.trans: 非常适合携带补给品！还有虫子！

wagpunk_lever.en: Maybe we'll skip the instructions just this once.
wagpunk_lever.trans: 仅此一次，我们就跳过阅读说明书吧。

bird_egg_cooked.trans: 闻起来像是做好的早餐！

statue.en: Woby's sure sniffing around this statue a lot.
statue.trans: 沃比一直在闻这座雕塑。

generic.en: Don't worry, I'm good with dogs!
generic.trans: 别担心，我很擅长跟狗打交道！

fence.en: Why do we need fences? It's the great outdoors!
fence.trans: 我们为什么需要围栏？这是广阔的户外啊！

chesspiece_formal.en: Ugh. Who would want to be stuck wearing a suit forever?
chesspiece_formal.trans: 额。谁会想永远穿着西装呢？

pumpkin_seeds.en: Woby, do you see a good spot to plant these?
pumpkin_seeds.trans: 沃比，你看有什么好地方可以种这个吗？

reskin_tool.en: It changes how things look, but they're still the same deep down.
reskin_tool.trans: 它改变了事物的外观，但他们在深处还是一样的。

festive_blueprint.en: I wish I could make one for Woby, but her measurements keep changing...
festive_blueprint.trans: 我也想给沃比做一身，但是她的尺码总是在变……

burning.en: You're supposed to chop the tree first, THEN build the fire!
burning.trans: 你应该先砍树，然后再生火!

diseased.en: Maybe it's infested with beetles. I should check!
diseased.trans: 也许是甲虫出没的地方。我应该去看看！

chopped.en: This tree looks stumped. Heh, nice one Walter.
chopped.trans: 这棵树成为树桩了。嘿，干得漂亮，沃尔特。

burnt.en: That tree just couldn't wait to be a campfire...
burnt.trans: 那棵树只是迫不及待地想成为一堆篝火……

generic.en: It's more like a big stick than a tree.
generic.trans: 比起一棵树，它更像一根大棒。

book_silviculture.en: There's so much to learn about the woods!
book_silviculture.trans: 森林里的学问可真多啊!

hot.en: It's rude to spit at people!
hot.trans: 向别人吐口水是很不礼貌的！

hotchili.en: Nothing warms you up like a big bowl of chili.
hotchili.trans: 没有什么比一大碗辣椒更让你温暖的了。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: Those fluffy feathers make me want to run!
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 我一看见那些蓬松的羽毛就想跑！

webberskull.en: No Woby, these bones aren't for chewing on!
webberskull.trans: 不，沃比，这些骨头不是用来嚼的！

exposed.en: Oh, it's just a different kind of rock.
exposed.trans: 噢，只是另一种岩石而已。

generic.en: Hey, what's that stuff inside?
generic.trans: 嘿，里面的那东西是什么呢？

krampus.en: Hey! Did you rifle through my supplies?
krampus.trans: 嘿！是你乱翻了我的物资吗？

nature_blueprint.en: I hope it doesn't attract too many bees.
nature_blueprint.trans: 我希望它不会吸引太多蜜蜂。

hareball.en: That looks like something Woby spit up.
hareball.trans: 这看起来像是沃比吐出来的东西。

stalagmite_tall.en: It's a really tall... one of these!
stalagmite_tall.trans: 这是一个非常高大的……东西!

chesspiece_antlion.en: She really shook you up, didn't she Woby?
chesspiece_antlion.trans: 她真的把你吓坏了，不是吗，沃比？

shadowdancer.en: Mr. Maxwell's actually kind of fun when you get to know him.
shadowdancer.trans: 如果你深入了解，就会发现麦斯威尔先生有时很风趣。

lunar_seed.en: I wonder if there's a badge for defeating a moon god?
lunar_seed.trans: 打败月神有没有徽章拿呢？

beeguard.en: They're just trying to protect their queen.

generic.en: Now I can work towards my carpentry badge!
generic.trans: 现在我可以朝着我的木工徽章努力了！

burnt.en: I guess my carpentry badge will have to wait.
burnt.trans: 我想我的木工徽章得等等了。

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: I think I have a new favourite kind of bug!
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 我有了新的最喜爱的虫子了！

blowdart_lava2.en: It uses a strong blast of air to propel a projectile.
blowdart_lava2.trans: 它利用一股强气流来推动抛射物。

plantregistryhat.en: It's like a handbook you wear on your head! A headbook?
plantregistryhat.trans: 就像把手册戴在头上一样！所以也能叫头册？

generic.en: I've never seen a moth like this before!
generic.trans: 我从来没有见过这样的蛾子！

generic_largestack.en: That's got to be worth a really good prize!

generic_smallstack.en: Should I go get a prize now? Or save up for something really good...
generic_smallstack.trans: 我要不要现在换个奖品呢？还是攒下来换大奖……

generic.en: We're off to a good start Woby, but we can do better!
generic.trans: 我们开了个好头，沃比，不过我们还能做得更好！

costume_doll_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_doll_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

generic.en: I bet that wood is full of termites.
generic.trans: 我敢打赌，那些木头里全是白蚁。

burnt.en: Hopefully all the termites made it out safely.
burnt.trans: 希望所有的白蚁都平安逃出来了。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: Snow fishing? Hmm, a new technique to master...
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 雪天钓鱼？嗯，这是一门新的技术……

ready.en: Huh? I think I hear something moving in there.
ready.trans: 哈？我听到里面有东西在动。

covered.en: I think there's something else hiding in that marble.
covered.trans: 我觉得那块大理石里还藏着别的东西。

nightstick.en: Whose bright idea was this? Get it? Because it's bright? Never mind.
nightstick.trans: 这是谁的好主意？明白了吗？因为它很亮啊？算了吧

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: Look Woby! I think he's rooting for us!
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 快看，沃比！他肯定是在为我们加油！

generic.en: Woby, I can't read the recipe if you chew on the cards!
generic.trans: 沃比，你嚼烂了卡片，我还怎么阅读食谱！

turf_carpetfloor.en: This reminds me of my living room back home.
turf_carpetfloor.trans: 这让我想起了我家乡的客厅。

horrorfuel.en: It can't be THAT bad... can it?
horrorfuel.trans: 不可能那么糟糕……对不对？

generic.en: I wonder if I can catch it.
generic.trans: 不知道能不能抓到它。

generic.en: All set up and ready for a tree.
generic.trans: 搭好了，就差一棵树了。

burnt.en: Maybe... we can make another one?
burnt.trans: 也许……我们能再做一个？

quagmire_rubble_chimney2.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

quagmire_sap_spoiled.en: Might as well toss it on the fire.

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: I still feel kind of bad for her.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 我还是有点为她感到难过。

slingshotammo_container.en: A good Pinetree Pioneer always packs extra ammo!
slingshotammo_container.trans: 合格的松树先锋队员总会随身携带额外的弹药！

wagboss_robot_secret.trans: 他把这秘密裹得严严实实！

chest_mimic_revealed.en: And I was right! It's a box monster, Woby!
chest_mimic_revealed.trans: 我是对的！这是一个盒子怪物，沃比！

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: Sniff out a good spot for us to plant the tree, Woby!
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 去闻闻哪里适合种树，沃比！

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: These will pack a real punch-a-roo!

chesspiece_depthworm.en: The carving somehow still feels slithery!
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 即便是雕刻看起来还是滑溜溜的！

moon_altar_ward.en: It's okay, we'll have you home in no time.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 不用担心，我们很快就能送你回家。

uncovered.en: Can you sniff out the missing piece Woby?
uncovered.trans: 你能嗅出缺失的那一块在哪吗，沃比？

ready.en: Huh? I think I hear something moving in there.
ready.trans: 哈？我听到里面有东西在动。

covered.en: One part of this statue looks older than the other.
covered.trans: 这座雕塑身上有的地方比其他部分老。

fish.en: I'm great at catching fish! I got a badge and everything!
fish.trans: 我很会抓鱼！我得过奖章！

dragonfruit_seeds.en: Let's find some place to plant these.
dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 我们找个地方种下它们。

generic.en: How did this clam get so big?
generic.trans: 这个蛤蜊怎么会这么大？

critter_lamb.en: Aww, you're like a dust bunny that came to life!

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Do you think they're going to get up again, Woby?
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 你觉得它们还能东山再起吗，沃比？

wormlight_plant.en: What's wrong Woby? It's just a plant!
wormlight_plant.trans: 怎么了，沃比？这只是一棵植物！

burning.en: Watch out, Wobes!
burning.trans: 小心，沃比！

generic.en: How to free the stone? What a burning question to axe!
generic.trans: 如何释放出岩石呢？这个问题会让斧头心痒痒的。

oceanwhirlportal.en: I don't think my water safety badge prepared me for that.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 我虽然有水上安全奖章，但是还是玩不了那个。

stalker_atrium.en: Maybe he knows something about the bug people that lived here!
stalker_atrium.trans: 也许他知道一些关于住在这里的虫族的事情！

oldlight.en: We should find a fresh one, Woby!
oldlight.trans: 我们应该去找个新鲜的，沃比！

generic.en: Careful with that, Woby.
generic.trans: 小心点，沃比。

empty.en: Woby, did you eat the flower?
empty.trans: 沃比，你吃了花吗？

ice.en: This will really give you the chills.

poweroff.en: It doesn't seem to work anymore.

generic.en: Any respectable ancient ruin should have some kind of traps.
generic.trans: 任何一个值得尊敬的古代遗迹都应该有一些陷阱。

figkabab.en: Aw, did it have to be figs?

shadow_battleaxe.en: Woby, I think it winked at me!
shadow_battleaxe.trans: 沃比，它好像对我眨了眨眼！

generic.en: There's something inside it!
generic.trans: 这里面有东西！

generic.en: Maybe I could teach it to play some songs I learned in the Pioneers.
generic.trans: 也许我可以教它些我在先锋队学过的歌曲。

generic.en: Is that hard on your ears, Woby?
generic.trans: 你的耳朵难受吗，沃比？

yotd_steeringwheel.en: I'll steer us straight to the finish line!
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 我来做舵手，笔直地航向终点线！

flotationcushion.en: We love water safety! Don't we, Wobes?
flotationcushion.trans: 我们最爱水上安全用品了！对吧沃比？

wobster_sheller.en: Shellfish are basically bugs of the sea.
wobster_sheller.trans: 贝类基本上是海里的虫子。

burning.en: This is why we should always practice fire safety!
burning.trans: 这就是为什么我们要时刻牢记消防安全！

chopped.en: This one's already been chopped down.

generic.en: That one definitely isn't in my handbook.
generic.trans: 那个绝对不在我的手册里。

burnt.en: I guess it could've been worse.
burnt.trans: 这还不算最糟吧。

slurtlehat.en: This should keep my brain safe. Never know when you'll see a zombie.
slurtlehat.trans: 这应该让我的大脑安全。永远不知道什么时候你会看到一个僵尸。

seeds.en: It's nice of the birds to share.
seeds.trans: 鸟儿们能分享真是太好了。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

broken.en: We have to fix it first, Woby girl!
broken.trans: 咱们得先修好它，沃比姑娘！

generic.en: Don't worry, Woby! I'll see you on the other side.
generic.trans: 别担心，沃比！我们会在另一边见面的。

picked.en: I don't think it's growing back.

generic.en: Are those mushrooms? I'm stumped.
generic.trans: 那些是蘑菇吗？这真是一桩难题。

imprisoned.en: We can't just leave him like that, Woby! We've gotta help him!
imprisoned.trans: 我们不能丢下他不管，沃比！我们一定要帮帮他！

generic.en: I thought he'd be a bit happier to be free...
generic.trans: 我本以为他自由以后会更快乐一点……

generic.en: It looks just like him!
generic.trans: 它看起来就像他！

empty.en: Sorry...
empty.trans: 抱歉……

deserthat.en: It's important to dress appropriately for the environment.
deserthat.trans: 根据环境适当地穿衣很重要。

feather_canary.trans: 看起来像金丝雀的羽毛。

valid.en: I think these gems might be important, Woby!
valid.trans: 这些宝石可能有重要作用，沃比！

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: I guess it's safer than having a campfire on the deck...
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 我想这比在甲板上生营火更安全……

armorgrass.en: Smells like a freshly mowed lawn.
armorgrass.trans: 闻起来像是刚刚割过的草坪。

off.en: There's got to be a way to turn it on.

on.en: Well, we got the lights working!
on.trans: 好了，我们让灯亮起来了！

gestalt_guard.en: Wow, they reeaally don't like those shadow creatures.
gestalt_guard.trans: 哇，它们真的很不喜欢那些影子生物。

dragonboat_kit.en: Stand back everyone, this looks like a job for a Pinetree Pioneer.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 其他人请后退，这项任务交给松树先锋队员来完成。

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: I always wanted a rocking horse!
yoth_chair_rocking_item.trans: 我一直想要一匹摇摇马！

firestarter.en: Not everything needs to have a Viking funeral, Ms. %s!
firestarter.trans: 不是所有的东西都需要有一个维京式葬礼，%s小姐！

ghost.en: Don't worry Ms. %s! Woby and I will get a heart for you in no time.
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s小姐！ 我和沃比很快就会为你找到一颗心脏。

murderer.en: Ms. %s went into a Viking rage!
murderer.trans: %s小姐开始了维京狂怒！

attacker.en: Ms. %s seems even more combative than usual...
attacker.trans: %s小姐好像比平时更加好战了……

reviver.en: Thanks Ms. %s! You're the only Viking I know, but also the best one!
reviver.trans: 多谢了，%s小姐! 你是我认识的唯一一个维京人，但也是最好的一个！

generic.en: Hey Ms. %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s小姐！

mast.trans: 这是船只的一个重要的组件。

match_but_snack.en: It's more of a light snack, really.

match.en: Science says this will appease the sky God.
match.trans: 科学说这样会安抚天空之神。

generic.en: I should offer it on the Altar of Gnaw.
generic.trans: 我应该把它献祭在饕餮祭坛上。

antliontrinket.en: Hm, I guess I could give it away as a gift?
antliontrinket.trans: 嗯，我可以把它当礼物送出去？

flower_cave.en: Pretty swell of those flowers to light the way for us!
flower_cave.trans: 漂亮的花儿为我们照亮了道路！

burnt.en: I'm so sorry about that!
burnt.trans: 我很抱歉！

generic.en: Wow, there's a whole bog monster civilization!
generic.trans: 哇，竟然有一整个沼泽怪兽的文明!

cooking_long.en: This might take a while. Wanna see this cool bug I found in the meantime?
cooking_long.trans: 这可能需要一段时间。想看看我在这期间发现的这个酷酷的虫子吗？

burnt.en: It's uh... extra done!
burnt.trans: 烤的有点过了！

empty.en: Sure wish there was food in it.
empty.trans: 真希望里面有食物。

costume_queen_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_queen_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

armordreadstone.en: It looks like an evil knight's armor. Neat!
armordreadstone.trans: 看上去像是邪恶骑士的盔甲。太帅了！

chesspiece_malbatross.en: She was pretty angry at us, wasn't she Woby?
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 她对我们很生气，不是吗，沃比？

onion_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
onion_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

burning.en: They uh... might need some water.
burning.trans: 它们呃... 可能需要一些水。

growing.en: I'll take good care of you, don't you worry.
growing.trans: 我会照顾好你的，别担心。

rotten.en: Whoops... I probably should've picked that sooner.
rotten.trans: 哎呀……我也许应该早点摘它的。

generic.en: That's one of our plants.
generic.trans: 是我们的植物。

full.en: I think it's ready to pick!
full.trans: 我想它已经可以采摘了!

playbill_the_doll.en: It's like a radio play you can watch!
playbill_the_doll.trans: 这就像一场可以看的广播剧！

ancientfruit_gem.en: Is this really a fruit? It's as hard as a rock!
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 这真是水果？它硬得像石头一样！

berries_juicy.en: Yes! These are the best kind!
berries_juicy.trans: 对！这就是最好的食用方式！

robot_puppet.en: Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer always helps those in need!
robot_puppet.trans: 别担心，松树先锋总能帮助到需要帮助的人！

generic.en: Did you get lost too?
generic.trans: 你也迷路了吗？

fishmeat_cooked.en: Catching your own fish and eating it, real survivor stuff!
fishmeat_cooked.trans: 自己抓鱼吃，真正的户外求生！

held.en: Now I'm all itchy, I hope you're happy.
held.trans: 现在我浑身痒痒的，这下你开心了吧。

generic.en: Tiny vampires of the insect world.
generic.trans: 昆虫世界的小吸血鬼。

burnt.en: What! Who burned the hive?
burnt.trans: 什么！是谁烧了蜂窝的？

generic.en: Oh bees, why can't we be friends...
generic.trans: 噢，蜜蜂啊，为什么我们不能做朋友……

nohoney.en: They need a bit more time.

spiderden_bedazzler.en: He's well on his way to getting his Arts and Crafts badge.
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 他很快就能获得手工艺奖章了。

wall_scrap_item.en: What a neat use of trash!
wall_scrap_item.trans: 这种利用垃圾的方式太棒了！

oceanfish_medium_9.en: Aww, it's got cute little ear fins!

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: Maybe this time it will be nice!
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 也许这次它会释出善意！

oceanfish_medium_8.en: Will it melt if I try to cook it?
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 如果我试着把它煮熟，它会不会融化？

oceanfish_medium_7.en: Don't you usually live in ponds?
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 你平时不是住在池塘里吗？

oceanfish_medium_6.en: Don't you usually live in ponds?
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 你平时不是住在池塘里吗？

glassspike.en: It looks like a giant tooth from a glass monster!
glassspike.trans: 它看起来就像玻璃怪兽的巨牙！

oceanfish_medium_5.en: Is it corn that mutated into a fish, or a fish that mutated into corn?
oceanfish_medium_5.trans: 是玉米变异成鱼，还是鱼变异成玉米？

oceanfish_medium_4.en: You're the unlucky fish who'll be my dinner.
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 你运气不好，会成为我的晚餐。

oceanfish_medium_3.en: None of these fish look anything like the ones in my handbook...
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 这些鱼看起来都不像我手册里的鱼……

oceanfish_medium_2.en: It's like it's staring into my soul...
oceanfish_medium_2.trans: 它好像在盯着我的灵魂……

oceanfish_medium_1.en: SEA MONST-- oh wait, it's just a really ugly fish.
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 大海怪——哎，原来只是一只长的很丑的鱼。

petrified_tree.en: What could've turned it to stone?

seedpouch.en: You can never have too many pockets!

blowdart_yellow.en: It's not as good as my slingshot, but it'll do the trick.
blowdart_yellow.trans: 虽然没有我的弹弓好，但是也有些作用。

lightflier.en: I think I have a new favourite kind of bug!
lightflier.trans: 我有了新的最喜爱的虫子了！

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: This garland will restore a bit of my vitality.

generic.en: Um, Ms. Wanda... do you make all these clocks out in the woods?
generic.trans: 呃，旺达女士……你是在树林里做的这些钟表吗？

generic.en: It looks like something should go here...
generic.trans: 看起来这里应该放个东西……

yotr_decor_1_item.en: I'll have it set up in a jiffy!

bedroll_furry.en: It feels nice, like cuddling up with Woby.
bedroll_furry.trans: 感觉很好，就像和沃比抱在一起一样。

rhinodrill.en: He's got a nose for this kind of work.
rhinodrill.trans: 他的鼻子很适合干这个活。

spiderden.en: Hey, that must be where the spiders live! It's huge!
spiderden.trans: 嘿，那一定是蜘蛛住的地方! 好大啊！

generic.en: Woah, I've never seen a magnet that big!
generic.trans: 哇，我从来没有见过这么大的磁铁！

activated.en: It's definitely pulling us toward something!
activated.trans: 它绝对是在拉我们走向某种东西！

farm_hoe.en: We'll need that to plant seeds.

rook_nightmare.en: Wow! It looks even more dangerous than the usual ones!
rook_nightmare.trans: 哇！看起来比那些普通的还要危险！

eggplant.en: Even in the wilderness you have to eat your vegetables.
eggplant.trans: 即使在野外也要多吃蔬菜。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: Is this one of those sculptures where the eyes follow you around the room?
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 这是那种眼睛会跟着你转的雕塑吗？

book_temperature.en: I hope it works on Woby, I worry about her in the summer with all that fur...
book_temperature.trans: 希望对沃比有用，她毛太多，夏天里不好受……

plant.en: What's wrong Woby? It's just a plant!
plant.trans: 怎么了，沃比？这只是一棵植物！

mooseegg.en: I can't wait for them to hatch!

carnivaldecor_plant.en: I'm going to take good care of it!

starving.en: Oh no! Did we forget to feed you?
starving.trans: 噢不！我们忘记喂你了吗？

dead.trans: 我是一名不合格的宠物主人……

generic.en: Now we just need to catch a bird!
generic.trans: 下一步只需要抓一只鸟！

occupied.en: Aw, you miss the trees don't you?
occupied.trans: 嗷，你一定很想念那些大树吧？

onion_oversized.en: I don't want to be the one who has to chop it.
onion_oversized.trans: 我可不想成为那个要砍它的人。

fish_box.trans: 那会让我们的鱼保持新鲜！

generic.en: (Sigh). All bees are killer bees when you're allergic.
generic.trans: (叹气)。过敏的时候，所有的蜜蜂都是杀人蜂。

bloom.en: Looks like this one's in bloom.

generic.en: The mushrooms sure grow big down here...
generic.trans: 这里的蘑菇长得可真大……

featherpencil.en: I feel like I should write something poetic with this...
featherpencil.trans: 我觉得我应该用这个写点诗意的东西……

moonrockidol.en: Usually these kind of things are locked in an ancient temple guarded by a monster.
moonrockidol.trans: 通常这种东西都是锁在一个由怪物把守的古庙里。

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

beast_blueprint.en: I wonder what kind of animal this costume is based off of?
beast_blueprint.trans: 不知道这件礼服是基于什么动物设计的？

generic.en: Neat, a tree fort!
generic.trans: 太好了，是个树堡垒！

burnt.en: Something tells me they never learned about fire safety.
burnt.trans: 直觉告诉我，他们从未学习过消防安全知识。

burning.en: Ah!! That's how forest fires start!
burning.trans: 啊！！森林火灾就是这么发生的！

lowpower.en: I think we need to hook up a another generator to this generator.
lowpower.trans: 我想我们需要在这台发电机上再接一台发电机。

overloaded.en: I think it's too hot, Woby.

off.en: It ran out of gem power.

burnt.en: Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.
burnt.trans: 好吧…… 我想薇诺娜得再建一个新的了。

generic.en: How does it work?
generic.trans: 它是如何工作的？

lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 它应该能保护我的安全。

book_sleep.en: My idea of a bedtime story has a lot more monsters in it...
book_sleep.trans: 我喜欢的睡前故事里面有很多怪物……

critter_bulbin.en: I didn't know vegetables could be monsters too!
critter_bulbin.trans: 谁曾想蔬菜也能变成怪物！

venting.en: It's blowing off steam! Get it, Woby?
venting.trans: 它在撒气！听懂了没，沃比？

generic.en: Careful Woby! It's gassy.
generic.trans: 当心沃比！它会放屁。

saddle_basic.en: Guess you need a saddle to ride some animals.
saddle_basic.trans: 我想你需要一个鞍具来骑一些动物。

recharging.trans: 它是在滴答滴答地倒着走吗？

generic.en: Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!
generic.trans: 旺达女士的钟表可真不少！

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

lunarplant_kit.en: I hope this goes toward my sewing badge.
lunarplant_kit.trans: 我希望能得到一个缝纫徽章。

shadowrift_portal.en: I wish I could get a better look inside...
shadowrift_portal.trans: 真希望可以去里面看看清楚……

monstertartare.en: Fancy and gross overlaps a lot.
monstertartare.trans: 高级和恶心的差别就在一念之间。

rubble.en: A bunch of really old rocks. I guess all rocks are old...
rubble.trans: 一堆非常古老的石头。不过所有的石头应该都是老的……

messagebottleempty.en: Maybe I'll use it for my bug collection, my pockets are getting full.
messagebottleempty.trans: 也许我该用它来收集虫子，我的口袋越来越满了。

held.en: Please don't nibble a hole in my pocket.
held.trans: 请不要在我的口袋里咬一个洞。

generic.en: Vegetables are much more interesting here than back home.
generic.trans: 这里的蔬菜比家乡的有趣多了。

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: Maybe I can get another gardening badge?
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 也许我还能赢得一枚园艺奖章？

malbatross_feather.en: I think we ruffled her feathers.
malbatross_feather.trans: 我们居然从她身上拔了根毛。

spat.en: I bet you're really a big softie!
spat.trans: 我敢打赌，你其实内心很柔软！

yoth_lance.en: It's joust perfect, Woby! Get it?
yoth_lance.trans: 这简直“就刺”完美，沃比！听懂没？

boatrace_start.en: So this is where we start the race.
boatrace_start.trans: 这就是我们开始比赛的地方。

blowdart_lava.en: That's a weapon I could use from range.
blowdart_lava.trans: 我可以在范围内用这个武器。

moose_nesting_ground.en: Looks like we found its nest.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 看来我们找到了它的巢穴。

wobster_moonglass.en: There's something different about their shell.

twiggy_nut_sapling.en: It'll grow up into a big tree someday.
twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 它总有一天会长成一棵大树。

bullkelp_root.en: I could plant this back in the ocean.

armor_yoth_knight.trans: 我这造型才英骏（俊）马（嘛）！

earmuffshat.en: Some of us don't have ear fluff of our own, Woby.
earmuffshat.trans: 我们人类没有自己的耳毛，沃比。

cookiecuttershell.trans: 这些家伙的盔甲很坚固！

moonspiderden.en: Look at that, Woby! It's a home for moon creatures!
moonspiderden.trans: 看那，沃比！这是月亮生物的家！

1.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
1.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

2.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
2.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

1.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
1.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

2.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
2.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

1.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
1.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

2.en: Your sister kind of creeps me out, but you're alright!
2.trans: 你的孪生姐妹有点吓到我了，但是你挺好的！

bananabush.en: Wait, I thought bananas grew on trees around here?
bananabush.trans: 等等，香蕉不是长在树上的吗？

shadowthrall_wings.en: Oooh, neat! That one can fly!

sleep.en: Woby, look! Winona made her own robot!
sleep.trans: 沃比，快看薇诺娜自己造了台机器人！

generic.en: Woby, look! Winona made her own robot!
generic.trans: 沃比，快看薇诺娜自己造了台机器人！

off.en: I think it's out of power.

sleeping.trans: 做一个甜蜜的、到处都是苍蝇的梦。

generic.en: That doesn't look like the frogs in my handbook...
generic.trans: 这看起来不像我手册里的青蛙……

generic.en: I've heard of houses like this, but I've never seen one!
generic.trans: 我听说过这样的房子，但我从来没有见过！

empty.en: An abandoned campsite... I wonder who was here?
empty.trans: 一个废弃的营地……我想知道是谁来过这里？

fireballstaff.en: It calls a meteor from above.

ruins_rubble.en: We can fix it up with some Pinetree Pioneer determination!
ruins_rubble.trans: 我们可以用松树先锋的决心来解决！

dug_bananabush.en: Wait, I thought bananas grew on trees around here?
dug_bananabush.trans: 等等，香蕉不是长在树上的吗？

treegrowthsolution.en: I'm glad we found a use for those figs other than eating them...
treegrowthsolution.trans: 我很高兴我们为这些无花果找到了除了吃以外的用途……

eyeturret_item.en: Come on Woby, let's find a good place to put this!
eyeturret_item.trans: 来吧，沃比，我们找个好地方放这个！

fence_rotator.en: Huh. I didn't know people used swords to fix their fences.
fence_rotator.trans: 呵。我居然不知道还有人用剑来修篱笆。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: Woby, we're going out with a BANG!

moqueca.en: Wow, having a real chef around when you're camping is great!
moqueca.trans: 哇，露营的时候有一个真正的厨师在身边真是太好了！

cave_entrance_ruins.en: There's probably tons of good stuff in there.
cave_entrance_ruins.trans: 里面可能有成吨的好东西。

multitool_axe_pickaxe.trans: 这是一种二合一的工具。

telestaff.en: But getting there is half the fun!
telestaff.trans: 但是赶路也是很有趣啊！

red_cap.trans: 那个看起来绝对是有毒的。

yotr_token.en: It's rude to hit people with gloves. You might start a fight!
yotr_token.trans: 用手套打人很粗鲁。你可能会挑起一场战斗!

kabobs.en: Food is always better when it's on a stick.
kabobs.trans: 有根棒棒连着，什么食物都会好吃很多。

molehat.en: These work way better than the X-ray goggles I mailed in for back home!
molehat.trans: 这比我在老家邮购的X光镜好用多了！

tentaclespike.en: A souvenir from the swamp creature.

fence_item.trans: 为什么要在大自然中设置围栏？

slurperpelt.trans: 有人知道懂的标本学吗？

marblepillar.en: Feels like I'm in a museum.
marblepillar.trans: 感觉就像我在博物馆里一样。

squid.en: I wonder if that's their full size, or if these are just babies...
squid.trans: 我不知道这是它们的全尺寸，还是这些只是婴儿……

flower_cave_withered.trans: 我想知道它为什么在凋零。

teleportato_potato.en: What is this supposed to be, exactly?

saltlick.en: Don't eat that Woby, it's for the beefalo!
saltlick.trans: 别吃那个沃比，那是给皮弗娄牛吃的!

pond.en: That'll make a swell swimming hole!
pond.trans: 那会是一个很好的游泳洞！

bombed.en: Nothing like a soak at the end of a long day!
bombed.trans: 什么都比不上在漫长的一天结束后泡个澡！

generic.en: This would make a great swimming hole! It's even heated!
generic.trans: 在这里游泳很不错！水还是热的！

empty.en: It's just a hole in the ground now.
empty.trans: 现在只剩个坑了。

dreadstone.en: It's just a rock, what's so scary about a rock?
dreadstone.trans: 只是一块石头，可怕在哪里了？

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: I wonder what kind of bog monster secrets they're hiding in there...
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 我想知道他们在里面藏了什么沼泽怪兽的秘密

generic.en: A shady spot for a quick nap.
generic.trans: 一个阴凉的地方，可以小憩一下。

burnt.en: What a waste of supplies...
burnt.trans: 真是浪费物资……

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: I didn't know you could make fabric out of feathers!
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 我没想到可以用羽毛做布料！

dumbbell_redgem.en: I don't think your muscles should be burning THAT much...
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 我觉得你好像不需要燃烧那么多肌肉...

eel.en: Look at the teeth it has!

devtool.en: Weird! It looks like an axe, but...
devtool.trans: 奇怪！看起来像斧头，但是……

diviningrodstart.en: Hey! This looks a lot like that radio!
diviningrodstart.trans: 嘿，这看起来很像那个收音机！

spider_water.en: Woah, look how fast they are on the water, Woby!
spider_water.trans: 哇，快看它们在水上移动有多快，沃比！

boat_bumper_crabking.en: Don't worry Woby, I'm really good at sailing. That's just a precaution!
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 别担心，沃比，我真的很擅长航海。这只是一个安全措施！

spider_healer_item.en: It's like a first aid kit for spiders!
spider_healer_item.trans: 它就像蜘蛛的急救箱一样！

ghost.en: Does this pose an interesting dilemma for you %s?
ghost.trans: 这下你是不是遇到两难了呢，%s？

firestarter.en: Well... I guess he IS an imp...
firestarter.trans: 好吧……毕竟它是一只恶魔……

murderer.en: Y-your prank went too far %s!
murderer.trans: 你的恶作剧过头了，%s！

attacker.en: Is this one of your pranks?
attacker.trans: 你这算是在恶作剧吗？

reviver.en: Hey, thanks for not eating my soul %s! Not that I was worried...
reviver.trans: 嘿，谢谢你没有吃我的灵魂，%s！我刚才真的捏了一把冷汗……

generic.en: Hi %s!
generic.trans: 你好%s！

dock_woodposts_item.en: Some posts will make the dock look even more... dock-y.
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 再弄些柱子，码头就看起来更……像个码头了。

firestarter.en: Doesn't anyone care about fire safety?
firestarter.trans: 难道没有人关心消防安全吗？

ghost.en: Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer doesn't leave anyone behind!
ghost.trans: 别担心，松树先锋队员不会丢人任何人!

murderer.en: You're a monster, and not the fun kind.
murderer.trans: 你怎么能这样做呢。

attacker.en: Your dark side is showing, Mr. %s.
attacker.trans: 你露出你的黑暗面了，%s先生。

reviver.en: I was kind of having fun being a ghost...
reviver.trans: 我变成鬼魂时也挺好玩的……

generic.en: Hey Mr. %s! Woby, stop growling at him!
generic.trans: 你好，%s先生！沃比，别冲他叫了！

purebrilliance.en: That's gotta be the shiniest rock I've ever seen.
purebrilliance.trans: 这是我见过最会发光的石头。

mask_treehat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

fishmeat_small_dried.en: A little jerky is better than none.
fishmeat_small_dried.trans: 有一点鱼干总比没有好。

compostwrap.en: Oh, uh... that's alright, I'm not hungry.

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

nonslipgritboosted.en: No licking it off the ground, Woby!
nonslipgritboosted.trans: 不许乱舔地上的东西，沃比！

quagmire_parkspike.en: The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".
quagmire_parkspike.trans: 它的学名应该是“锋利、尖锐的东西”。

inground.en: There's a mushroom hiding down there.

generic.en: Probably shouldn't pick that one.
generic.trans: 可能不应该选那个。

burning.en: I'm going to miss her.
burning.trans: 我会想她的。

generic.en: Poor Deerclops...
generic.trans: 可怜的独眼巨鹿……

junk_pile.en: One person's trash is another's treasure!

maxwellphonograph.en: It's like a radio, but not as good.
maxwellphonograph.trans: 它像收音机，又不如收音机。

decor_lamp.en: Turn it off when we tell ghost stories.
decor_lamp.trans: 讲鬼故事的时候把它关上。

carrot.en: I get kind of disappointed when it doesn't turn out to be a rat.
carrot.trans: 它居然不是老鼠，我多少有点失望。

retrieving_item.en: Please be a sea monster, please be a sea monster...

holding_item.en: Well... it's not a sea monster.

generic.en: This is how we'll catch a sea monster!
generic.trans: 我们就这样去抓海怪!

upgraded_stacksize.en: The more supplies we can keep safe from fire, the better!
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 要尽可能把物资保存在远离火源的地方。

generic.en: We'll have to find something worthy of going in there.
generic.trans: 希望能找到值得我们冒险的东西。

someone_else_won.en: We'll be back for a rematch, {winner}!
someone_else_won.trans: 我们还会回来再比赛的，{winner}！

generic.en: First one here wins!
generic.trans: 第一名将会胜出！

burnt.en: Someone sabotaged the race!
burnt.trans: 有人破坏了赛场！

unwritten.en: A blank sign... not very helpful.
unwritten.trans: 一个空白的牌子……不是很有用。

generic.en: Someone has bad handwriting.
generic.trans: 这字写的真难认。

burnt.en: Hopefully it didn't say anything important.
burnt.trans: 希望不是重要的标识物吧。

nitre_formation.en: Huh. Looks like a big clump of rocks.
nitre_formation.trans: 嗯，看起来像一大块石头。

poop.en: It's a natural part of nature!
poop.trans: 这也是大自然里很自然的一部分！

lightninggoathorn.en: The goat gave me a souvenir.
lightninggoathorn.trans: 山羊给了我一个纪念品。

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.en: The static makes Woby's fur all poofy.
mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.trans: 静电让沃比的毛发都变得蓬松起来。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: I'll have it set up in a jiffy!

book_fossil.en: This'll keep those monsters held for a little while.
book_fossil.trans: 这样能把那些怪物拖住一阵子。

beeswax_spray.en: It looks kind of like my mom's perfume, but it sure doesn't smell like it.
beeswax_spray.trans: 看起来像我妈的香水，但闻起来一点不像。

ready.en: Huh? I think I hear something moving in there.
ready.trans: 哈？我听到里面有东西在动。

garlic_cooked.en: Too bad vampires never get to enjoy it.
garlic_cooked.trans: 可惜吸血鬼从来没有机会享受它。

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: I can make more room for supplies!
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 我有更多的物资存储空间了！

chesspiece_pawn.en: Pawns don't seem like statue material.
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 卒子还有雕塑，有点奇怪。

wall_stone_item.en: This will make a swell wall for our camp.
wall_stone_item.trans: 用来砌我们营地的墙非常合适。

hawaiianshirt.en: This DEFINITELY wouldn't pass uniform inspection.
hawaiianshirt.trans: 这绝对不会通过校服检查。

complete.en: I think we figured it out Woby!
complete.trans: 我想我们弄明白了，沃比！

generic.en: It's still missing something.
generic.trans: 还是少了点什么。

funny.en: "The arm bone's connected to the..." which bone was it...
funny.trans: “臂骨连着……”到底是哪根骨头来着……

yotb_stage.trans: 我们来争夺奖项吧，沃比！

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: I think this one did all the work.

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

warglet.en: Look Woby, another dog for you to play with!
warglet.trans: 瞧，沃比，又有一条狗可以和你玩了！

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: Oh no, oh no no no no...

off.en: It's easy to spot! You see, because it has spots! Heh...
off.trans: 它很容易被发现！你看，因为它有斑点！呵……

burnt.en: Not mush we can do now.
burnt.trans: 有点无能为力。

on.en: My mom loves collecting odd lamps... I hope she's doing alright.
on.trans: 我妈妈很喜欢收集奇怪的灯…… 我希望她现在一切都好。

koalefant_summer.en: The trail led us right to it.

asparagus_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
asparagus_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

goldenpitchfork.en: Now I can be part of a FANCY angry mob.
goldenpitchfork.trans: 现在我可以成为任何暴民组织的成员了。

kitcoonden_kit.en: I built a bird house once, a cat house should be easy!
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 我搭过一次鸟窝，所以造猫屋应该很简单！

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

recharging.trans: 它是在滴答滴答地倒着走吗？

generic.en: Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!
generic.trans: 旺达女士的钟表可真不少！

generic.en: I thought bringing back the dead involved more levers and electricity.
generic.trans: 我还以为让死人复活需要更多的杠杆和电呢。

burnt.en: What a waste of supplies...
burnt.trans: 真是浪费物资……

alterguardianhatshard.en: I'm sure we can still find a use for it!
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 我相信我们总能找到它的用处！

smallghost.en: Maybe I should come back with someone who speaks ghost...
smallghost.trans: 也许我应该带一个会说鬼话的人回来……

builtup.en: A Pinetree Pioneer is always happy to help the elderly!
builtup.trans: 松树先锋队员尊老爱幼！

generic.en: This house could use some fixing up.
generic.trans: 这房子得好好修修了。

battlesong_fireresistance.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

generic.en: Woby doesn't seem to like it.
generic.trans: 沃比似乎不太喜欢。

mask_toadyhat.en: Should I try it on, Woby?
mask_toadyhat.trans: 我要不要带上试试呢，沃比？

quagmire_sapbucket.en: We can use it to gather sap from the trees.
quagmire_sapbucket.trans: 我们可以用它采集树液。

generic.en: I don't really get how it works, but it sure looks neat!
generic.trans: 我不太明白它是如何工作的，但它看起来很厉害！

activated.en: It's blinking! I think that means it's working?
activated.trans: 它在闪烁！应该是在工作吧？

shadowheart.en: Look at that! I wonder what's keeping it alive?
shadowheart.trans: 看那！我想知道是什么让它活着的？

sweettea.en: It makes my head feel a bit fuzzy... but I'm sure that's fine!
sweettea.trans: 它让我觉得头有点晕……但应该没事!

generic.en: It kind of looks like a mouth.
generic.trans: 它看起来有点像一张嘴。

open.en: It IS a mouth!! Come on Woby, let's get a closer look.
open.trans: 真的是一张嘴！！来吧，沃比，让我们仔细看看。

leafloaf.en: I guess it's one way to eat your vegetables.
leafloaf.trans: 我想这也是吃蔬菜的一种方式吧。

quagmire_altar_queen.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: This story could use a few more monsters.
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 这个故事再多几个的怪物就合理了。

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.en: We better be careful with this one, Woby!

pondfish.en: Sorry, but someone has to be dinner.
pondfish.trans: 对不起，但总得有人当晚餐。

wathgrithrhat.en: Maybe Pinetree Pioneers should start wearing helmets instead.
wathgrithrhat.trans: 也许松树先锋队员应该开始用头盔代替帽子了。

dragonbodyhat.en: I think I'd be better in the lead.
dragonbodyhat.trans: 我觉得我比较适合做龙头。

moon_altar_icon.en: Woby and I will get you back together!
moon_altar_icon.trans: 沃比和我会帮你复原的！

cursed_monkey_token.en: This is definitely going in my collection.

carrat_ghostracer.en: Where can I get a shadow carrat?
carrat_ghostracer.trans: 我去哪能捉到这种影子胡萝卜鼠？

stump.en: Is that a rock? No wait, it's a stump!
stump.trans: 那是石头吗？好像不是，是个树桩！

generic.en: Neat! I wonder how the tree keeps from catching fire?
generic.trans: 真不错！不知道这棵树是怎么不着火的？

mermwatchtower_noking.en: Wow, it's like a tree fort!

trap_teeth.en: We didn't make traps like these in the Pinetree Pioneers...
trap_teeth.trans: 我们在松树先锋队没有做过这样的陷阱……

quagmire_key_park.en: I'll park it in my pocket until I get to the park.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 在抵达公园之前，就把它“供“在我的口袋里吧。

wall_ruins_item.en: Want to give me a hand with these, Woby?

tourtiere.en: My cousin from the East Coast made these for us once, they're the best!
tourtiere.trans: 我东海岸的表亲给我做过这个，可好吃了！

held.en: Hope they get along with the other bugs in my pockets.
held.trans: 希望它们能和我口袋里的其他虫子相处。

generic.en: I wish I had a jar.
generic.trans: 我希望我有一只罐子。

boatrace_seastack_monkey.en: Buoy off the port side! Er, I mean starboard! I'll double check my handbook...
boatrace_seastack_monkey.trans: 左舷浮标！额，应该是右舷！等我查查手册……

blackflag.en: I should paint something friendly on it, so people know we're helpful pirates.
blackflag.trans: 我应该在上面画一些友好的东西，这样人们就知道我们是乐于助人的海盗。

dragonfruit_cooked.en: It makes sense that Dragon Fruit tastes better with fire.
dragonfruit_cooked.trans: 火烤过之后火龙果变好吃，非常合理。

alterguardian_contained.en: Wow, we sure are lucky he happened to have that with him!
alterguardian_contained.trans: 哇，我们真幸运他碰巧带着那个。

pirate_stash.en: That has to be where the treasure is!

gelblob_storage_kit.en: This might be messy to build.
gelblob_storage_kit.trans: 这建造起来可能会很脏乱。

vault_orb.en: That's not your ball, silly girl!

minotaurhorn.en: This is amazing! A real monster horn!
minotaurhorn.trans: 这真是太神奇了！真正的怪物角！

held.en: The bugs in my pocket might like some light.
held.trans: 我口袋里的虫子可能会喜欢光。

generic.en: Hope I don't accidentally swallow one.
generic.trans: 希望我不要不小心吞下一个。

burning.en: You're supposed to chop the tree first, THEN build the fire!
burning.trans: 你应该先砍树，然后再生火！

chopped.en: This tree looks stumped. Heh, nice one Walter.
chopped.trans: 这棵树成为树桩了。嘿，干得漂亮，沃尔特。

generic.en: They're called "evergreen" because... well you get the idea.
generic.trans: 之所以叫“常青树”是因为……哎呀你懂的。

burnt.en: That tree just couldn't wait to be a campfire...
burnt.trans: 那棵树只是迫不及待地想成为一堆篝火……

battlesong_container.en: It's like a special backpack for songs!
battlesong_container.trans: 它就像是一个专门装歌的背包！

tallbirdegg_cooked.en: That's just how nature goes sometimes.
tallbirdegg_cooked.trans: 大自然里有时就是这样的。

wagboss_robot_leg.en: How does it still have a leg to stand on? Right, Wobes?
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 它怎么还有一条腿能站着？对吧，沃比？

costume_blacksmith_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_blacksmith_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: That could cause some major destruction.
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 那家伙能造成巨大破坏。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: It's extra glowy isn't it, Woby?
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 它特别亮闪闪，不是吗，沃比？

walterhat.en: A Pinetree Pioneer should always wear appropriate headgear.
walterhat.trans: 松树先锋队员应该随时佩戴合适的帽子。

oceanfish_small_9.en: Hey! It's rude to spit at people!
oceanfish_small_9.trans: 喂！向别人吐口水是很不礼貌的！

playing.en: All that slingshot practice should come in handy!
playing.trans: 打弹弓的练习应该能派上用场！

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

battlesong_durability.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_durability.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

oceanfish_small_5.en: Careful the fins don't get stuck in your teeth.
oceanfish_small_5.trans: 小心鱼鳍不要卡在你的牙齿上。

dragonpie.en: Is it made from actual dragons?

oceanfish_small_8.en: Keep it away from anything flammable!

oceanfish_small_7.en: Hey little buddy! Get it, because it's got a bud on its head?
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 嘿，小伙伴！明白了吧，它的头上有一个花苞？

oceanfish_small_2.en: I caught it on purpose. For practice.
oceanfish_small_2.trans: 我是故意抓住它的。为了练习。

oceanfish_small_1.en: It's barely big enough to call a guppy.
oceanfish_small_1.trans: 勉强称得上是一条鱼苗。

oceanfish_small_4.en: You know, sometimes catching smaller fish is the real challenge.
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 你知道，有时候钓小鱼才是真正的挑战。

burning.en: I guess that makes it look a little scarier.
burning.trans: 我想这会让它看起来更可怕一些。

generic.en: Who'd be scared of that?
generic.trans: 谁会怕这个？

burnt.en: Not much use to us now.
burnt.trans: 现在对我们没什么用了。

oceanfish_small_3.en: I usually catch much bigger fish, you know.
oceanfish_small_3.trans: 我通常能钓到更大的鱼，你知道的。

cookedmeat.trans: 什么都比不上在户外烹饪！

firestarter.en: You're burning it, Mr. %s!
firestarter.trans: 你把它烧着了，%s先生！

ghost.en: Hang on Mr. %s! You'll be back to cooking fancy food in no time.
ghost.trans: 坚持住，%s先生！你马上就能回来继续烹调了。

murderer.en: How long have you been cooking up this murderous scheme, Mr. %s?
murderer.trans: 你酝酿这条杀人的毒计多久了，%s先生？

attacker.en: You seem kind of cranky Mr. %s, maybe you should eat something?
attacker.trans: 你看起来有些生气，%s先生，要不要吃点东西消消气？

reviver.en: Thanks Mr. %s! That really hit the spot.
reviver.trans: 多谢了，%s先生！非常有效。

generic.en: Hey Mr. %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s先生！

chesspiece_klaus.en: Aw, it reminds me of the holidays.

quagmire_trader_merm.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

held.en: I hope it doesn't eat the bugs in my pocket.
held.trans: 我希望它不要吃我口袋里的虫子。

generic.en: Hey, that one IS in my handbook!
generic.trans: 嘿，这个是在我的手册里的！

generic.en: Weird, this is the only thing that didn't turn back on.
generic.trans: 奇怪啊，就只有这个没重启。

record_efs.en: It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.
record_efs.trans: 虽然不是《午夜广播》，但也挺不错。

carrot_planted.en: Now we'll have more carrots. Yay.
carrot_planted.trans: 现在我们有更多的胡萝卜了。耶。

firestarter.en: It really doesn't take that long to build an actual campfire Ms. %s!
firestarter.trans: 做一堆合格的营火其实用不了多久，%s！

ghost.en: Don't worry Ms. %s, we'll have you back to your old self in a jiffy!
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s女士，我们马上让你回到从前的自己！

murderer.en: I knew it! She IS the killer!
murderer.trans: 我早就知道！她就是凶手！

attacker.en: Ms. %s is acting pretty suspiciously...
attacker.trans: %s女士行为可疑……

reviver.en: Thanks Ms. %s! I promise I'll be more careful.
reviver.trans: 多谢了，%s女士！我保证以后会更小心。

generic.en: Oh, sorry Ms. %s! I was just, uh... checking.
generic.trans: 哦，抱歉，%s女士！我只是想随便看看……

tentacle_pillar_arm.en: Are these all from the same creature?
tentacle_pillar_arm.trans: 这些都是来自同一种生物吗？

dead_sea_bones.en: These are definitely sea monster bones!
dead_sea_bones.trans: 这些绝对是海怪的骨头！

boat_bumper_kelp.en: Don't worry Woby, I'm really good at sailing. That's just a precaution!
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 别担心，沃比，我真的很擅长航海。这只是一个安全措施！

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

wagpunk_bits.en: Oooh, nice! Wonder what we can do with these.
wagpunk_bits.trans: 哦，不错！想知道我们能用这些做什么。

malbatross_beak.trans: 她给我们留下了一个纪念品。

merm_armory_upgraded.en: Aww, can't I just take a little peek inside?
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 噢，就不能让我看看里面有什么吗？

batnose_cooked.en: It sure doesn't smell so good now...

houndwhistle.en: Woby doesn't like the sound of it.

beefalotreat.en: Don't worry Woby, I'll get a treat for you too.
beefalotreat.trans: 别担心，沃比，我不会漏了你的零食的。

burning.en: Poor thing...
burning.trans: 可怜的家伙……

reviving.en: Phew, looks like they're okay after all!
reviving.trans: 呼，看来它们总算没事了！

generic.en: It's a hound, of corpse!
generic.trans: 这是一条尸体做成的猎犬！

uncommon.en: I'm adding it to my collection!

rare.en: Oooh, I got an extra rare one!
rare.trans: 哦，我得到了一个特别稀有的东西！

generic.en: Neat! I love collecting things!
generic.trans: 棒极了！我太爱收集东西了！

collapsedchest.en: It looks pretty messed-up... but I think I could fix it!
collapsedchest.trans: 看起來情况不妙……但我应该能修好它！

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: I'll have this set up right away!

alterguardianhat.en: It tells me all kinds of stories.
alterguardianhat.trans: 它跟我讲各式各样的故事。

burnt.en: This little piggy burnt down.
burnt.trans: 这只小猪烧掉了。

generic.en: What should we make, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该做什么，沃比？

empty.en: I think we're supposed to offer it meat.
empty.trans: 我想我们应该给它肉。

winter_ornament.trans: 小心点，沃比，它们很易碎。

pepper_oversized.en: Fire! Oh wait, it's just a hot pepper.
pepper_oversized.trans: 着火了！哦，等等，这只是一个很辣的辣椒。

cookiecutter.en: They're smiling! Wait, I think I was looking at them upside-down.
cookiecutter.trans: 它们在笑！等等，我想我是倒着看他们的。

wasphive.en: E-everyone stay calm... we'll be on our way...
wasphive.trans: 所有人保持冷静……我们马上撤退……

batcave.en: Looks like they're sleeping. Should we wake them up?
batcave.trans: 它们好像在睡觉。我们要叫醒它们吗？

butterflymuffin.en: I feel kind of bad about the butterfly.

balatro_machine.en: Woby, let's take paws and play a few hands. Oh, Walter!
balatro_machine.trans: 沃比，爪子收一收，咱们来打几手牌吧。哎呀，沃尔特！

saddle_war.en: It's almost as comfy as sitting in Woby's fur.
saddle_war.trans: 就像坐在沃比身上一样舒服。

perogies.en: The perfect size to pop in your mouth!

spidergland.en: This would be a good addition to my first aid kit.
spidergland.trans: 这将是我急救箱的一个很好的补充。

dumbbell_gem.en: Time to hit the gem! Get it? Because gem sounds like gym?
dumbbell_gem.trans: 开始宝贵的健身吧！听明白没？因为上面有宝石？

wagpunk_workstation.en: Check it out, Woby! What can we make here?
wagpunk_workstation.trans: 去看看，沃比！我们能在这儿做点什么呢？

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

yotd_anchor_item.en: I've got all the supplies ready to build an anchor.
yotd_anchor_item.trans: 造锚的所有原料我都准备好了。

tree_rock_sapling.en: It's going to grow up big and strong!

record_dawn.en: It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.
record_dawn.trans: 虽然不是《午夜广播》，但也挺不错。

stump.trans: 哎，我本来还挺喜欢那棵树的……

generic.en: It looks kind of like a monster... but I think it's just a tree.
generic.trans: 看起来像个怪兽……但依我看就是颗树。

ghost.en: Oh, it's... kind of hard to tell you two apart.
ghost.trans: 噢，你俩有点难以分辨。

firestarter.en: Fire safety isn't that hard!!
firestarter.trans: 消防安全并不难！

murderer.en: You... how could you do that?
murderer.trans: 你……你怎么能这样？

attacker.en: You can't scare me... okay, maybe a little.
attacker.trans: 你吓不到我…… 好吧，也许有一点。

reviver.en: Being a ghost isn't so bad, I can see why Abigail likes it!
reviver.trans: 做鬼也不错，我总算知道阿比盖尔为什么喜欢做鬼了！

generic.en: Hey %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s！

slingshotammo_marble.en: I wish they weren't so hard to find!
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 真希望它们不是这么难找！

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: You smell anything in there, Woby?

shell_cluster.en: Let's break it apart and see what's inside.
shell_cluster.trans: 让我们把它拆开，看看里面有什么。

asparagus_oversized.en: Oh... that's a lot of asparagus...

mandrake_planted.en: Hey, what's that hiding down there?

rat.en: Hustle, hustle! Coaches say that, right?
rat.trans: 快点，快点！教练都这么说，对吧？

burnt.en: Does that look like a fire pit?!
burnt.trans: 那个看起来像不像营火？

generic.en: I've never been a coach before!
generic.trans: 我从来没有当过教练！

cookbook.en: Looks like I've got a new guide to memorize!
cookbook.trans: 这个新菜谱要背起来了！

potato.trans: 我们要不要把它们捣碎？

redgem.en: I think this gem might be magic.
redgem.trans: 我觉得这块宝石可能有魔法。

lots.en: The mushrooms must love it there!
lots.trans: 蘑菇们一定很喜欢那里！

some.en: There's a few mushrooms now, but there'll probably be more soon.
some.trans: 现在有一些蘑菇，但可能很快就会有更多的蘑菇。

snowcovered.en: My handbook says mushrooms need warmer weather to grow.
snowcovered.trans: 我的手册上说，蘑菇需要更温暖的天气才能生长。

stuffed.en: Mushrooms are kind of creepy when you think about them.
stuffed.trans: 蘑菇想起来都有点毛骨悚然。

rotten.en: Not much left of this log for the mushrooms to feed on.
rotten.trans: 这根木头没剩多少能供养蘑菇了。

burnt.en: That wasn't firewood!
burnt.trans: 那不是柴火！

empty.en: It needs something to get started.
empty.trans: 它需要一些东西来启动。

mermguard_shadow.en: Neat! It's a bog monster and shadow monster at the same time!
mermguard_shadow.trans: 真不错！沼泽怪兽和暗影怪兽二合一！

slingshotammo_freeze.en: Almost as chilling as my favourite radio shows!
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 几乎和我最喜欢的广播节目一样让人全身发凉！

slingshotammo_poop.en: Gross... but a distraction is a distraction.
slingshotammo_poop.trans: 恶心……但要的就是这种扰敌的效果。

burning.en: This isn't a fun campfire...
burning.trans: 这不是一个有趣的篝火……

generic.en: I'm sorry...
generic.trans: 抱歉……

shark.en: Just look at the size of those teeth!
shark.trans: 瞧那些牙齿多么的大啊！

tophat.en: Seems a bit out of place out here in the wilderness.
tophat.trans: 在这荒郊野外，似乎有点格格不入。

wagstaff_npc.en: Hey Mister, are you okay? You're uh... flickering...?
wagstaff_npc.trans: 先生，你还好吗？你身上怎么闪火花……？

armor_bramble.en: No hugging while you're wearing that.
armor_bramble.trans: 穿着这个的时候不能拥抱。

boat_ancient_item.en: Is this really how they used to build boats in the olden days?
boat_ancient_item.trans: 古时候真的是这样造船的吗？

dumbbell_marble.en: Oh... when he said it was made of marble, I kind of hoped he meant the tiny ones.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 喔……他当时说是大理石的时候，我还有点希望是小的弹珠呢。

minerhat.en: Being able to see makes exploring a lot easier.
minerhat.trans: 能够看到，探索起来就容易多了。

anchor.trans: 这是船的必备组件之一。

book_elemental.en: I can't make out the text.

latkes.en: I've never tried potatoes cooked like this before.
latkes.trans: 我还没吃过做成这样的土豆。

generic.en: Ready for a journey into the unknown Woby?
generic.trans: 准备好进入未知的沃比之旅了吗？

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: It's so lifelike, I feel like they're staring right at me!
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 太逼真了，我感觉它们在直勾勾盯着我看！

eyeplant.trans: 我左眼打赌它一定很友好！

fish_cooked.en: Catching and cooking your own fish is what camping is all about!
fish_cooked.trans: 自己抓鱼，自己做饭，这才是露营的意义所在！

boatfragment03.en: Looks like a sea monster got them.
boatfragment03.trans: 看起来有人遭遇了海怪的袭击。

goggleshat.trans: 我觉得自己已经更有冒险精神了！

coontail.en: It's a tall tail! Or, I guess more of a bushy one... never mind.
coontail.trans: 这是一条高高的尾巴！或者说是一条毛茸茸的尾巴……算了。

boatfragment05.en: Looks like a sea monster got them.
boatfragment05.trans: 看起来有人遭遇了海怪的袭击。

boatfragment04.en: Looks like a sea monster got them.
boatfragment04.trans: 看起来有人遭遇了海怪的袭击。

growing.en: It looks bigger than it did yesterday...
growing.trans: 它看起来比昨天更大了……

generic.en: I shouldn't walk on that, I'll get my shoes sticky.
generic.trans: 我不应该在上面走，我会把鞋子粘住的。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: It's important to have the proper equipment in a storm.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 风暴中一定要携带正确的装备。

stalker_minion.en: I wonder if I can catch one!
stalker_minion.trans: 不知道能不能抓住一个！

ruins_bat.en: I was never great at baseball... but maybe I would be with a bat like this!
ruins_bat.trans: 我从来都不擅长打棒球……但也许我可以用到这样的球棒！

bird_egg.trans: 危在旦夕！听明白吗？因为有蛋……？

moonstorm_static_item.en: You'll be shocked to see what's inside! Get it? Because there's static inside?
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 里面的东西一定能让你像过电一样！听明白没？因为里面有静电？

generic.en: Woah, how did they get like that? I need to get a closer look!
generic.trans: 哇，他们怎么会变成这样？我得仔细看看！

sleeping.en: I could probably get close while they're sleeping.
sleeping.trans: 我也许可以在他们睡觉的时候接近他们。

held.en: Please don't nibble a hole in my pocket.
held.trans: 请不要在我的口袋里咬一个洞。

generic.en: Vegetables are much more interesting here than back home.
generic.trans: 这里的蔬菜比家乡的有趣多了。

lore2.en: Something real bad happened to them.
lore2.trans: 他们遭遇了非常糟糕的事情。

lore1.en: Poor fella doesn't look well, eh Woby?
lore1.trans: 可怜的家伙看起来不太好，对吧，沃比？

anchor_item.en: I've got all the supplies ready to build an anchor.
anchor_item.trans: 造锚的所有原料我都准备好了。

rock_moon.en: I wonder how it affects were-people. I should ask Mr. Woodie.
rock_moon.trans: 我想知道这对会变身的人有什么影响。我应该问伍迪先生。

yellowgem.en: Is it supposed to feel warm?
yellowgem.trans: 是不是应该感觉到温暖？

charlie_lecturn.en: I wonder who'll be playing the characters?

male_puppet.en: Don't worry, a Pinetree Pioneer always helps those in need!
male_puppet.trans: 别担心，松树先锋总能帮助到需要帮助的人！

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: For harvesting salt from the pond.

miniflare.en: It's a signal, only to be used in an emergency.
miniflare.trans: 这是一个信号发射器，只能在紧急情况下使用。

cave_fern_withered.en: These weird plants don't do well down here.
cave_fern_withered.trans: 这些奇怪的植物在这里长不好。

berries_cooked.en: Well, now I have hot berries.
berries_cooked.trans: 哈，现在我有热的浆果了。

basalt.en: I don't think we'll be able to break through that.

spiderqueen.en: I've never heard of spiders having a queen, that's so interesting!
spiderqueen.trans: 我从来没有听说过蜘蛛有女王，真是太有趣了！

tacklestation.en: Not to brag, but I do have my fishing badge.
tacklestation.trans: 不是吹牛，但我确实得过钓鱼奖章。

growing.en: I wish plants could grow as fast as you do Woby.
growing.trans: 我希望植物能跟你长得一样快，沃比。

generic.en: Guessing what it's going to be is half the fun.
generic.trans: 猜测会长什么就是一半的乐趣。

hammer_mjolnir.en: It's a heavy hammer for hitting things.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 这把敲东西的锤子可真重。

quagmire_turnip_cooked.trans: 做饭就是将科学付诸实践。

inert.en: Who built this giant sand castle in the middle of the ocean?
inert.trans: 是谁在大海中建造了这座巨大的沙堡？

generic.en: YES!! Now that's a proper sea monster!
generic.trans: 是的！这才是真正的海怪！

raincoat.en: Gotta be prepared for the elements!
raincoat.trans: 一定要做好准备，以防万一！

hungry.en: Hungry? I'll see what I have.
hungry.trans: 饿不饿？我看看我有什么。

starving.en: They're just grouchy because they're hungry.
starving.trans: 它只是因为饿了而发牢骚。

generic.en: Nobody understands us, do they?
generic.trans: 没有人理解我们，对吧？

greenmooneye.en: They never taught us how to use these in the Pinetree Pioneers.
greenmooneye.trans: 松树先锋队没有教过我们如何使用它。

green_cap_cooked.en: It's probably safe now that it's cooked, right?
green_cap_cooked.trans: 现在熟了，大概就安全了吧？

held.en: The bugs in my pocket might like some light.
held.trans: 我口袋里的虫子可能会喜欢光。

generic.en: Swamp gas! Oh, it's just some more spores.
generic.trans: 是沼气！噢，原来只是些孢子而已。

hiding.en: Woby, what's wrong? It's just a table.
hiding.trans: 沃比，怎么了？只是一张桌子而已。

awake.en: Maybe it wants to roast marshmallows too?

robot_blueprint.trans: 这真的是用来缝纫的吗？

halloweencandy_7.en: I don't know what some people's problem is, raisins are good!
halloweencandy_7.trans: 我不知道为什么有人不喜欢葡萄干，明明很好吃啊！

halloweencandy_8.en: Maybe I'll give it to the twins.
halloweencandy_8.trans: 也许我会把它给那对双胞胎。

mask_dollhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

koalefant_winter.en: So you're the one who left those tracks!

gingerbreadwarg.en: Who's a sweet Varg? Yes you are!
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 谁是甜甜的座狼？对，就是你！

halloweencandy_1.en: Even candy's better when it's on a stick.
halloweencandy_1.trans: 有根棒棒连着，糖果就会好吃很多。

recharging.trans: 它是在滴答滴答地倒着走吗？

generic.en: Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!
generic.trans: 旺达女士的钟表可真不少！

generic.en: What should we put in there, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该往里面放什么，沃比？

halloweencandy_3.en: Not very spooky, but it is tasty.
halloweencandy_3.trans: 虽然不是很吓人，但很好吃。

starving.en: This little guy needs some food!
starving.trans: 这个小家伙需要一些食物！

generic.en: You're the best grub in the whole wide world!
generic.trans: 你是全世界最棒的小虫子！

halloweencandy_4.en: Maybe that spider kid would like this. Or maybe not...
halloweencandy_4.trans: 也许那个蜘蛛小朋友会喜欢这个。也可能不喜欢……

blueamulet.en: Brr... how does it stay so cold?

cookiecutterhat.en: It's a shellmet! Because it's a helmet, but a shell-- you get it.
cookiecutterhat.trans: 这是一个贝壳盔！因为它是贝壳做的头盔——你明白了吧。

halloweenpotion_bravery.trans: 原来这就是所谓的“液体勇气”！

bananapop.en: Those are for little kids. But bananas are healthy so I guess it's alright.
bananapop.trans: 那是给小孩子吃的。但香蕉是健康食品，所以应该还好。

lightcrab.en: What kind of crab is that?

bootleg.en: Sorry Woby, that bone isn't for you.
bootleg.trans: 沃比抱歉，那根骨头不是给你吃的。

deer_gemmed.en: It can't be comfortable having a gem stuck in your forehead.
deer_gemmed.trans: 额头上插着一颗宝石，可真不舒服。

icepack.en: Now my snacks won't get stale!
icepack.trans: 现在我的零食不会变质了！

moon_fissure_plugged.en: She trapped all the moon ghosts in their holes.
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 她把所有的月鬼都困在了洞里。

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: It must be some kind of swamp witchcraft!
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 一看就是某种沼泽巫术！

upgraded_stacksize.en: Just look at how many important survival supplies it can hold!
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 瞧它能储存多少生存物资！

generic.en: It isn't a toy chest, it's a very grownup SUPPLY chest.
generic.trans: 这不是一个玩具箱，这是一个大人用的补给箱。

burnt.en: My stuff!!
burnt.trans: 我的东西！！

grass_umbrella.en: Flowers actually have lots of practical uses.
grass_umbrella.trans: 花其实有很多实际用途。

boat_ancient_container.en: This should keep our supplies safe, Woby.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 有了这个，我们的补给品就安全了，沃比。

sleep.en: You never know what's out there, lurking in the dark.
sleep.trans: 你永远不知道外面有什么潜伏在黑暗中。

burning.en: Ah!! That's how forest fires start!
burning.trans: 啊！！森林火灾就是这么发生的！

generic.en: You never know what's out there, lurking in the dark.
generic.trans: 你永远不知道外面有什么潜伏在黑暗中。

burnt.en: Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.
burnt.trans: 好吧…… 我想薇诺娜得再建一个新的了。

gestalt.en: Are you a ghost... from the moon?

lunarplant_husk.en: If you kill a ghost plant, do you get... a double ghost?
lunarplant_husk.trans: 杀死一只幽灵植物，能得到……一对幽灵吗？

critter_lunarmothling.en: Mom would never let me keep a pet bug this big!
critter_lunarmothling.trans: 妈妈绝对不会让我养这么大的宠物虫!

yotb_stage_item.en: It can't be that much harder than pitching a tent.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 应该不会比搭帐篷难很多。

phonograph.en: It's almost as good as a radio. Almost.
phonograph.trans: 几乎就和收音机一样好了。几乎，

halloween_ornament_2.en: This is my favourite time of year.
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 这是我一年之中最喜欢的日子。

halloween_ornament_3.en: It's pretty good, I thought it was a real spider!
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 挺好的，我还以为是真的蜘蛛呢！

rat.en: You'll never be a Pinetree Pioneer if you can't follow directions!
rat.trans: 如果不会听从指令就不能成为一名合格的松树先锋队员！

generic.en: A good sense of direction is important for survival!
generic.trans: 良好的方向感对生存很重要！

burnt.en: Hey! I was going to use that!
burnt.trans: 嘿！我正打算用那个呢！

lunarthrall_plant.en: Woby, I think that plant's haunted!
lunarthrall_plant.trans: 沃比，我觉得那颗植物在闹鬼！

halloween_ornament_5.en: Weird how the spiders around here only have six legs.
halloween_ornament_5.trans: 奇怪的是这里的蜘蛛怎么只有六条腿。

halloween_ornament_6.en: This decoration needs a tree to perch in.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 这个装饰需要放在一棵树上。

costume_princess_body.en: Someone ponied up for this outfit.

burnt.en: Now nobody can use it.
burnt.trans: 现在没有人可以使用它了。

generic.en: This gobbler likes gold.
generic.trans: 这只火鸡喜欢金子。

empty.en: It looks like something should go there.
empty.trans: 看起来应该有东西放在那里。

webber_spider_minion.en: I guess they're fighting for us.
webber_spider_minion.trans: 可以说他们是在为我们战斗吧。

nightmaregrowth.en: We should probably stay away from those, Woby.
nightmaregrowth.trans: 我们应该离它们远一些，沃比。

cutreeds.en: Ms. Wickerbottom might need some more... reed-ing material.
cutreeds.trans: 薇克巴顿女士应该用得上这些芦苇。

pinecone_sapling.en: One day you'll be a nice big tree.
pinecone_sapling.trans: 总有一天你会成为一棵漂亮的大树。

ancient_statue.en: Woah! Is this what they looked like?
ancient_statue.trans: 哇！他们以前就是长这个样子吗？

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: Do you think we should put it over there, Woby?
yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 你觉得我们应该把它放在那边吗，沃比？

rat.en: These reflexes could save your life in the wilderness!
rat.trans: 这些反应能力可以在野外救你一命！

burnt.en: I... reacted too slow... to put the fire out...
burnt.trans: 我……反应太慢……没能及时灭火……

generic.en: By the time we're done, my carrat will be ready for anything!
generic.trans: 等完成后，我的胡萝卜鼠就可以胜任一切了！

book_moon.en: Aww, it doesn't even mention aliens!

shadowdigger.en: I wish my shadow could help me with my chores.
shadowdigger.trans: 我希望我的影子也能帮我做家务。

dug.trans: 好吧，我的好奇心得到了满足。

generic.en: I wonder if I'll find a skeleton down there...
generic.trans: 我不知道会不会在下面找到一具骷髅……

goatmilk.en: I don't think milk is supposed to crackle...
goatmilk.trans: 牛奶不应该发出噼啪声……

lunarplanthat.en: That's definitely the helmet of some kind of ghost knight!
lunarplanthat.trans: 那一定是幽灵骑士的头盔了！

stuffedeggplant.en: A vegetable stuffed with more vegetable.
stuffedeggplant.trans: 蔬菜里塞进了更多的蔬菜。

turfcraftingstation.en: I think we might be tampering with something we don't understand.
turfcraftingstation.trans: 这个东西我们不是很理解。

active.en: Come on Woby, we've got some exploring to do!
active.trans: 来吧，沃比，我们还要去探险呢！

partial.en: I think I've almost got it, Woby!
partial.trans: 我想我差不多明白了，沃比！

generic.en: That definitely looks like a magical... something.
generic.trans: 这绝对看起来像一个神奇的……东西。

chesspiece_toadstool.en: At least this version doesn't smell like old mushrooms.
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 至少这个版本没有老蘑菇的臭味。

houndbone.en: You probably shouldn't chew on those, Woby.

spice_sugar.en: Too much will make you sick.

hivehat.en: I guess I'm the bee king now!

sleeping.en: He must be tired from doing... whatever he does all day.
sleeping.trans: 他一定是累了，因为他做了一整天的事情。

generic.en: Don't be jealous Woby, you'll always be my best friend.
generic.trans: 别嫉妒，沃比，你永远是我最好的朋友。

thurible.trans: 哦，那是一个强烈的气味。

greenamulet.en: Great for when you're low on supplies!
greenamulet.trans: 适合在你缺少补给品时使用！

otter.en: Watch out, Woby. I think it wants our stuff.
otter.trans: 注意了，沃比。我觉得它想拿我们的东西。

shadow_forge.en: It's really handy! Get it? Because it has hands?
shadow_forge.trans: 它可真趁手！听明白吗？因为它有手？

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: They're pretty cute, but not as cute as you Woby.
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 它们虽然可爱，但还是比不上你，沃比。

record_balatro.en: That's right, Woby! It's a real doozy!
record_balatro.trans: 没错，沃比！这真是棒极了！

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: I can put a meal together in a pinch.
quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.trans: 在紧要关头，我可以做出一顿美餐。

ancient_husk.en: It makes me feel bad too, Woby.

portabletent_item.en: I'll have this set up lickety-split!
portabletent_item.trans: 我马上就会把这一切安排好！

dug_berrybush.en: Come on berry bush, we're going on an adventure!
dug_berrybush.trans: 来吧，浆果丛，我们要去冒险了！

moonglass_rock.en: I've never seen a rock like this before.
moonglass_rock.trans: 我从来没有见过这样的石头。

humanmeat_dried.en: Letting it dry makes it not come from a human, right?
humanmeat_dried.trans: 风干了就不是人肉了，对吧？

scraphat.en: That werepig was so big, I can wear his shoulder pad as a hat!
scraphat.trans: 好一头巨大的疯猪，它的垫肩我都可以当帽子戴！

unwritten.en: Well... I guess SOMETHING is in that direction.
unwritten.trans: 好吧……我猜那边有个什么东西。

generic.en: Someone has bad handwriting.
generic.trans: 这字写的真难认。

burnt.en: Hopefully it didn't say anything important.
burnt.trans: 希望不是重要的标识物吧。

firestarter.en: Nobody here knows how to build a proper campfire.
firestarter.trans: 这里没有人会正确的生营火。

ghost.en: What's it like being a ghost, Mr. %s? Oh, right, I'll get you a heart.
ghost.trans: 做鬼魂是什么感觉，%s先生？好的，我这就给你找一颗心。

murderer.en: Is it true, Mr. %s? Are you a scientist gone mad?
murderer.trans: 是真的吗，%s先生？你真的是发了疯的科学家吗？

attacker.en: I thought he seemed alright... maybe I was wrong.
attacker.trans: 我还他看起来是个好人…… 也许我错了。

reviver.en: Thanks Mr. %s! Did you take good care of Woby?
reviver.trans: 多谢了，%s！你有没有照顾好沃比？

generic.en: Hey Mr. %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s先生！

quagmire_goatmilk.en: Good if you don't think about where it came from.
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 挺好的，只要你别去想它的来源。

remains_thingie.en: Now I'll never know what it was...
remains_thingie.trans: 这下我永远都不会知道它是什么了……

generic.en: Did someone have a campfire without me?
generic.trans: 有人不带我自己生了堆营火吗？

burnt.en: We should really be more careful with our resources.
burnt.trans: 我们真的应该更谨慎地使用我们的资源。

generic.en: We're going to need a better boat.
generic.trans: 我们需要一艘更好的船。

leafymeatsouffle.en: I don't think we needed to get that fancy with it...
leafymeatsouffle.trans: 我觉得我们没必要搞得那么花哨……

firepen.en: I had no idea writing was so dangerous.
firepen.trans: 我没想到写作会这么危险。

moon_altar_seed.en: We have to help it, Woby!

stuffing.en: I could stuff a bit more in my mouth.

burning.en: Ah!! That's how forest fires start!
burning.trans: 啊！！森林火灾就是这么发生的！

burnt.en: Well... I guess Winona'll have to build a new one.
burnt.trans: 好吧…… 我想薇诺娜得再建一个新的了。

generic.en: We can bring all sorts of stuff back to camp!
generic.trans: 我们可以把各种东西都带回营地了！

pomegranate_cooked.en: I thought it would taste better.

beardhair.en: Aw, I thought it was yeti fur...
beardhair.trans: 嗷，我还以为是雪人的毛皮呢……

seastack.trans: 左舷船头掉下来的石头！

pomegranate_seeds.en: Where's a good spot to plant this?

cookedmonstermeat.en: Is it supposed to have that weird aftertaste?
cookedmonstermeat.trans: 有那种奇怪的后味正常吗？

type3.en: That one's just asking for birds to land on it.
type3.trans: 这个就是要让鸟儿落在上面。

type1.en: It looks like something from a museum.
type1.trans: 它看起来像博物馆里的东西。

generic.en: I wonder who made these?
generic.trans: 不知道这是谁做的？

potatosouffle.en: This is really good, Mr. Warly!
potatosouffle.trans: 这个简直太好吃了，沃利先生！

eyeofterror_mini.en: Would you say they're... multipl-eying? Heh. Good one, Walter.
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 你说他们是不是能眼观六路？啊哈哈，说得好，沃尔特。

held.en: I got it! Guys, I actually got it!!
held.trans: 我抓到了！伙计们，我真的抓到它了！！

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: I think they're trying to keep us from getting away!
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 我觉得它们不想让我们走！

critter_glomling.en: It's small for a monster, but big for a bug.
critter_glomling.trans: 对怪物来说是小，但对虫子来说是大。

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

saltbox.en: Salt is great for preserving your supplies.
saltbox.trans: 盐是保存食物的好东西。

tentacle.en: I want to see the creature it's attached to!
tentacle.trans: 我想看看它是什么生物的触手！

has_item.en: Woby, no paws on the table!

burnt.en: Someone forgot their fire saftey!
burnt.trans: 有人忘记了消防须知！

generic.en: Woby, no paws on the table!
generic.trans: 沃比，爪子不能上桌！

icecream.en: Don't eat too much or you'll get a stomach ache.
icecream.trans: 不要吃得太多，否则会胃痛。

walkingplank.en: Oh, I'm good at diving! I got a badge for it!
walkingplank.trans: 哦，我擅长跳水！我有一个跳水奖章！

fishtacos.trans: 鱼肉中的棉花糖夹心饼！

merm_tool_upgraded.en: It must be really hard to make things when you have claws for hands.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 没有双手，只有爪子的话制作东西一定非常困难。

treasurechest_trap.en: There might be cursed pirate gold inside!
treasurechest_trap.trans: 里面可能有被诅咒的海盗金条！

held.en: A pocket isn't really the best place for a bird.
held.trans: 口袋并不是养鸟的最佳场所。

generic.en: Finally, something I recognize from my bird guide!
generic.trans: 终于找到了一只鸟类指南里有的鸟！

cane.en: Nothing like a good walking stick! Just don't chew on it this time, Woby.
cane.trans: 什么都比不上一根好拐杖！这次别再啃它了，沃比。

burning.en: That's not a campfire...
burning.trans: 这不是营火……

diseased.en: Uh, something's definitely wrong with it.

withered.en: I guess this isn't the season for berries.
withered.trans: 我猜还不到浆果的季节。

generic.en: They look so tasty...
generic.trans: 看起来真好吃……

barren.en: It won't be making more berries anytime soon.
barren.trans: 一段时期以内都不会再长出浆果了。

sleepbomb.en: It's more humane than a stink bomb.
sleepbomb.trans: 这比臭气弹更有人情味。

carnival_ball.en: Get the ball Woby! Uh... I guess we'll work on that later.
carnival_ball.trans: 去捡球，沃比！呃……咱们以后再练那个吧。

wormlight_lesser.trans: 更像一个发光的葡萄干……

generic.en: We're saved, Woby!
generic.trans: 我们得救了，沃比！

empty.en: An invisible lake?
empty.trans: 一个看不见的湖？

pepper_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
pepper_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

voidclothhat.en: Woby doesn't like it when I wear that.

bird_mutant.en: Woah! That doesn't look like any of the birds in my handbook!
bird_mutant.trans: 哇！那个看起来不像我手册里的任何一种鸟！

opalstaff.en: No Woby, this stick isn't for fetching!
opalstaff.trans: 不，沃比，这根棍子不是用来捡的！

orangegem.en: Orange you glad I found this orange gem? Ha ha, nice one Walter.
orangegem.trans: 橙子，你很高兴我找到了这个橙色宝石？哈哈，不错，沃尔特。

orangemooneye.en: It's a pretty good landmark, you can't miss it!
orangemooneye.trans: 这是一个相当不错的地标，非常显眼！

jammypreserves.en: Now we're really in a jam...

lobsterdinner.en: This seems pretty fancy for camping food.
lobsterdinner.trans: 这似乎是很花哨的露营食物。

generic.en: What are you so worried about Woby? It's just a statue.
generic.trans: 你为什么这么担心，沃比？这只是一座雕像。

lunarrift_portal.en: It looks like a rip in the sky. Neat!
lunarrift_portal.trans: 它看起来像是天上开了一条缝。帅啊！

slingshotmodkit.en: Time to mod my trusty slingshot?
slingshotmodkit.trans: 到了改装我信赖的弹弓的时间了吗？

normal.en: It's the perfect temperature for roasting marshmallows!
normal.trans: 这是烤棉花糖的最佳温度！

high.en: Woah! I don't think that's safe...
high.trans: 哇！那个看起来好像不安全啊……

low.en: I might need to feed the fire a bit.
low.trans: 我可能需要添一些柴火。

embers.en: We need more fuel for the fire!

generic.en: Anyone want to hear a scary story?
generic.trans: 有人想听恐怖故事吗？

out.en: The fire pit's already built, all we need is more wood!
out.trans: 营火已经搭好了，我们只需要添柴火就行了！

koalefig_trunk.en: How many figs are in there?!
koalefig_trunk.trans: 里面到底有多少无花果？

normal.en: It's the perfect temperature for... cold marshmallows?
normal.trans: 这是烤冷棉花糖……的最佳温度？

high.en: Woah! I don't think that's safe...
high.trans: 哇！那个看起来好像不安全啊……

low.en: It might need some more fuel.

embers.en: We need more fuel for the fire!

generic.en: Anyone want to hear a scary story?
generic.trans: 有人想听恐怖故事吗？

generic.en: Hope nobody hurts themselves if they try to climb over.
generic.trans: 希望没有人因为想爬过去而伤到自己。

burnt.en: Our camp!!
burnt.trans: 我们的营地！！

wet.en: This might be a bit too wet.

dry.en: Hm... does that look a bit too dry, Woby?
dry.trans: 嗯……这看起来是不是有点太干了，沃比？

generic.en: Oooh, compost bins usually have all kinds of interesting bugs in them!
generic.trans: 哦，堆肥箱里通常有各种有趣的虫子!

burnt.en: We should all really be more careful with fire!
burnt.trans: 我们真的都应该更加小心用火!

cattoy_mouse.en: Sorry Woby, that's for the kits to play with.
cattoy_mouse.trans: 抱歉了沃比，那个是让小猫咪们玩的。

axe.en: The favoured tool of axe murderers and loggers.
axe.trans: 斧头杀手和伐木工人最喜欢的工具。

winter_ornamentpearl.en: Aww, can you believe she made this, Woby?
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 哇，你能相信这是她做的吗，沃比？

blue_cap_cooked.trans: 舍不得孩子就套不着狼！

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: It's always best to be prepared!

lit.en: Wow, it looks so nice it's kind of hard to leave!
lit.trans: 哇，看起来太美了，让人舍不得离开！

generic.en: Come on Woby, we need to find some kindling!
generic.trans: 来吧沃比，我们需要找到一些引火物！

lit.en: That's one neat way to have a campfire!
lit.trans: 这是生篝火的一种巧妙方式！

generic.en: Come on Woby, we need to find some kindling!
generic.trans: 来吧沃比，我们需要找到一些引火物！

quagmire_goatmum.en: Reminds me of my old nanny.
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 让我想起了我的老保姆。

lit.en: I think I'll stay here and watch it... just a bit longer.
lit.trans: 我想我会留在这里再……多观看一会儿。

generic.en: Come on Woby, we need to find some kindling!
generic.trans: 来吧沃比，我们需要找到一些引火物！

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: That could help me hit a little harder.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 有了它我能攻击得猛烈一点。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

chester.en: Who's a good little monster? You are!
chester.trans: 谁是一个好的小怪物？你是！

dumbbell.en: I can do it! I just... need to get a good grip on it!
dumbbell.trans: 我可以的！只需要……找到一个着力点！

charging.en: It probably wouldn't be a good idea to use it in a thunderstorm.

charged.en: It probably wouldn't be a good idea to use it in a thunderstorm.

off.en: It must be out of power.

generic.en: It probably wouldn't be a good idea to use it in a thunderstorm.
generic.trans: 雷暴天气最好别用它。

grotto_pool_small.en: Sorry Woby, I don't think it'll be any good for swimming.
grotto_pool_small.trans: 抱歉，沃比，那里应该不能游泳。

generic.en: Don't look it in the mouth, Woby!
generic.trans: 沃比，咱们不挑剔礼物！

burnt.en: Now that's a dark horse!
burnt.trans: 看，那就叫黑马！

empty.en: We need to gift the gift horse something first!
empty.trans: 得先给这匹“礼物马”送点礼物才行！

warm.en: Almost as good as cuddling up with Woby.
warm.trans: 几乎和跟沃比抱在一起一样好。

frozen.en: Almost as chilling as one of my campfire stories. Right?
frozen.trans: 几乎和我的篝火故事一样让人抽凉气。是吧？

generic.en: That's a nice rock.
generic.trans: 这块石头真不错。

royal_jelly.en: It was a royal pain to get.
royal_jelly.trans: 得到它要付出一番痛苦的代价。

mapscroll.trans: 一张地图！...上面什么都没有。

mutator_spitter.en: Neat! There aren't any actual spider bits in these though, right?
mutator_spitter.trans: 漂亮! 不过这里面没有真的蜘蛛肉，对吧？

iceberg_melted.en: Woby likes to roll in puddles.
iceberg_melted.trans: 沃比喜欢在水坑里打滚。

redlantern.trans: 我喜欢这种戏剧性的灯光！

lureplantbulb.en: I'll plant this somewhere far away from camp.
lureplantbulb.trans: 我会把它种在远离营地的地方。

lowfuel.en: We'd better give it some more fuel.
lowfuel.trans: 我们最好给它多加点燃料。

on.en: That should keep us from setting the camp on fire... hopefully.
on.trans: 这应该能让我们不至于把营地烧了……希望如此。

barnaclepita.en: Further proof that anything can be a sandwich.
barnaclepita.trans: 进一步证明了任何东西都可以成为三明治。

wrong_type.en: We can eat that anytime, Winter's Feast should be special!
wrong_type.trans: 那个我们什么时候都能吃，冬季盛宴要吃点特别的！

generic.en: The table's all set and ready for food!
generic.trans: 桌子都摆好了，可以上食物了!

burnt.en: Who's the Scrooge that ruined the feast?
burnt.trans: 是谁毁掉了盛宴？

mushroombomb.en: My handbook says not to pick mushrooms you don't recognize.
mushroombomb.trans: 我的手册上说，不认识的蘑菇不要采。

quagmire_grill_item.en: I'll have to grill someone about this.

generic.en: We found its den!
generic.trans: 我们找到了它的洞！

generic.en: I love starfish!
generic.trans: 我爱海星！

quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 里面有什么科学原理吗？

ghost.en: A Pinetree Pioneer leaves no one behind! Even if they're a clown!
ghost.trans: 松树先锋队员不会丢人任何人！小丑也不例外！

firestarter.en: That's not a proper campfire, %s!
firestarter.trans: 这可不是什么营火，%s！

murderer.en: %s is a killer clown!
murderer.trans: %s是一个杀手小丑！

attacker.en: This is why I don't trust clowns!
attacker.trans: 这就是为什么我不相信小丑！
