reviver.en: I guess some clowns are okay.
reviver.trans: 我想有些小丑还是好人。

generic.en: Uh... hi %s.
generic.trans: 呃……你好%s。

ready.en: M-ma'am, I think your honey is ready.

somehoney.en: There's some honey, but not enough to be worth the stings.
somehoney.trans: 只有一点蜜，不值得冒着被蜂蛰的危险去采蜜。

fullhoney.en: M-ma'am, I think your honey is ready.

generic.en: Don't panic Walter, the bees smell your fear...
generic.trans: 别惊慌，沃尔特，蜜蜂能闻到你的恐惧……

burnt.en: It burned up!
burnt.trans: 烧起来了！

nohoney.en: It doesn't look like they've made any honey.

cabbagerolls.en: This would make great camping food!

burning.en: The fire is off the-- well actually it's ON the scale, that's the problem!
burning.trans: 这个规格的火焰前所未有！

generic.en: Just wait, that biggest fish badge will be mine!
generic.trans: 等着吧，那个最大的鱼的奖章一定是我的！

burnt.en: What a waste of supplies.
burnt.trans: 真是浪费物资。

quagmire_altar_bollard.en: As far as posts go, this one is adequate.
quagmire_altar_bollard.trans: 就柱子而言, 这根足够了。

fence_electric_item.en: We have to plant it first.

leif_sparse.en: They've come to take their revenge!

koalefant_carcass.en: Should we say a few words, Woby?
koalefant_carcass.trans: 我们该说几句悼词吗，沃比？

yotr_food4.en: They're not marshmallows, but they're still pretty good!
yotr_food4.trans: 不是棉花糖，但是也很好吃！

bugnet.en: I'm an expert at catching bugs.

yotr_food2.en: Is that what the moon tastes like?

slingshotammo_slow.trans: 这应该能让他们慢下来！

transistor.en: Of course I know what it is! It's uh... um...
transistor.trans: 我当然知道那是什么！这是呃…… 呃……嗯……

broken_forgeditem.en: Woby! Were you playing with that?

wagboss_robot_creation_parts.trans: 我知道这些要装在哪里！

monkey.en: I've only ever seen them in zoos!
monkey.trans: 我只在动物园里见过它们！

book_rain.en: I wonder what impractical rain rituals look like?
book_rain.trans: 那不实用的求雨仪式是怎么样的？

waiting.trans: 得到一些应得的闭目养神。

generic.en: No chewing on this bone, okay Woby?
generic.trans: 不要嚼这根骨头，好吗，沃比？

fruitflyfruit.en: The Fruit Flies seem to like following it around.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 果蝇似乎喜欢绕着它飞。

merm_prince.en: I wonder how they pick their king?
merm_prince.trans: 我想知道他们是如何挑选国王的？

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: It's almost as good of a pillow as Woby!
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 它当枕头几乎和沃比一样好！

whip.en: I know how you feel about cats Woby, but it still seems pretty mean.
whip.trans: 我知道你对猫的看法，沃比，但用这个好像有点过了。

frogfishbowl.trans: 呃…… 也许沃比想吃一点。

mosquitomusk.en: That's not a chew toy, Woby!
mosquitomusk.trans: 那个不是磨牙玩具，沃比！

walkingplank_grass.en: Oh, I'm good at diving! I got a badge for it!
walkingplank_grass.trans: 哦，我擅长跳水！我有一个跳水奖章！

desiccant.en: No more wet dog smell for you, Woby!
desiccant.trans: 再也不会有湿狗味了，沃比！

gems.en: Come on Woby, let's find some purple gems.
gems.trans: 来吧，沃比，我们去找一些紫色的宝石。

ghost.en: Well, she lived a long life... okay, okay, stop glaring! I'll get a heart!
ghost.trans: 好吧，她活了很久……好吧，好吧，不要再瞪我了！我会找到一颗心脏的！

firestarter.en: Not you too, Ms. %s!!
firestarter.trans: 你怎么也这样，%s女士！！

murderer.en: Attack of the killer librarian!
murderer.trans: 杀手图书管理员的袭击！

attacker.en: Is this because I said the radio will make books obsolete?
attacker.trans: 你这样是因为我说收音机会让书本过时吗？

reviver.en: Thanks Ms. %s!
reviver.trans: 多谢了，%s女士!

generic.en: Hello Ms. %s! Need any help crossing the street?
generic.trans: 你好，%s女士！需要扶你过马路吗？

maxwellthrone.trans: 那个椅子一看就被“诅咒”了。

generic.en: This will really give you the chills.
generic.trans: 真的会让你不寒而栗。

crabking_claw.en: Woah! Look at the size of those claws!
crabking_claw.trans: 哇！看看这些爪子有多大！

waterballoon.en: Don't worry, I have great aim! Or maybe you should be worried...
waterballoon.trans: 别担心，我瞄的很准！或者你确实应该担心了……

wortox_reviver.trans: 始终要安全第一，对吧，沃比？

bodypillow_kelp.en: Well, um... I guess there are worse things to use for a pillow?
bodypillow_kelp.trans: 额，啊……还有比它更不适合当枕头的东西吗？

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: Did I ever tell the story about the sea creature with the big glowing eyes?
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 我有没有讲过那个大眼睛会发光的海怪故事？

featherfan.en: I'm a big fan of staying cool. Get it, because it's a fan?
featherfan.trans: 我很喜欢保持冷静。明白了吧，因为这是一把扇子？

recharging.trans: 它是在滴答滴答地倒着走吗？

generic.en: Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!
generic.trans: 旺达女士的钟表可真不少！

mast_malbatross_item.en: We'd better get this set up, Woby.
mast_malbatross_item.trans: 我们最好把它装好，沃比。

handpillow_petals.en: Don't worry, I already checked it for bees.
handpillow_petals.trans: 别担心，我检查过，没蜜蜂。

scanning.en: Aww, who's a good little robot?
scanning.trans: 嗷，谁是听话的小机器人呢？

hunting.en: Aww, who's a good little robot?
hunting.trans: 嗷，谁是听话的小机器人呢？

generic.en: Aww, who's a good little robot?
generic.trans: 嗷，谁是听话的小机器人呢？

open.en: Come on Woby! Let's take a look around!
open.trans: 来吧，沃比！让我们四处看看吧！

generic.en: Why can't we go in?
generic.trans: 为什么不让我们进去？

full.en: There's too many people in there... I'll just wait.
full.trans: 里面人太多了……我再等等吧。

spear_wathgrithr.en: No Woby, that's not a stick! Well, I guess it IS a stick...
spear_wathgrithr.trans: 不，沃比，那不是棍子！好吧，还真是一根棍子……

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

mutator_water.en: Hey, cookies! Um... what are these made of, exactly?
mutator_water.trans: 嘿，居然是曲奇饼！呃……到底是用什么做的呢？

rocks.en: Maybe I could make a fire pit.
rocks.trans: 也许我可以做一个营火。

guano.en: My Pinetree Pioneer training is telling me there's bats nearby!
guano.trans: 我的松树先锋训练告诉我附近有蝙蝠！

kitcoon_deciduous.en: I wonder if there's a badge for kitten wrangling...
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 不知道有没有小猫管理的徽章……

archive_moon_statue.en: Well, they look happier than the statues outside... I think.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 它们看起来比外面那些雕塑要欢乐一些……

peghook.trans: 那家伙喷出来的东西有腐蚀性！

pigking.en: He looks like the Pioneer Leader of this troop.
pigking.trans: 他看起来像这支部队的松树先锋队长。

butter.en: This makes far more sense, honestly.

monstermeat_dried.trans: 嘿，沃比，是你最喜欢吃的！

panflute.en: It can't be too hard to play.

saltlick_improved.trans: 你可不是皮弗娄牛，沃比。

dug_marsh_bush.en: Hey Woby, do you see a good spot to plant this?
dug_marsh_bush.trans: 嘿，沃比，你看有什么好地方可以种这个吗？

some_flowers.en: If I find some flowers I'll bring them back here.
some_flowers.trans: 如果我找到一些花，我会把它们带回这里。

generic.en: Yeah, that looks haunted.
generic.trans: 是啊，这看起来有灵界的联系。

quagmire_swampig.trans: 这是一头超级多毛的猪。

cookedsmallmeat.en: A little meat is better than none.

dock_kit.en: Neat, I can build a dock for my boat!
dock_kit.trans: 太好了，我可以给我的小船建个码头了！

mast_malbatross.en: I feel kind of bad, but it does look great on the boat.
mast_malbatross.trans: 我有点内疚，但它确实在船上看起来很不错。

wobster_den.en: That's where the Wobsters make camp.

bomb_lunarplant.en: If only I could use it in my slingshot.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 要是能用在我的弹弓上就好了。

portableblender_item.en: It mixes all the food together.
portableblender_item.trans: 它将所有的食物混合在一起。

ripe.en: I could've sworn it was green a second ago.
ripe.trans: 我发誓前一秒钟它还是绿色的。

generic.en: It's a little lizard thing!
generic.trans: 这是一只小蜥蜴！

sleeping.en: They're even cuter when they're sleeping.
sleeping.trans: 他们睡觉的时候更可爱。

burning.en: That's not a campfire...
burning.trans: 这不是营火……

picked.en: If I wait long enough, they'll grow back.
picked.trans: 只要我耐心等待，它们总有长回来的一天。

diseased.en: Uh, something's definitely wrong with it.

withered.en: It's way too hot out for anything to grow.

generic.en: Foraging is an important wilderness skill!
generic.trans: 觅食是一项重要的野外技能！

barren.en: My handbook says some kind of fertilizer should help.
barren.trans: 手册上说使用肥料应该会有效。

bat.en: Maybe if we're lucky it'll turn into a vampire!
bat.trans: 我们要是足够幸运的话，它也许会变成吸血鬼！

refined_dust.en: It took a long time to collect all that dust.
refined_dust.trans: 应该是花了很长时间才积累到的。

magician_chest.en: C'mon Woby, just a little peek inside?
magician_chest.trans: 来，沃比，看看里面有什么？

buzzard.en: That seems like a bad sign.

purpleamulet.en: Do you hear the whispering too, Woby?
purpleamulet.trans: 你也听到那个耳语声了吗，沃比？

pepperpopper.trans: 为什么这个味道是薄荷味... ？

fence_gate_item.en: I guess I should find someplace to put that.
fence_gate_item.trans: 我想我应该找个地方把它放进去。

walkingplank_yotd.en: Oh, I'm good at diving! I got a badge for it!
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 哦，我擅长跳水！我有一个跳水奖章！

orangeamulet.en: Getting there is half the fun!
orangeamulet.trans: 到达那里是一半的乐趣！

mushroomhat.en: It's not made of the poisonous kind, right?

salsa.en: It only comes with one chip?!

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: Woah, I can see right through the dirt!
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 哇，我可以看到泥土下面了！

stump.en: Where'd the tree go? I'm stumped.
stump.trans: 那棵树哪去了？真是一桩谜题。

generic.en: It's full of delicious, delicious sap.
generic.trans: 它含有大量美味可口的树液。

playing.en: I wonder what kind of bug that is?

generic.en: I'd sure love to see what's down there.
generic.trans: 我真想看看下面有什么。

thulecitebugnet.en: Just minding my own buzzness, Woby. Heh.
thulecitebugnet.trans: 我只是在管好自己的‘嗡嗡’事，沃比。嘿嘿。

winter_ornamentlight.en: I wonder what powers it? Oh well!
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 不知道它的能量来自哪里？哦啊！

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: I'll have it in the water in a jiffy!
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 有我在它很快就能下水！

lava_pond_rock.en: Sedimentary, my dear Woby! Well, igneous actually... never mind.
lava_pond_rock.trans: 沉积岩，我亲爱的沃比！好吧，其实是火成岩……算了。

tomato.en: Mom had some tomato plants in our backyard.
tomato.trans: 妈妈在我们的后院种了一些西红柿。

hermit_pearl.en: I gave my Pinetree Pioneer's oath to protect it with my life!
hermit_pearl.trans: 我以松树先锋队的名义起过誓，要用生命保护它的！

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: Those are some really tough leaves!

wall_moonrock_item.en: I can't believe we're making walls out of real moon rock!
wall_moonrock_item.trans: 我不敢相信我们在用真正的月岩做墙!

generic.en: Hey little guy!
generic.trans: 嘿小家伙！

spider_whistle.en: Hey Webber, let's call some spiders!
spider_whistle.trans: 喂，韦伯，我们叫几只蜘蛛来吧！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: Just watch Woby, I'll catch the biggest fish you've ever seen!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 看好了，沃比，我会钓到你见过的最大的鱼！

maxwelllock.en: It looks like something should go in there.
maxwelllock.trans: 里面应该放个东西进去。

rabbithat.en: Whoever wears that is a real hare-brain! Oh, Walter!
rabbithat.trans: 谁穿上这个，谁就跟兔子一样呆！哦，沃尔特！

burning.en: Who left the torch unattended?!
burning.trans: 是谁丢下个火把不管的？

burnt.en: Well... that's that I guess.
burnt.trans: 好吧……我想只好是这样了。

generic.en: What should we make, Woby?
generic.trans: 我们应该做什么，沃比？

empty.en: It seems to respond to torchlight.
empty.trans: 它似乎对火把有反应。

crimson.en: Oh no, I think that shadow stuff made the tree sick...
crimson.trans: 哦不，一定是暗影那些东西把树弄病了……

cooldown.en: I guess it can't stay lit up all the time.
cooldown.trans: 我猜它不可能一直亮着。

spawn_disabled.en: Aww, can't we turn it on for a little bit?
spawn_disabled.trans: 啊，就打开一小会儿也不行吗？

generic.en: Woah! That's not normal!
generic.trans: 哇！不寻常啊！

lavaarena_spawner.en: This is where those enemies are coming from.

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: My strikes would hurt a little more wearing that.

differentshard.en: Come on Woby, this is going to be fun!
differentshard.trans: 来吧，沃比，这将会很有趣！

generic.en: Come on Woby, this is going to be fun!
generic.trans: 来吧，沃比，这将会很有趣！

generic.en: Turns out a key was the key to getting in.
generic.trans: 没钥匙不行。

trunkvest_summer.trans: 我身上也毛茸茸的了，沃比！

generic.en: Woah, you're a big spider!
generic.trans: 哇，你真是一只大蜘蛛！

quagmire_beefalo.en: Science says it should have died by now.

generic.en: It's so lifelike!
generic.trans: 太逼真了!

held.en: Ha ha... you wouldn't sting me... right little guy?
held.trans: 哈哈……小家伙，你应该不会叮我吧？

generic.en: Heh... sure wish I wasn't deathly allergic to them!
generic.trans: 呵……我多希望我对它们没有致命的过敏反应！

multiplayer_portal.en: Too bad it can't get us home.

record_worktobedone.en: It's no Midnight Broadcast, but it's still pretty good.
record_worktobedone.trans: 虽然不是《午夜广播》，但也挺不错。

potatosack.en: Do you think I'd get muscles if I ate more potatoes, Woby?
potatosack.trans: 沃比，你说我多吃点土豆能不能增肌？

burning.en: You're supposed to chop the tree first, THEN build the fire!
burning.trans: 你应该先砍树，然后再生火！

poison.en: Woah! I've never seen a tree with teeth before!
poison.trans: 哇！我从来没见过有牙齿的树！

chopped.en: This tree looks stumped. Heh, nice one Walter.
chopped.trans: 这棵树成为树桩了。嘿，干得漂亮，沃尔特。

generic.en: Did you know the word deciduous means to "fall off"?
generic.trans: 你知道“落叶”这个词的意思吗？

burnt.en: That tree just couldn't wait to be a campfire...
burnt.trans: 那棵树只是迫不及待地想成为一堆篝火……

wagstaff_item_1.en: This glove is real, Woby! Can you believe it?
wagstaff_item_1.trans: 这手套是真的，沃比！你能相信吗？

wagstaff_item_2.en: Just because it's not a projection doesn't mean you have permission to chew on it, Wobes!
wagstaff_item_2.trans: 尽管它不是投影，你也不能啃它，沃比！

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: Not knowing what they are is half the fun!
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 一半的乐趣就来源于不知道它们是什么！

generic.en: There must be spiders around here somewhere!
generic.trans: 这附近一定有蜘蛛！

lumpy_sapling.en: Natural selection hasn't gotten to this one yet.
lumpy_sapling.trans: 自然选择还没有影响到它。

asparagussoup.en: Asparagus again? Er, not that I'm complaining...
asparagussoup.trans: 又是芦笋？呃，我不是抱怨……

bedroll_straw.en: You make due with what you have out in the wilderness.
bedroll_straw.trans: 在野外，要懂得利用身边的资源。

not_mine.en: I really shouldn't pick up things that don't belong to me.
not_mine.trans: 我真的不应该捡起不属于我的东西。

generic.en: You never know what you'll run into out in the wilderness.
generic.trans: 你永远不知道你在野外会遇到什么。

figatoni.en: At least the fig's hidden inside.
figatoni.trans: 至少无花果是藏在里面的。

lost_toy_42.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_42.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

lost_toy_43.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_43.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

wobster_sheller_dead.en: Well, at least they'll make a good dinner.
wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 好吧，至少可以做成一顿丰盛的晚餐。

armor_voidcloth.en: It almost looks like it has a face, doesn't it?
armor_voidcloth.trans: 怎么看都像长了一张脸，对不对？

marble.en: Maybe I'll make a fancy fire pit.
marble.trans: 也许能拿来砌一个漂亮的营火堆。

winter_ornamentboss.en: This one should go someplace special.
winter_ornamentboss.trans: 这个应该放在特别的地方。

fishmeat_small.en: Maybe I could use it as bait for a bigger fish.
fishmeat_small.trans: 也许我可以用它作为诱饵钓大鱼。

waterpump.en: It's always good to have proper safety precautions in place.
waterpump.trans: 做好安全防范措施总是好的。

tacklesketch.en: This looks pretty easy to make.

support_pillar.en: Don't worry Woby, I'm sure it'll be fine!

dirtpile.en: Woby, did you dig something up?

taffy.en: Don't eat too much or you'll get a stomach ache.
taffy.trans: 不要吃得太多，否则会胃痛。

justeggs.en: Mom used to make them scrambled...
justeggs.trans: 妈妈以前总做煎蛋给我吃……

antler.en: You could poke an eye out with those! Maybe he already did?
antler.trans: 你可以用这些东西把眼珠子戳出来！也许他已经这样做过了？

generic.en: Hey Woby, do you guys go to the same barber?
generic.trans: 嘿，沃比，你们是去同一个理发店吗？

flower_evil.en: Woby, what's wrong? It's just a flower.
flower_evil.trans: 沃比，怎么了？只是一朵花而已。

mask_foolhat.trans: 太帅了！有一张恐怖面具！

cooking_long.en: Maybe I'll organize my bug collection while I'm waiting.
cooking_long.trans: 也许我在等待的时候应该整理一下我的虫子收藏。

generic.en: It still doesn't beat roasting things over a campfire.
generic.trans: 还是比不上用篝火烤东西。

empty.en: I'll have to gather some food to start cooking.
empty.trans: 我得收集一些食物原材料开始做饭。

lost_toy_10.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_10.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

lost_toy_11.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_11.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西!

generic.en: That's how we got here. Hopefully how we get back, too.
generic.trans: 能过来，应该也能回去吧？

lost_toy_14.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_14.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: Let's save this for the others! Right, Woby girl?
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 把这杯留给大家吧！好不好，沃比姑娘？

generic.en: It's empty, Wobes.
generic.trans: 是空的，沃比。

burning.en: That's not a proper campfire!
burning.trans: 那可不是像样的营火！

generic.en: We're mapping out the wilderness!
generic.trans: 我们正在绘制荒野的地图！

burnt.en: Someone wasn't practicing fire safety.
burnt.trans: 有人没有履行消防安全准则。

thulecite_pieces.en: Woby, keep your eyes peeled for any more of these little pieces!
thulecite_pieces.trans: 沃比，继续留意这些小东西！

durian_oversized.en: Why did this one have to grow so big?
durian_oversized.trans: 这个为什么要长这么大？

stale.en: Well, it sure looks like it's doing something.
stale.trans: 嗯，一看就是已经在发挥作用了。

spoiled.en: I'd guess it's just about done.

generic.en: I think I'm supposed to let it sit for a while.
generic.trans: 应该是要让它静置一段时间。

mutateddeerclops.en: Aww, I think that poor Deerclops is sick!
mutateddeerclops.trans: 噢，我想可怜的独眼巨鹿应该是病了！

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: Don't worry Woby, I'm sure it'll be fine!

wall_ruins.trans: 我喜欢这种诡异的气氛。

has_loot.en: I think we have a winner, Woby!

generic.en: Looks like nothing. Oh well!
generic.trans: 看起来什么都没有。哦，好吧！

generic.en: Don't be so skittish Woby, it's just a toadstool!
generic.trans: 别这么胆小，沃比，这只是一个毒菌蟾蜍！

empty.en: What's wrong, Woby? It's just a normal hole in the ground.
empty.trans: 怎么了，沃比？这只是一个普通的地洞。

oar.en: I used to go canoing with my Pinetree Pioneer troop.
oar.trans: 我以前常和松树先锋队的同伴们一起去划独木舟。

pandoraschest.en: There's got to be something good inside!

lavaarena_bernie.en: He might make a good distraction for us.
lavaarena_bernie.trans: 我们或许能利用他进行干扰。

bernie_big.en: If you play with fire, you're gonna get Bernie'd. Heh...
bernie_big.trans: 玩火者必被伯尼抓。呵呵……

spidereggsack.en: Aww, it's full of baby spiders!

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: What is it boy? Do you have something to show WX?
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 怎么了，孩子？你有东西给WX看吗？

garlic_seeds.en: Where should we plant them, Woby?
garlic_seeds.trans: 我们种在哪里好呢，沃比？

hermit_bundle_shells.trans: 我的贝壳收藏又增加了！

sculpture.en: Hey Woby, look! I'm getting good at this!
sculpture.trans: 嘿，沃比，看！我越来越擅长这个了！

block.en: This doesn't look too hard! Or does it...

burnt.en: Don't we have a perfectly good fire pit?
burnt.trans: 我们不是有一个很好的营火了吗？

empty.en: Time for some arts and crafts.
empty.trans: 是时候做一些艺术和手工了。

gargoyle_werepig.en: Don't worry Woby, it's just a statue.
gargoyle_werepig.trans: 别担心，沃比，这只是一座雕像。

has_character.en: Are you in need of assistance?

has_item.en: Do you see what's inside, Woby?
has_item.trans: 你能看到里面有什么吗，沃比？

generic.en: Don't get stuck, Woby!
generic.trans: 别被卡住了，沃比！

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: Those crystals will quicken my abilities.
lavaarena_rechargerhat.trans: 那些水晶的力量加速了我的能力。

minotaur.en: Aw, did someone leave you all alone down here?
minotaur.trans: 噢，有人把你一个人留在这里吗？

lost_toy_18.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_18.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

generic.en: This one's kind of puny.
generic.trans: 这个有点小。

lost_toy_19.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_19.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

walrus.en: I need a closer look at those tusks!
walrus.trans: 我需要仔细看看这些象牙！

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.en: I bet there's some interesting secrets hiding under there!
support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.trans: 我敢打赌，这里面一定隐藏着一些有趣的秘密！

elixir_container.en: Contents not safe for human consumption!
elixir_container.trans: 内容物达不到人类食品安全！

playing.en: It's okay, everyone is wearing their safety gear!
playing.trans: 没关系，每个人都穿着安全装备！

generic.en: All fighting should be done with pillows.
generic.trans: 愿所有的战斗都只用枕头进行。

lutefisk.en: Once you get past the smell, it's not bad!
lutefisk.trans: 只要适应了这个气味，其实味道还不错！

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: People really shouldn't leave their litter lying around.
monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 人们真的不应该把垃圾到处乱丢。

jellybean.trans: 糖豆豆是给小孩子吃的……

madscience_lab.en: Mad science is the best kind!
madscience_lab.trans: 疯狂的科学就是最好的科学！

watermelonicle.en: Further proof that all food is better on a stick!
watermelonicle.trans: 进一步证明，连上一个木棒，会让所有的食物变的好吃！

prime_mate.en: Arr, matey! Did I say that right?
prime_mate.trans: 啊，伙计呀！是这么称呼吗？

hot.en: It's just blowing off steam! Get it, Woby?

generic.en: Not too close, Wobes.
generic.trans: 别靠这么近，沃比。

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

charlie_hand.en: We should give it a hand! Heh. Good one, Walter.
charlie_hand.trans: 我们应该对它伸出援手。说得好，沃尔特。

generic.en: Winona's been wearing those a lot lately.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜最近经常戴它。

wagpunk_cagewall.en: This will keep things contained. Yup, and us too, Woby!
wagpunk_cagewall.trans: 这个能起到限制作用。对的，我们也被限制住了，沃比！

saddle_wathgrithr.en: Wanna try it on, Woby? Don't worry, I was just kidding!
saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 想装上试试吗，沃比？别担心，我只是开个玩笑！

ancient_altar.en: Do you think aliens helped them make it?
ancient_altar.trans: 你猜是不是外星人帮忙建的？

garlic_oversized.en: Well, we'll be safe from giant vampires now.
garlic_oversized.trans: 哈哈，我们再也不怕巨型吸血鬼了。

generic.en: Do they ever dream of eating carrots and wake up with their house missing?
generic.trans: 它们有没有梦见吃胡萝卜，醒来后房子不见了？

burnt.en: That's what happens when you're irresponsible with fire.
burnt.trans: 这就是你对火不负责任的后果。

livingtree.en: Can you talk? What's it like being a tree?
livingtree.trans: 你会说话吗？做一棵树是什么感觉？

hostile.en: I still think we can be friends.
hostile.trans: 我还是认为我们可以成为朋友。

buried.trans: 我们要不要帮助他，沃比？

generic.en: Don't worry, Woby. I think I can gain his trust.
generic.trans: 别担心，沃比。我觉得我能获得他的信任。

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: It floats... like a feather, in fact.
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 它就像一根羽毛一样浮着。

wagstaff_machinery.en: Don't you just love junk, Woby? Never know what we'll find!
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 你不就是喜欢垃圾吗，沃比？永远不知道我们会找到什么！

gears.en: These don't usually occur in nature.
gears.trans: 这些通常不会出现在自然界中。

tacklecontainer.en: It's got room for all my tackle.
tacklecontainer.trans: 它的空间可以容纳我所有的工具。

frogglebunwich.en: You can make anything into a sandwich if you try hard enough.
frogglebunwich.trans: 如果你足够努力，你可以把任何东西做成三明治。

boat_cannon_kit.en: I've got all the supplies I need to build a cannon.
boat_cannon_kit.trans: 我有建造大炮所需的全部物资。

bearger.en: Look at those razor sharp claws! I need to get a closer view!
bearger.trans: 如同剃刀一样的利爪！我想走近看看！

dustmeringue.en: Uh... no thanks. Maybe the moths will like it?
dustmeringue.trans: 额……不用了，谢谢。也许那个蛾子会喜欢它？

bandage_butterflywings.en: It's made from butterfly wings! Cute! And a little sad.
bandage_butterflywings.trans: 这是用蝴蝶翅膀做的！可爱！但有点伤感。

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

cold.en: Getting colder... must've taken a wrong turn.
cold.trans: 越来越冷了……一定是走错路了。

hot.en: We're hot on the trail, Woby!

generic.en: Hey! This looks a lot like that radio!
generic.trans: 嘿，这看起来很像那个收音机！

some_kelp.en: More kelp is on the way! Get it, Woby?
some_kelp.trans: 更多海带还会再来！听懂了没，沃比？

lots_of_kelp.en: This is kelpful. Hah! Where are you getting this stuff, Walter?
lots_of_kelp.trans: 海带满溢在外。哈！你都是从哪学的，沃尔特？

generic.en: Need a little kelp? Heh. Good one, Walter.
generic.trans: 拜拜海带？嘿……说得好，沃尔特。

tentacle_pillar_hole.en: Hey, there's a tunnel! Let's go Woby!
tentacle_pillar_hole.trans: 嘿，那是一条隧道！我们走吧，沃比！

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

burnt.en: Went up like a giant matchstick!
burnt.trans: 像巨大的火柴棒一样烧掉了！

generic.en: It makes me happy too, Woby!
generic.trans: 沃比，它让我也觉得开心！

moon_altar_glass.en: Don't worry, I'll help you get where you need to go.
moon_altar_glass.trans: 别担心，我会帮你到达你需要去的地方。

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: Don't worry kitties, I'll put this together lickety-split!
kitcoondecor1_kit.trans: 别担心，小猫咪们，我用不了一会儿就能装好！

perdfan.en: Hey Woby, it's our biggest fan! Heh... good one, Walter.
perdfan.trans: 嘿，沃比，它是我们最大的粉丝（扇子）！嘿... 说得好，沃尔特。

generic.en: Don't worry, Wobes. It's not connected.
generic.trans: 别怕，沃比，还没通电。

hedgehound_bush.en: Woby, what's wrong? It's just a rose bush!
hedgehound_bush.trans: 沃比，怎么了？它只是一片玫瑰花丛！

hermithouse_ornament.en: I remember making these at camp!
hermithouse_ornament.trans: 我记得在营地做过这些！

kitcoon_nametag.en: It looks almost like yours, Woby!
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 跟你的看起来一模一样，沃比！

statueharp_hedgespawner.trans: 全都被藤蔓覆盖了起来。

quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

watermelon_oversized.en: We'll have watermelon slices for days!
watermelon_oversized.trans: 这西瓜我们能吃好几天喽！

1.en: It's a shame things had to end the way they did.
1.trans: 很可惜，事情不得不以这样的方式结束。

chesspiece_pipe.en: It looks like one of those joke pipes you can mail in for.

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: Did you ever hear the story about the disembodied heart that kept beating?
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 你听过那个被肢解的心脏还不停跳动的故事吗？

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

miniboatlantern.en: It'll help us find the sea monsters. I know they're out there!
miniboatlantern.trans: 它可以帮助我们找到海怪。我知道他们就在那里！

glowberrymousse.en: Will my insides light up if I eat it?
glowberrymousse.trans: 如果我吃了它，我的内脏会不会亮起来？

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: Mmm. Smells like bacon! But don't eat it Woby!
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 呣……闻起来像培根！不要吃它，沃比！

orangestaff.en: I bet I could race you now, Woby!
orangestaff.trans: 我打赌我现在可以和你赛跑了，沃比！

pavlova.en: Mmmm, it almost reminds me of a perfectly roasted marshmallow.
pavlova.trans: 嗯，这几乎让我想起了一个完美的烤棉花糖。

pickledherring.en: Pickling is a really practical way to store food supplies.
pickledherring.trans: 腌制是一种非常实用的食物储存方式。

generic.en: They never taught us about alchemy in school.
generic.trans: 学校从来没有教过我们炼金术。

burnt.en: I wish things would stop catching fire.
burnt.trans: 我希望其他东西不要再起火了。

generic.en: Is it really magic?
generic.trans: 真的是魔法吗？

burnt.en: I guess the magic wasn't fireproof.
burnt.trans: 看来魔法也不防火。

burnt.en: I guess that's one way of putting an end to the mystery.
burnt.trans: 我想这也是结束这个谜团的一种方式吧。

generic.en: I don't really understand how it's supposed to work.
generic.trans: 我真的不明白这是怎么一回事。

moon_altar_crown.en: Don't worry, we'll get you home!
moon_altar_crown.trans: 别担心，我们会送你回家的！

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: Ohh, so that's how baby eyeballs are made.
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 哦，原来小眼球是这么做出来的。

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: We should probably stay away from those, Woby.
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 我们应该离它们远一些，沃比。

humanmeat_cooked.en: Cooked nice and pink, but still morally gray.
humanmeat_cooked.trans: 煮的粉嫩，但在道德上还是灰色地带。

rage.en: I don't think he likes us very much.
rage.trans: 我觉得他不太喜欢我们。

generic.en: A real giant frog monster!
generic.trans: 一个真正的巨型青蛙怪兽！

rabbitkinghorn.en: I can't carrot a tune! Heh. Nice, Walter.
rabbitkinghorn.trans: 我可以胡吹一首曲子！呵呵。不错，沃尔特。

wolfgang_whistle.trans: 我们准备好了，锻炼！对吧，沃比？

bernie_active.en: Woah! Is your bear haunted? Cursed?
bernie_active.trans: 哇！你的小熊被幽灵缠身了？受了诅咒吗？

birdtrap.en: A bird trap! Classic survival stuff!
birdtrap.trans: 捕鸟陷阱！经典的求生道具！

broken.en: We should try to fix it!

generic.en: Now that's how you fetch, Woby!
generic.trans: 瞧人家捡得多好，沃比！

cave_banana.en: I wouldn't mind stopping for a snack.
cave_banana.trans: 我不介意停下来吃点小吃。

dug_monkeytail.en: I wonder if there's any real monkeys hiding in there?
dug_monkeytail.trans: 我想知道里面是不是藏了真正的猴子？

cutgrass.en: Look, I can make a whistle with it! PHHWEEEE!
cutgrass.trans: 看，我可以用它来吹口哨！吹起来！

mask_ancient_architecthat.en: I guess it kinda looks like Wilson. Don't tell him I said that, Woby.
mask_ancient_architecthat.trans: 我觉得它有点像威尔逊。别告诉他是我说的，沃比。

saddlehorn.en: It can't be comfortable wearing a saddle all the time.
saddlehorn.trans: 一直戴着鞍具它不可能会舒服。

firestarter.en: No, first you clear the area, then arrange the logs like this, then-
firestarter.trans: 不对，你首先应该清理地面，然后这样排列木棒，然后——

ghost.en: Oh boy, what trouble did you get into this time, %s?
ghost.trans: 哎呀，你又闯了什么祸，%s？

murderer.en: Hey %s, no killing people! Killing bad!
murderer.trans: 嘿，%s，不要杀人！杀人是不对的！

attacker.en: She's just doing what comes naturally, I guess.
attacker.trans: 我才这就是她的自然天性。

reviver.en: Thanks! Uh... florp?
reviver.trans: 多谢了！呃……浮浪噗？

generic.en: Hi %s!
generic.trans: 你好%s！

mermking.en: The king of the bog monsters!

lunar_grazer.en: It puts its victims to sleep before it eats them. Neat!
lunar_grazer.trans: 它在吃掉受害者之前会先催眠对方。厉害啊！

chesspiece_minotaur.en: This statue is... a-maze-ing! Get it?
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 这个雕像着实……令人着迷啊！对不对？

tumbleweed.en: It's just minding its own business.

pirate_flag_pole.en: It's pretty good, but the Pinetree Pioneer flag looks better.
pirate_flag_pole.trans: 它相当不错，但还是比不上松树先锋队队旗。

w_radio.en: What do you think it does, Woby?
w_radio.trans: 你觉得它是做什么的，沃比？

growing.en: Hey! I'm pretty good at this!

needsfertilizer.en: It needs something to help it grow...
needsfertilizer.trans: 它需要一些东西来帮助它成长……

burnt.en: Darnit, now I have to start all over!
burnt.trans: 糟糕，这下我得重新开始了！

generic.en: Mom never let me in her garden... not since the Slug Incident.
generic.trans: 妈妈从来不让我进她的花园……就是因为那次鼻涕虫事件。

burning.en: Smells kinda yummy.
burning.trans: 闻着有点香呢。

generic.en: Stay away from it, Woby!
generic.trans: 离它远点，沃比！

uncarved.en: Let's face it, Woby... This pumpkin doesn't have one! Get it?
uncarved.trans: 咱们直面现实吧，沃比……这颗南瓜连脸都没！懂了吗？

generic.en: I can't wait to scare someone!
generic.trans: 我等不及要吓唬别人了！

rock_petrified_tree.en: What could've turned it to stone?

bodypillow_steelwool.en: It's not so bad, I once made a bed out of pine needles.
bodypillow_steelwool.trans: 这就不错了，我曾经用松针铺过一张床。

succulent_picked.en: They're pretty useful for minor cuts and burns.
succulent_picked.trans: 它们对轻微的伤口和烧伤相当有用。

scorched_skeleton.en: I think the time for first aid has long passed.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 已经早就过了施展急救的时间了。

festivefish.en: Fish with some special seasonal seasonings.
festivefish.trans: 鱼肉搭配了一些特殊的时令调料。

kitcoon_marsh.en: I wonder if there's a badge for kitten wrangling...
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 不知道有没有小猫管理的徽章……

costume_king_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_king_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

recharging.trans: 它是在滴答滴答地倒着走吗？

generic.en: Ms. Wanda sure has a lot of clocks!
generic.trans: 旺达女士的钟表可真不少！

generic.en: Whoa, fella!
generic.trans: 喔，伙计！

pigskin.en: Is this what people are always tossing around?
pigskin.trans: 这就是人们一直在折腾的事情吗？

hammer.en: Sometimes you need to break stuff to make stuff.
hammer.trans: 有时候，你需要打破东西，才能造出东西。

guacamole.en: Now all we need are some chips!
guacamole.trans: 现在有薯片蘸着吃就好了！

yotd_oar.en: A dragon boat needs a dragon paddle.

voidcloth_boomerang.en: You don't fetch this one, Woby.

wagdrone_beacon.en: This'll keep the lil spinning robot from going out of bounds!
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 这能让小旋转机器人不跑出界去！

dumbbell_bluegem.en: You'll get a really n-ice workout with that! Heh. Good one, Walter.
dumbbell_bluegem.trans: 你会得到一次很冰~凉的锻炼！呵呵。说得好，沃尔特。

berrysauce.en: It somehow tastes even better than regular berries!
berrysauce.trans: 不知为何，它的味道比普通浆果还要好！

eyeofterror.en: Wow! Do you think it escaped from a giant head?
eyeofterror.trans: 哇！你认为它是从巨人的脑袋里逃出来的吗？

nightsword.en: That deeeefinitely has a curse on it.

playing.en: I bet I'd be pretty good at that!

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

oar_monkey.en: Why is that paddle so sharp? Someone might get hurt!
oar_monkey.trans: 那个船桨为什么那么尖？伤到人就不好了！

broken.en: I-I'm sure we can fix him.
broken.trans: 我觉得我们一定能修好他。

generic.en: He burnt himself out.
generic.trans: 他把自己烧光了。

voidcloth.en: All that's left of that poor shadow monster.
voidcloth.trans: 可怜的暗影怪兽就只剩下这点东西了。

moon_altar_rock_glass.en: I think there's something in there...

monkey_mediumhat.en: Listen up everybody, I'm the captain!

occupied.en: You're going to look great when we're done, just you wait!
occupied.trans: 完成后，你看起来会很棒，拭目以待吧！

burnt.en: We all need to be much more careful with fire.
burnt.trans: 我们都要更加小心的用火。

generic.en: Woby doesn't like getting dressed up, but beefalo seem to!
generic.trans: 沃比不喜欢打扮，但皮弗娄牛似乎喜欢!

cave_banana_tree.en: I didn't know bananas could grow in caves.
cave_banana_tree.trans: 我不知道香蕉还可以长在山洞里。

walrus_tusk.en: Oof... I don't think he brushed.
walrus_tusk.trans: 哎呀……他应该没刷过牙了。

burning.en: A swamp fire!
burning.trans: 沼泽起火了！

burnt.en: It won't bother us again.
burnt.trans: 它不会再打扰我们了。

generic.en: Not a good tree for climbing.
generic.trans: 不是一棵适合爬的树。

ghost.en: Don't worry, you'll have a heart in a jiffy!
ghost.trans: 别担心，你马上就有心脏了！

firestarter.en: I thought for sure YOU'D know how to build a campfire!
firestarter.trans: 我还以为你知道怎么搭建营火呢！

beaverghost.en: I can see your Canadian spirit! Er... I'll go get a heart.
beaverghost.trans: 我看到了你的加拿大灵魂了！呃……我去给你找颗心脏。

murderer.en: Really Mr. %s? An axe murderer? At least use some imagination.
murderer.trans: %s先生你居然这样？斧头杀人魔？起码用点想象力啊。

mooseghost.en: Don't worry Mr. %s, Canadians stick together! I'll find you a heart!
mooseghost.trans: 别担心，%s先生，加拿大人是很团结的！我会给你找到一颗心脏的！

attacker.en: I don't like the way he's gripping that axe...
attacker.trans: 我不喜欢他握斧头的方式……

gooseghost.en: A Pinetree Pioneer is a friend to all woodland creatures! I'll get a heart!
gooseghost.trans: 松树先锋队员是所有森林生物的朋友！我去给你找颗心脏！

reviver.en: Us outdoorsy types have each other's backs! Right Mr. %s?
reviver.trans: 我们这些户外爱好者应该互相支持！对不对，%s先生？

generic.en: Hey Mr. %s! How's Ms. Lucy?
generic.trans: 你好，%s先生！露西还好吗？

bundlewrap.en: Efficient packing is truly an overlooked art in camping.
bundlewrap.trans: 高效的整理行囊确实是露营中一门被忽视的艺术。

eggplant_oversized.en: Oh... great! I guess we're eating eggplant for the next week...
eggplant_oversized.trans: 哦... 太好了！我想我们下周要吃一周茄子了……

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.en: Has anyone asked why it's so upset?
alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.trans: 有人问过它为啥这么生气吗？

mushgnome.en: A living mushroom! Well, I guess all mushrooms are technically living...
mushgnome.trans: 有生命的蘑菇！好吧，严格意义上，所有的蘑菇都是有生命的……

burning.en: That's a good habit.
burning.trans: 那是个好习惯。

reviving.en: We forgot to burn it. Oh well!
reviving.trans: 我们忘记要烧掉它了。哦，好吧！

generic.en: It looks dead, Woby. But be careful.
generic.trans: 它看起来死了，沃比。但要小心。

carnival_seedpacket.en: I guess it's sort of like trail mix. Sort of.
carnival_seedpacket.trans: 有点像户外补充能量的混合坚果。有点像。

mutatedwarg.en: That Varg doesn't look so good...
mutatedwarg.trans: 那只座狼看起来不对劲……

sculpture_knighthead.en: That's one way to get a head. Get it?
sculpture_knighthead.trans: 这也算是拔得头筹的一种方法吧。这个笑话听懂了吗？

burnt.en: That's what I get for making a wall out of kindling...
burnt.trans: 这就是我用木柴做墙的后果……

generic.en: You make do with what you have when you're in the wilderness.
generic.trans: 在野外，要懂得利用身边的资源。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

oceantree.en: I guess they don't have to worry about getting enough water.
oceantree.trans: 我猜它们应该不愁缺水。

trinket_41.en: Looks like a slime monster escaped.
trinket_41.trans: 看来有一只粘液怪兽逃跑了。

trinket_40.en: I don't know what we'd be measuring out here.
trinket_40.trans: 我不知道我们会在这里测量什么。

trinket_43.en: Another toy that I'm way too mature for.
trinket_43.trans: 又一个玩具，我太大了，玩不了这个了。

trinket_42.en: It looks like someone mashed two toys together.
trinket_42.trans: 看起来像是有人把两个玩具捣碎在一起。

molebat.trans: 它们有严重的过敏症状。

reflectivevest.en: Do I look as cool as I feel?
reflectivevest.trans: 我看起来和我的自我感觉一样酷吗？

trinket_45.en: It doesn't pick up any of my favourite stations...
trinket_45.trans: 我最喜欢的电台都收不到……

trinket_44.en: Huh. I can't find that plant in my handbook.
trinket_44.trans: 咦。我的手册里找不到这种植物。

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: Woby, help me look for a good place to set this up!
yotc_carrat_race_start_item.trans: 沃比，帮我找一个好的地方把这东西装起来！

trinket_46.en: It looks like something from outer space.
trinket_46.trans: 它看起来像外太空的东西。

mermarmorhat.en: Aww, merms get all the good stuff.
mermarmorhat.trans: 嗷…鱼人们得到了所有好东西。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: It's almost as good of a pillow as Woby!
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 它当枕头几乎和沃比一样好！

chesspiece_wormboss.en: It was gross inside and out!

slurtlehole.en: I have to see what's in there!

ghostlyelixir_speed.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_speed.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

voidcloth_kit.en: I hope this goes toward my sewing badge.
voidcloth_kit.trans: 我希望能得到一个缝纫徽章。

chesspiece_claywarg.en: Poor Woby. She never seems to get along with the other dogs.
chesspiece_claywarg.trans: 可怜的沃比。她似乎从来都和其他狗相处不来。

level_3.en: I've got a real talon for decorating! Get it? Because crows have talons?
level_3.trans: 我是装饰方面的一把好爪！听明白没？因为乌鸦有爪子？

generic.en: Maybe if we decorate around it, more birds will come!
generic.trans: 也许我们把它装饰一下，就会有更多的鸟儿来！

level_2.en: It's looking good, but I think we can do even better.
level_2.trans: 看起来不错，不过我们还能做得更好。

trinket_30.en: They're kind of boring once you've seen the bigger version.
trinket_30.trans: 一旦你看到了更大的版本，这些就有点无聊了。

trinket_32.en: Will it tell me my future?
trinket_32.trans: 它会告诉我我的未来吗？

trinket_31.en: They're kind of boring once you've seen the bigger version.
trinket_31.trans: 一旦你看到了更大的版本，这些就有点无聊了。

merm_armory.en: Aww, can't I just take a little peek inside?
merm_armory.trans: 噢，就不能让我看看里面有什么吗？

charged.en: Did that goat just get struck by lightning?!
charged.trans: 那只山羊是不是被雷劈了？！

generic.en: That's a weird looking mountain goat.
generic.trans: 这只山羊看起来真奇怪。

cooking_long.en: This might take a while. Wanna see this cool bug I found in the meantime?
cooking_long.trans: 这可能需要一段时间。想看看我在这期间发现的这个酷酷的虫子吗？

burnt.en: It's uh... extra done!
burnt.trans: 烤的有点过了！

empty.en: They weren't so different from us, were they?
empty.trans: 他们跟我们也没那么不同，对吧？

quagmire_tomato.en: It's red because it's full of science.

trinket_38.en: I can almost see into space with these!
trinket_38.trans: 用这个都能看到宇宙了！

palmcone_seed.en: I should plant it, you can never have enough trees!
palmcone_seed.trans: 我应该种下它，树木再多都不嫌多！

oceanvine_cocoon.en: That must be their nest! If I could just get a closer look...
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 那一定是它们的巢穴！如果能靠近点看看的话……

trinket_37.trans: 我希望那个吸血鬼没事。

trinket_39.en: I guess my hands can take turns.
trinket_39.trans: 我想我的手可以轮流使用。

trinket_34.en: Nothing bad ever happened from wishing on a monkey's paw!
trinket_34.trans: 对着猴子的爪子许愿，从来没有发生过什么坏事!

trinket_33.en: Aw, I thought it was a real spider...

trinket_36.en: Those are just fakes, I want to see real vampire teeth!
trinket_36.trans: 那些都是假的，我要看真正的吸血鬼牙齿!

trinket_35.en: Looks like someone already drank it.

generic.en: He's just winging it.
generic.trans: 羽翼丰满。

houndstooth.trans: 它们留下了一个纪念品！

beequeen.en: If I make friends with their queen, maybe the bees won't sting me!
beequeen.trans: 如果我蜂王交朋友了，也许蜜蜂就不会蜇我了！

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: I'd sure love to see what's down there.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.trans: 我真想看看下面有什么。

normal.en: It's the perfect temperature for... cold marshmallows?
normal.trans: 这是烤冷棉花糖……的最佳温度？

high.en: Woah! I don't think that's safe...
high.trans: 哇！那个看起来好像不安全啊……

low.en: I might need to feed the fire a bit.
low.trans: 我可能需要添一些柴火。

embers.en: We need more fuel for the fire!

generic.en: Anyone want to hear a scary story?
generic.trans: 有人想听恐怖故事吗？

out.en: The fire pit's already built, all we need is more wood!
out.trans: 营火已经搭好了，我们只需要添柴火就行了！

playing.en: I saw a marble game once back home, I always wanted to try it!
playing.trans: 我在老家见过弹珠游戏，我一直想尝试一下！

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

pigelitefighter4.en: He's probably really nice once you get to know him.
pigelitefighter4.trans: 一旦你了解了他，他人其实真的很好。

moon_tree_blossom.en: Who knew there were flowers on the moon?

trinket_21.en: Whoops, it got kind of bent.

carnival_gametoken.en: What game should I play first? It's so hard to decide!
carnival_gametoken.trans: 我应该先玩哪个游戏？好难决定！

pigelitefighter1.en: He's looking blue... because he's got blue tattoos, get it?
pigelitefighter1.trans: 他看起来很忧伤（蓝色）……因为他有蓝色的刺青，明白没？

fence_junk.en: I guess it's better than just leaving all that scrap metal lying around.
fence_junk.trans: 也许这样比乱丢金属垃圾要好。

locked.en: How do we get it open? Any ideas, Woby?
locked.trans: 我们怎么把它打开？有什么办法吗，沃比？

generic.en: There HAS to be something good in there, just look at it!
generic.trans: 一定有好东西在里面，看看就知道了！

pigelitefighter2.en: Are you reddy? Heh, good one Walter.
pigelitefighter2.trans: 你姓瑞迪吗？呵呵，这个说的漂亮，沃尔特

pigelitefighter3.en: He's not afraid to get his hands... or anything else dirty.
pigelitefighter3.trans: 他不怕弄脏他的手……或其他任何东西。

trinket_27.en: I wonder if I can use it to pick up radio signals...
trinket_27.trans: 不知道能不能用它接收到无线电信号……

damaged.en: Aww, it can't be fixed, but at least the parts won't be wasted.
damaged.trans: 噢，修不好了，但至少零件不会浪费。

generic.en: Whoa! Death from above! Watch out, Woby!
generic.trans: 哇！天降杀机！小心点沃比！

potato_oversized.en: That's going to need a lot of mashing.
potato_oversized.trans: 要把这个捣成土豆泥可不容易啊。

goldnugget.en: Ow... I bit it, isn't that a thing people do?
goldnugget.trans: 嗷……我咬了一下，不是都这么鉴别黄金吗？

trinket_29.en: I'm not really interested in board games.

merm_shadow.en: Neat! It's a bog monster and shadow monster at the same time!
merm_shadow.trans: 真不错！沼泽怪兽和暗影怪兽二合一！

trinket_28.en: I'm not really interested in board games.

trinket_22.en: I like a good yarn. Heh...

trinket_25.en: It doesn't even smell like a real pine tree!
trinket_25.trans: 它甚至没有真正的松树的味道!

trinket_24.en: Woby doesn't seem to like it very much.

ivy_snare.en: Ah! It really is trying to grab me!

resurrectionstone.en: It must've been used by an ancient civilization!
resurrectionstone.trans: 这一定是古代文明使用过的！

generic.en: That's one prickly plant.
generic.trans: 那是一株带刺的植物。

hutch.en: Looks like we found another friend, Woby!
hutch.trans: 看来我们又找到了一个朋友，沃比！

glommerwings.en: How did he fly with these little wings?
glommerwings.trans: 他是怎么用那么小的翅膀飞起来的？

monkeybarrel.en: I'm sure it's just an ordinary barrel.
monkeybarrel.trans: 这应该只是一个普通的桶。

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: Shadow magic is pretty handy, I see why the Ancients liked it!
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 暗影魔法挺方便的，我知道为什么古人喜欢它了！

firestaff.en: I'd better keep this away from the younger kids... and Willow.
firestaff.trans: 我最好不要让孩子们看到这个……还有薇洛。

charlie_heckler.en: What mean birds! At least I think they're birds.
charlie_heckler.trans: 这些鸟真是调皮捣蛋！它们应该是鸟吧。

trinket_10.en: I'm sure these will bring a smile to someone's face. Get it?
trinket_10.trans: 我相信这些会给别人带来笑容的。明白了吗？

critterlab.en: What's wrong Woby? Is something in there?
critterlab.trans: 怎么了，沃比？里面有东西吗？

brewing.en: I can't wait for my tea!

active.en: Ms. Pearl makes the best tea!
active.trans: 珍珠女士沏出的茶是最棒的！

burnt.en: I hope Ms. Pearl is okay.
burnt.trans: 希望珍珠女士没事。

generic.en: That's right, Woby. She's not in yet.
generic.trans: 没错，沃比。她还没到店。

dragontailhat.en: I don't want the back end...

chesspiece_beefalo.en: Aw don't be jealous Woby, you deserve a statue too!
chesspiece_beefalo.trans: 嗷，别太嫉妒，沃比，你也值得有一尊塑像！

trinket_16.en: I'm not really interested in board games.

trinket_15.en: I'm not really interested in board games.

lighter.en: Way easier than rubbing sticks together, but not as fun.
lighter.trans: 钻木取火容易多了，但没那么好玩。

trinket_18.en: Seems like a normal wooden horse.
trinket_18.trans: 好像是一匹普通的木马。

trinket_17.en: One less utensil to pack with your camping gear!
trinket_17.trans: 少了一个与你的露营装备一起打包的器具!

sweetpotato.en: It just isn't the holidays without it!

trinket_11.en: He said he loves when I talk about my bug collection!
trinket_11.trans: 他说他喜欢听我聊我的虫子收藏!

trinket_14.en: My mom would kill me if I cracked her fine china.
trinket_14.trans: 如果我打碎了她的精美瓷器，我妈会杀了揍我的。

rose.en: Funny, this isn't the type of rose you usually see in the wild.
rose.trans: 有趣，这不是普通的野玫瑰。

generic.en: Are there any bugs on it?
generic.trans: 上面有什么虫子吗？

trinket_13.en: I thought she was looking the other way a second ago...
trinket_13.trans: 我还以为她刚才看的是另一个方向……

ghostlyelixir_retaliation.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_retaliation.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

fishmeat.en: Is it okay to eat it raw?

burning.en: Quick, put it out! Put it out!
burning.trans: 赶快，灭火！灭火！

candecorate.en: I'm glad I've got you to spend the holiday with, Woby.
candecorate.trans: 我很高兴有你陪我过节，沃比。

burnt.en: Maybe... we can make another one?
burnt.trans: 也许……我们能再做一个？

nightmarefuel.en: People always say my campfire stories are nightmare fuel.
nightmarefuel.trans: 人们总是说我的篝火故事是噩梦的燃料。

ghost.en: Do you need a heart? You know, uh... ba-bum?
ghost.trans: 你需要找颗心脏吗？你知道，呃……咚咚跳的那个东西？

firestarter.en: %s! You're going to start a forest fire that way!
firestarter.trans: %s！你那样会引发森林火灾的！

murderer.en: A killer plant! This would make a great Midnight Broadcast episode...
murderer.trans: 杀人植物！这个非常适合在午夜广播节目里讲……

attacker.en: Wait %s! Me... friend! See?
attacker.trans: 等等，%s！我是……你的朋友啊！？

reviver.en: You good plant friend! Much thanks!
reviver.trans: 植物果然是人类的好朋友！多谢了！

generic.en: Hi %s!
generic.trans: 你好%s！

bananajuice.en: Mmm, it's even better than the ones they made at the malted shop!
bananajuice.trans: 嗯，这比麦芽糖店做的还要好吃！

deadlyfeast.en: Someone could get sick from eating that!

war_blueprint.en: I wonder if the beefalo actually like wearing these.
war_blueprint.trans: 不知道皮弗娄牛喜不喜欢这件。

bluemooneye.en: You don't come across one of these very often.

deerclops_eyeball.en: At least we got this souvenir.
deerclops_eyeball.trans: 至少我们得到了这个纪念品。

occupied.en: Sorry Woby, that's not for you.
occupied.trans: 对不起，沃比，那个不是给你的，

generic.en: Sorry Woby, that's not for you.
generic.trans: 对不起，沃比，那个不是给你的，

burnt.en: That's why we should never play with matches.
burnt.trans: 所以说我们决不能玩火柴。

scrapbook_page.en: I should add it to my scrapbook!
scrapbook_page.trans: 我该把它添加到我的图鉴上！

moonstorm_static.en: I wonder what he's working on?

generic.en: I guess some people like to be more precise than "hot" and "cold".
generic.trans: 我猜有的人不满足仅仅用“冷”和“热”衡量温度。

burnt.en: We all need to be much more careful with fire.
burnt.trans: 我们都要更加小心的用火。

burning.en: My bugs!!
burning.trans: 我的虫子！！

generic.en: I've been keeping my bugs in there when I run out of room in my pockets.
generic.trans: 我口袋里装不下的时候，就把虫子装在那里面。

burnt.en: Poor little guys...
burnt.trans: 可怜的小家伙……

wagboss_robot_possessed.en: It's a bot unstable! Get it, Woby?
wagboss_robot_possessed.trans: 机器极其不稳定！听懂了没，沃比？

carrot_oversized.en: I was hoping it would sprout ears and whiskers too... oh well.
carrot_oversized.trans: 我还指望着它会长出耳朵和胡须呢……呵呵。

burnt.en: Looks like someone forgot their fire safety.
burnt.trans: 看来有人在消防安全上打马虎眼了。

generic.en: I'm squirming with excitement!
generic.trans: 我激动得全身都想扭起来了！

empty.en: What should we feed it, Woby?
empty.trans: 我们应该喂它什么，沃比？

2.en: What's the matter, girl? Did someone fall down a well?
2.trans: 怎么了，姑娘？有人掉井里了吗？

pumpkinpie.en: Mmmm, cut me a big slice!

horseshoe.en: Woby, you'll always be my good luck charm!
horseshoe.trans: 沃比，你永远是我的幸运符！

archive_centipede_husk.en: I don't think it's worked in a long time.
archive_centipede_husk.trans: 看起来太久没运行过了。

crumbs.en: Maybe they dropped them to find their way home?
crumbs.trans: 也许有人是为了找到回家的路才把它们撒下的？

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: I'll have that up in a jiffy!

tentacle_garden.trans: 这根柱子看起来很奇怪。

plantmeat.en: Does this count as eating my vegetables?

shovel_lunarplant.en: I came up with the name!

cooldown.en: Don't worry Ms. Wickerbottom, I'll clean this all up later!
cooldown.trans: 别担心，薇克巴顿女士，我一会会把这些都打扫干净！

generic.en: We should probably test it out. You know, for safety.
generic.trans: 还是测试一下吧。你懂的，安全第一。

burning.en: Smells kinda yummy.
burning.trans: 闻着有点香呢。

generic.en: Stay away from it, Woby!
generic.trans: 离它远点，沃比！

meatballs.en: They're the best part of spaghetti anyway.
meatballs.trans: 反正吃意面主要就是为了吃肉丸。

yotb.en: What do you think, Woby? Should I show it to the judge?
yotb.trans: 你觉得行么，沃比？我要不要拿给评委看看？

generic.en: I hope Woby doesn't think it's a chew toy...
generic.trans: 希望沃比别以为它是磨牙玩具……

crabking_icewall.en: Just have to chip away at it.

burning.en: Uh oh, who wasn't practicing fire safety?
burning.trans: 呃，哦，是谁没遵守消防安全规定？

picked.trans: 这里没有什么可收集的了。

generic.en: A pretty normal thing to see in a swamp.
generic.trans: 在沼泽地里看到它是很正常的事情。

goldenaxe.en: I feel like you could use gold for better things.
goldenaxe.trans: 我觉得你可以用金子做更好的事情。

livingtree_root.en: There's a tree inside just waiting to come out!
livingtree_root.trans: 里面有一棵树，正等着出来呢！

monsterlasagna.en: It looks kind of suspicious... maybe Woby will want it.
monsterlasagna.trans: 它看起来有点可疑…… 也许沃比愿意吃。

burning.en: It reminds me of barbequed fish.
burning.trans: 它让我想起了烤鱼。

generic.en: Yikes, that smells fishy.
generic.trans: 哎呀，闻起来有鱼腥味。

generic.en: I never knew science was such an important part of survival.
generic.trans: 我从来不知道科学是野外求生中如此重要的一部分。

burnt.en: Did that look like a campfire?!
burnt.trans: 那看起来像营火吗？

burnt.en: That's horrible!
burnt.trans: 太可怕了！

generic.en: Bog monsters live in houses?
generic.trans: 沼泽怪兽住在房子里？

golden_farm_hoe.en: My tilling skills deserve a gold metal! Get it?
golden_farm_hoe.trans: 我的锄头都是黄金打造的！厉害吗？

rabbitkingspear.en: The most striking part of the rabbit. Heh.
rabbitkingspear.trans: 兔子最引人注目的那个部分，呵呵。

gargoyle_hound.en: Wouldn't it be funny if it came to life?
gargoyle_hound.trans: 如果它能活过来，是不是很有趣？

generic.en: I wonder how it got here?
generic.trans: 不知道它是怎么到这的？

burnt.en: Aww, and it was such a neat looking chest too...
burnt.trans: 嗷，本来是个多么酷炫的箱子啊……

shimmer.en: What do you say, Woby? Should we take a look inside?
shimmer.trans: 沃比，我们要不要看看里面有什么？

generic.en: Come on Woby, give me a hand moving this!
generic.trans: 来吧，沃比，帮我搬一下这个！

molebathill.en: There might be something interesting in there.
molebathill.trans: 也许有一些有趣的东西在里面。

wall_dreadstone_item.en: It's gonna be a real nightmare to set it up! Get it?
wall_dreadstone_item.trans: 组装它将会是一场真正的噩梦！听懂没？

pinecone.en: I should find a good spot to plant this.
pinecone.trans: 我应该找一个好地方来种这个。

turnip.en: Huh... Turnip would be a good name for a dog.
turnip.trans: 咦，萝卜是个不错的狗名。

ghost.en: Maybe this will help get over your fear of ghosts! Or not...
ghost.trans: 也许这能帮助你克服对鬼的恐惧！或者不能……

firestarter.en: Mr. %s, wait! The fire pit is over THERE!
firestarter.trans: %s先生，等等！营火在那边！

murderer.en: There's a murderer in our midst, Woby!
murderer.trans: 我们中间有一个杀人犯，沃比！

attacker.en: Y-you stay away!
attacker.trans: 你——你别过来！

reviver.en: Mr. %s is just a big softy!
reviver.trans: %s先生其实心肠很软！

generic.en: Hey Mr. %s!
generic.trans: 你好，%s先生！

boat_bumper_yotd.en: Neat! Are those real dragon teeth?

ghostlyelixir_lunar.en: Ghosts can drink potions? Uh, of course I knew that!
ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 鬼魂还会喝药水？呃，我当然知道！

battlesong_instant_revive.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_instant_revive.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

inground.en: There's a mushroom hiding in there!

generic.en: It doesn't look like any of the mushrooms in my handbook.
generic.trans: 它看起来不像我手册里的任何一种蘑菇。

playing.en: I wonder if Woby's part sheepdog...
playing.trans: 沃比是不是有牧羊犬的血统……

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

armordragonfly.en: I still wish we could've been friends...
armordragonfly.trans: 我还是遗憾我们没能做朋友……

blowdart_sleep.en: It's not as good as my slingshot, but it'll do the trick.
blowdart_sleep.trans: 虽然没有我的弹弓好，但是也有些作用。

has_spirit.en: Where do you think it wants to go, Woby?
has_spirit.trans: 你觉得它想去哪儿，沃比？

generic.en: Soulless! Aww, that's mean.
generic.trans: 毫无灵魂！嗷，这话有点过分。

little_walrus.en: I've never seen a real walrus up close!
little_walrus.trans: 我从来没有近距离看过真正的海象呢！

playing.en: I'm pretty sure it was this one...

generic.en: I'd sure love to see what's down there.
generic.trans: 我真想看看下面有什么。

fig_cooked.en: I don't really like cooked figs any better...
fig_cooked.trans: 我不会因为无花果煮熟了就喜欢……

armor_carrotlure.trans: 漂亮的围卜背心！能懂吗，沃比？

mermhat.en: Now I can disguise myself as a bog monster! The tables have turned!
mermhat.trans: 现在我可以把自己伪装成沼泽怪物了！终于轮到我了！

wereitem_goose.trans: 那个看起来一定是被诅咒了。

burning.en: We did the right thing, Woby.
burning.trans: 我们做得对，沃比。

reviving.en: We should have burned it. Oops.
reviving.trans: 我们本该烧了它的。哎呀。

generic.en: Rest in peace, Your Majesty.
generic.trans: 安息吧，陛下。

wagstaff_npc_wagpunk.en: Gee Mister, you move fast for a senior!
wagstaff_npc_wagpunk.trans: 呀，老先生，您一把年纪了居然走这么快！

turkeydinner.en: If you're good I'll give you a drumstick, Woby.
turkeydinner.trans: 如果你乖乖的，我就给你一根鸡腿，沃比。

kitcoon_savanna.en: Aww, they're so cute even Woby likes them!
kitcoon_savanna.trans: 嗷，它们可爱极了，连沃比都喜欢！

pigguard.en: I think we're already hitting it off!
pigguard.trans: 我觉得我们已经很合拍了！

chesspiece_daywalker.en: I sure hope we get to see him again!
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 要是我们能再见到他就好啦！

support_pillar_dreadstone_broken.en: How could it be so destructible?
support_pillar_dreadstone_broken.trans: 怎么会这么容易被弄坏呢？

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: Careful Woby, these aren't real food!
oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.trans: 小心点，沃比，这些不是真正的食物！

me.trans: 死掉的我还在走路！哈……哈？

generic.en: Don't you recognize me?
generic.trans: 你认不出我了？

charlie_stage_post.en: Are we doing a talent show?

bibingka.en: Woah... where did we get the shaved coconut from?
bibingka.trans: 哇……我们从哪里弄来的椰肉屑？

battlesong_sanityaura.en: This seems a bit more complicated than the songs I learned in the Pioneers.
battlesong_sanityaura.trans: 这似乎比我在先锋队学的歌要复杂一些。

twiggy_nut.en: Hey Woby, you dig a hole and I'll plant it.
twiggy_nut.trans: 嘿，沃比，你挖个洞，我去种。

chesspiece_stalker.en: Definitely on my top five list of skeletons.
chesspiece_stalker.trans: 绝对在必看骸骨的前五名里。

chesspiece_butterfly.en: It's not quite as good as a real bug collection, but close!
chesspiece_butterfly.trans: 虽然比不上真正的虫子收藏，但也差不多了!

rock.en: It would be more useful in smaller pieces.
rock.trans: 如果是小件的就更有用了。

ghost.en: Ha, and people tried to tell me ghosts aren't real.
ghost.trans: 哈，人们还想告诉我鬼魂不是真的。

skullchest.en: There's got to be something good in there.

yellowamulet.en: With this on, I'm invincible! Right?
yellowamulet.trans: 带上这个我就无敌了！对吧？

mast_yotd.en: It's made of tough dragon scales!
mast_yotd.trans: 竟然是坚硬的龙鳞做的！

tentaclespots.en: You can find a use for almost anything in nature.
tentaclespots.trans: 自然界中几乎所有的东西你都能找到用武之地。

beeswax.en: It's none of my beeswax. Heh...

shroom_skin.en: It's so weird! Can I keep it?
shroom_skin.trans: 太奇怪了！我可以留着它吗？

lost_toy_1.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_1.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

lost_toy_2.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_2.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

pigelite3.en: He's not afraid to get his hands... or anything else dirty.
pigelite3.trans: 他不怕弄脏他的手……或其他任何东西。

pigelite4.en: He's probably really nice once you get to know him.
pigelite4.trans: 一旦你了解了他，他人其实真的很好。

pigelite1.en: He's looking blue... because he's got blue tattoos, get it?
pigelite1.trans: 他看起来很忧伤（蓝色）……因为他有蓝色的刺青，明白没？

pigelite2.en: Are you reddy? Heh, good one Walter.
pigelite2.trans: 你姓瑞迪吗？呵呵，这个说的漂亮，沃尔特

oar_driftwood.en: I used to go canoing with my Pinetree Pioneer troop.
oar_driftwood.trans: 我以前常和松树先锋队的同伴们一起去划独木舟。

dug_grass.en: Now I can plant it closer to camp.
dug_grass.trans: 现在我可以把它种在离营地更近的地方。

hermitcrab_lightpost_item.en: C'mon, Woby! Let's lighten this place up a bit!
hermitcrab_lightpost_item.trans: 来吧，沃比！我们让这地方亮堂点！

lost_toy_7.en: Hey! I could've sworn I didn't see anything there a second ago!
lost_toy_7.trans: 嘿，我可以发誓我刚才没有看到任何东西！

piggyback.en: This is giving me inspiration for a new campfire story...
piggyback.trans: 这给了我一个新的篝火故事的灵感……

carrat_good.en: Woah, all our training paid off!
carrat_good.trans: 哇，我们所有的训练都得到了回报！

carrat.en: He just needs some more training. We'll get there!
carrat.trans: 他只是需要一些更多的训练。我们会成功的！

burnt.en: Why won't everyone just use the fire pit?!
burnt.trans: 为什么大家都不愿意用营火呢？

generic.en: Do I get a badge for having the best carrat?
generic.trans: 有没有最佳胡萝卜鼠的奖章？

critter_eyeofterror.en: What is it, boy? Do you see something?
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 那是什么，男孩？你看到什么了吗？

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: It can't be much harder than setting up a tent.

lunar_forge_kit.en: Woby and I can have that set up in a jiffy!
lunar_forge_kit.trans: 沃比和我几下就能装好它！

support_pillar_broken.en: Um. Maybe I spoke too soon...

2.en: How could anyone be scared of that face?
2.trans: 怎么会有人害怕那张脸？

book_web.en: Maybe I should give this book to Mr. Wolfgang.
book_web.trans: 也许我应该把这本书给沃尔夫冈先生。

burnt.en: What a waste.
burnt.trans: 真是浪费。

generic.en: Woah! A giant mushroom!
generic.trans: 哇！一个巨大的蘑菇！

atrium_statue.en: If it could speak, I wonder what it would tell us.
atrium_statue.trans: 它要是能说话的话，不知道会告诉我们什么。

generic.en: Wow! I wonder if I could be as strong as Mr. Wolfgang one day...
generic.trans: 哇！不知道我将来能不能像沃尔夫冈先生一样强壮……

burnt.en: Aww, I never even got to try it...
burnt.trans: 嗷，我都没来得及试……

crabking_mob.en: Watch out for those pinchers, Woby!

corn.en: Some corn on the cob sounds pretty good right about now.
corn.trans: 现在吃几口玉米穗应该很不错。

grotto_pool_big.en: Sorry Woby, I don't think it'll be any good for swimming.
grotto_pool_big.trans: 抱歉，沃比，那里应该不能游泳。

yotr_fightring_kit.en: I'll have it set up in a jiffy!

ready.en: Salt has gathered on the rope.

generic.en: Science takes time.
generic.trans: 科学是需要时间的。

critter_kitten.en: I'm usually more of a dog person, but you're so cute!
critter_kitten.trans: 我平时比较喜欢养狗，但你太可爱了！

palmconetree.en: Here it- nope, wait, this one isn't in my handbook either.
palmconetree.trans: 有了——不对，这个也不在我的手册里。

robot.en: Poor %s. I guess %s might be more dangerous than I thought...
robot.trans: 可怜的%s。看来%s比我想的还要危险……

default.en: Poor %s. I guess %s might be more dangerous than I thought...
default.trans: 可怜的%s。看来%s比我想的还要危险……

female.en: Poor %s. I guess %s might be more dangerous than I thought...
female.trans: 可怜的%s。看来%s比我想的还要危险……

male.en: Poor %s. I guess %s might be more dangerous than I thought...
male.trans: 可怜的%s。看来%s比我想的还要危险……

noammo.en: I forgot the cannonballs! This won't make me lose points toward my badge, right?
noammo.trans: 我忘记了炮弹！ 我不会因此损失兑换徽章的积分，对吧？

ammoloaded.en: It's kind of like a giant slingshot, if you think about it.
ammoloaded.trans: 其实它很像一个巨大的弹弓。

generic.en: I'll load the cannonball!
generic.trans: 我来装填炮弹！

normal.en: It's the perfect temperature for roasting marshmallows!
normal.trans: 这是烤棉花糖的最佳温度！

high.en: Woah! I don't think that's safe...
high.trans: 哇！那个看起来好像不安全啊……

low.en: It might need some more fuel.

embers.en: We need more fuel for the fire!

generic.en: Anyone want to hear a scary story?
generic.trans: 有人想听恐怖故事吗？

winter_food8.trans: 一下子就让你暖和起来了！

halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.en: It didn't turn out quite as well as I thought it would.
halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.trans: 结果没有我想象的那么好。

winter_food6.en: There's fruit in it, so it's healthy right?
winter_food6.trans: 里面有水果，所以是健康食品吧？

winter_food3.en: Don't eat too many, you'll get sick!

winter_food2.en: I'll make sure the younger kids don't eat too many.
winter_food2.trans: 我会保证年幼的孩子不会吃撑喽。

bishop_nightmare.en: Oooh, look at that! What's that stuff oozing out of it?
bishop_nightmare.trans: 哦，看那个！从里面流出来的是什么东西？

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: I think there's something in there...

record_dusk.en: Woby likes to howl along, don't you girl?
record_dusk.trans: 沃比想跟着嚎叫，对不对，小姑娘？

stalagmite.en: People get stalagmites and stalactites confused, but I know which is which!
stalagmite.trans: 人们把石笋和钟乳石搞混了，但我知道哪个是哪个！

chesspiece_warg_mutated.en: They weren't nearly as nice as you, Woby.

playbill_the_veil.trans: 噢，看起来很恐怖的样子。

green_cap.en: It's not usually smart to eat unfamiliar mushrooms.
green_cap.trans: 吃不熟悉的蘑菇通常不是明智之举。

icebox.en: This should keep our food supplies fresh!
icebox.trans: 这应该能让我们的食品供应保持新鲜！

rare.en: I think I found something interesting!

lava_pond.en: Probably not the best swimming hole.
lava_pond.trans: 可能不是最佳的游泳洞。

quagmire_grill.en: Now all I need is a backyard to put it in.
quagmire_grill.trans: 我现在就差一个摆放它的后院了。

damaged.en: Looks like we can repair it or use the spare parts, Woby!
damaged.trans: 看起来我们既能修它也能拿零件来用，沃比！

generic.en: Hard to put a positive spin on it!
generic.trans: 这情况看来不会好转了！

chesspiece_yoth.en: It's a chess piece of a chess piece!

onemanband.en: I've never played any of these instruments, but I'm sure I'll do great!
onemanband.trans: 我从来没有玩过这些乐器，但我相信我会演奏的很好！

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: Maybe this is my chance to earn my Helping the Elderly badge!
wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 抓住这个机会我也许就能赢得“帮助老年人奖章”！

chesspiece_yotd.en: Racing was fun, even if I didn't get a badge for it...
chesspiece_yotd.trans: 竞速比赛真好玩，就是没给我发勋章……

nightmarelight.en: But can you roast marshmallows over it?
nightmarelight.trans: 但你能在上面烤棉花糖吗？

book_horticulture.en: I already have my gardening badge.

catcoonhat.en: Now this is a hat made for the wilderness!
catcoonhat.trans: 这是一顶户外专用的帽子！

minotaurchest.en: I have to know what's inside!
minotaurchest.trans: 我一定要知道里面是什么！

generic.en: We'd better start cooking some offerings.
generic.trans: 我们最好开始煮些祭品。

full.en: It's in the process of digestinating.

kelphat.en: Maybe if I look like a sea monster the real ones will come out.
kelphat.trans: 也许如果我扮成海怪的样子，真正的海怪就会出现。

chesspiece_yots.trans: 雕像看起来还是滑溜溜的！

beefalo_groomer_item.en: Better get this all set up.

abysspillar_trial.en: Great idea, Woby! Let's pull it!
abysspillar_trial.trans: 好主意，沃比！咱们拉一下！

moon_cap.en: Another mushroom that isn't in my handbook...
moon_cap.trans: 又出现一个我手册里没有的蘑菇……

mermguard.en: Are they a different type of bog monster?
mermguard.trans: 它们是另一种类型的沼泽怪物吗？

held.en: Are you happy in my pocket?
held.trans: 你在我的口袋里开心吗？

generic.en: Wonder how they got here?
generic.trans: 不知道他们是怎么来的？

beemine_maxwell.en: How do I get the mosquitoes out?

melted.en: Woby likes to roll in puddles.
melted.trans: 沃比喜欢在水坑里打滚。

generic.en: Iceberg ahead!
generic.trans: 前面有冰山！

lifeinjector.en: This is supposed to make me healthier?

yotb_sewingmachine.en: My mom has one of those! It looks a bit different, though.
yotb_sewingmachine.trans: 我妈妈也有一个！不过看起来有点不同。

ghost.en: Don't worry %s, I have a badge in first aid!
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s！我得过急救的奖章！

firestarter.en: That's not how you build a campfire, %s!
firestarter.trans: 营火可不是这么生的，%s！

murderer.en: You're not going to get away with this, %s!
murderer.trans: 你这次跑不了了，%s！

attacker.en: %s doesn't seem trustworthy...
attacker.trans: %s好像不值得信任……

reviver.en: %s is definitely Pinetree Pioneer material.
reviver.trans: %s可以加入松树先锋队。

generic.en: Hello, %s!
generic.trans: 你好啊，%s！

generic.en: I think it wants me to give it a token.
generic.trans: 它应该想要一枚代币。

balloon.en: My keen tracking senses are telling me there's a clown nearby.
balloon.trans: 我敏锐的追踪能力告诉我附近有一个小丑。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.trans: 是的，沃比。我们既纯粹又辉煌！

costume_tree_body.en: Who would leave such a nice costume out in the wilderness?
costume_tree_body.trans: 谁会在荒野中留下这么好的服装？

devtool_nodev.en: Guess I haven't earned that badge yet.
devtool_nodev.trans: 我还没有赢得过那枚奖章呢。

chesspiece_carrat.en: I usually prefer badges to trophies, but I might make an exception.
chesspiece_carrat.trans: 我通常更喜欢奖章而不是奖杯，但我可以破例。

spice_salt.en: It helps makes camp food a bit less bland.
spice_salt.trans: 它能让露营的食物不那么乏味。

describe_plantstressed.trans: 一定有什么东西在困扰着它。

announce_detach_buff_electricattack.trans: 哎呀……看来好戏要收场了。

announce_enter_light.en: Oh, hey! I can see again!

spider.en: I didn't really want to fight them anyway.

generic.en: Y-yeah! You better run!
generic.trans: 哼！你赶紧跑吧！

pig.en: Let's just take a minute to cool our heads.

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.en: Woby, look at those weird buzzards!
announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 沃比，快看那些古怪的秃鹫！

announce_thorns.en: Aaah!! Ow!! It hurts! Were those poisonous?!
announce_thorns.trans: 啊！哇！好疼啊！那些东西有毒吗？！

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: I'm starting to get a bit tired...

announce_flare_seen.en: A signal! We should follow it!
announce_flare_seen.trans: 有信号！我们应该跟着它走！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: I think that's all of them!

wintersfeastfuel.en: Mmmm, tastes like a perfectly toasted s'more.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 嗯，味道就像一个完美的烤棉花糖夹心饼。

tallbirdegg_cracked.en: I sure miss mom's scrambled eggs...
tallbirdegg_cracked.trans: 我好怀念妈妈的炒鸡蛋……

announce_revived_from_corpse.en: Aaah... I don't want to do that again.

announce_freedom.en: That wasn't nearly as fun as I thought it'd be...
announce_freedom.trans: 根本不如我想的有意思……

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: Huh... I have the weirdest feeling something's watching me.
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 嗯……我有种奇怪的感觉，好像有什么东西在看着我。

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: I think Woby and I can sniff them out on our own.
announce_ticoon_abandoned.trans: 我和沃比两个就足够找到它们了。

1.trans: 啊！嗷！碰到像被火烧一样！

2.en: Aaaah, it got me! It got me!

announce_nodangersiesta.en: This isn't the best time for a siesta.

1.en: A Pinetree Pioneer... never gives up...!
1.trans: 松树先锋队员……绝不轻言放弃……！

2.en: This is... ergh... a little heavy...

3.en: Woby... could you... help... at all...?

4.en: I'll get it...! I just... need a minute...!
4.trans: 我……可以的！只……是需要点……时间！

5.en: This can't... be good... for my spine...
5.trans: 这个……一定对我的脊椎……不好……

6.en: Come on Wobyyyy... help me... out!

8.en: Errgh... just... give me a minute...

9.en: Why am I... doing this... again...?

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: Look at us, Woby! We're officially time travelers!!
announce_pocketwatch_portal.trans: 沃比，瞧瞧咱们！咱们是正式的时间旅行者了！！

announce_bees.en: I love bees! Too bad I'm uh... deathly allergic to them.
announce_bees.trans: 我最爱蜜蜂了！可惜的是我……额对它们有致命的过敏反应。

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: They must be too busy to come now, Woby girl.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 人家现在肯定是在忙，沃比姑娘。

announce_float_swim_tired.en: I gotta paws. Get it, Wobes?

1.en: Hey! You have to turn around!

2.en: The finish line's the other way! The. Other. Way!!
2.trans: 终点线在另外一边！另外一边！！

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.en: Wide awake and ready for anything!
announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 我精神着呢，准备好迎接一切的挑战了！

announce_shelter.en: What would we do without trees?

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: There should be one more hiding somewhere...

announce_bravery_potion.en: There's nothing to be afraid of!

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: They're falling from the sky, Woby!
announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.trans: 它们从天上掉下来了，沃比！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: I don't think they'd be hiding way out here.

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: Just reel it in a little... just like they taught us...
announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.trans: 一点一点的收线……就像他们教的一样……

announce_crafting_fail.en: I don't have all the supplies I need.

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: Hold on Woby, I think my Acid Repellent is wearing off.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 等下，沃比，我的驱酸剂快要失效了。

announce_canfix.en: Don't worry, I know how to fix it!

announce_compass_out.en: What...? I've never seen a compass do this before.
announce_compass_out.trans: 什么……？我以前没见过指南针会这样。

prey.en: Sorry, you're going to be dinner for me and Woby!
prey.trans: 抱歉，你要变成我和沃比的晚餐了！

spider.en: This wouldn't be happening if you didn't try to eat me!
spider.trans: 如果你没打算吃我，我们也不必如此！

generic.en: Sorry!!
generic.trans: 抱歉！！

pig.en: It didn't have to be like this!

announce_floater_held.en: I knew I'd come out on top!
announce_floater_held.trans: 我就知道我会脱颖而出！

1.en: Darnit, the fire went out right at the best part!
1.trans: 糟糕，火焰在最精彩的节骨眼上熄灭了！

announce_fan_out.en: Guess it's time for a new fan.

announce_weight_heavy.en:
Weight: {weight}
Is there a badge for heaviest fish?
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
钓到最重的鱼发不发奖章啊？

announce_unimplemented.en: I don't think it's done yet.

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: Get ready to swim Woby, I don't think this was made for deep water!
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 做好游泳的准备，沃比，我觉得这船不适合在深水区航行！

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: Maybe it needs some better soil...
describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 也许它需要更好的土壤……

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: Um, WX? Could you maybe turn the light down a bit?
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 嗯，WX？你能不能把灯光调暗一点？

announce_mount_lowhealth.trans: 嚄。我觉得它可能受伤了。

announce_hunt_lost_trail.en: I uh... think I lost the trail...

announce_hunt_beast_nearby.en: I learned all about tracking in the Pioneers! It went thataway!
announce_hunt_beast_nearby.trans: 我在先锋队学到了所有的追踪知识！它朝那边走了！

announce_boat_leak.en: Um. That might be a problem.

announce_highresearch.en: I know everything now! Mostly everything, at least.
announce_highresearch.trans: 我现在什么都知道了！几乎，大概。

announce_shadow_rift_max.en: What was that weird light? We should check it out, Woby!
announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 那个奇怪的光是什么？我们最好检查一下，沃比!

announce_boomerang.en: Hey, who threw that?! Oh, wait...

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.en: Alright, I'm closing my eyes! Three... two... one...!

2.en: I think there's something moving underground!

3.en: Hang on, I'm sure my handbook says what to do in an earthquake!
3.trans: 等一下，我的手册里提到过怎么应对地震！

describe_planthappy.en: I think I'm doing a good job!

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: Come on Woby, let's get to work!

announce_tool_tooweak.en: It's okay Woby, we just need to find a stronger tool!
announce_tool_tooweak.trans: 没关系，沃比，我们只需要找到一把更结实的工具！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.en: Uh oh, I think we're almost out of time.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.trans: 啊哦，我们的时间不多了。

announce_ammo_slot_overstacked.en: There's too much ammo to swap out now.

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: Huh... maybe I don't want to drop it after all.
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 啊……也许我并不是真的想变回去。

announce_yotd_noboats.en: We've got to get closer to the Start Tower, Woby!
announce_yotd_noboats.trans: 咱们得再靠近起点塔一点，沃比！

quagmire_announce_mealburnt.en: Darnit! It's uh... a bit crispy...

announce_nodaysleep.en: I can't sleep with the sun in my eyes.
announce_nodaysleep.trans: 太阳这么大，我睡不着觉。

announce_tool_slip.en: I- I meant to do that!

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 又变回平时的沃尔特了。

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Oh well. It's good to stay hydrated anyway.
announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 哎好吧。反正保持水分充足对健康也有好处。

1.en: Uh oh... I'm all out of ammo.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: I think we're getting warmer, Woby!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 感受到温度上升了吧，沃比！

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: This trail could be dangerous, but a Pinetree Pioneer has no fear!
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 追寻这条踪迹可能会遇到危险，但是松树先锋队员毫无畏惧！

announce_archive_no_power.en: Hm, it doesn't look like it's working.

2.trans: 帮我们多找点这个，姑娘！

3.trans: 沃比，你要找的就像这些一样。

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Uhh, something really weird is happening!
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 呃，有奇怪的事情正在发生！

announce_oceanfishing_badcast.en: Er... that was just for practice.

describe_toodark.en: I sure wish I had a flashlight.
describe_toodark.trans: 我真希望有一个手电筒。

announce_soaked.en: I'm going to get all pruney!
announce_soaked.trans: 手指要被泡的皱起来了！

2.en: Off you go! And don't get distracted, silly girl!

8.en: Woby, follow your nose! It knows! Heh.
8.trans: 沃比，跟着你的鼻子走！笔直走！嘿嘿。

announce_nowardrobeonfire.en: That seems like a bad idea.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: Darnit, they're too good at hiding!

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Huh? My punches feel wimpier... not that I was wimpy before!
announce_detach_buff_attack.trans: 哈？我的出拳好像弱了下来……我不是说我以前比较弱啊！

announce_moonpotion_failed.en: Darnit, I must've done something wrong...
announce_moonpotion_failed.trans: 糟糕，我一定是做错了什么……

announce_scrapbook_full.en: I've already filled out my scrapbook.
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 我已经在图鉴上填上了。

announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.trans: 沃比！看看我发现了什么！

announce_thurible_out.en: I think it's out of fuel.

announce_burnt.en: Ow, ow, ow! Does anyone know first aid? Is this a third degree burn?!
announce_burnt.trans: 嗷嗷嗷！有人学过急救吗？这算不算三级烧伤啊？！

announce_nomountedgift.en: I'll have to get down first.

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: Whoops, I might've forgot to set up the checkpoints...
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 哎呀，我好像忘了加检查点了……

announce_hungry.en: Can we stop for a snack break?
announce_hungry.trans: 我们可以停下来吃点零食吗？

announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Nothing's going to rain on my parade! Because I'm waterproof, get it?
announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 没有人能给我泼冷水！因为我是防水的，懂了吗？

announce_petrifed_trees.en: I scream, you scream, the trees scream!
announce_petrifed_trees.trans: 我尖叫，你也尖叫，树也一起尖叫吧！

announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 我们需要更结实的东西，沃比！

announce_slinghsot_no_parts_skill.en: Huh. How does this part work?
announce_slinghsot_no_parts_skill.trans: 哈。这个组件起什么作用？

announce_carrat_error_stunned.trans: 听到那个声音就要冲！冲啊，冲啊！

announce_klaus_enrage.en: I think we made him angry.

announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.en: Is that a real sea monster?

announce_ruins_reset.en: Hey Woby, look! The monsters are back!
announce_ruins_reset.trans: 喂沃比，看啊！那些怪兽又回来了！

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: This reminds me of a radio program I heard where a guy was hit by lightning and turned into pure electricity and-
announce_attach_buff_electricattack.trans: 这个让我想起我以前听过的一个广播节目，有个人被闪电击中了以后居然变成了纯粹的电能，然后……

announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 咦？它居然在向我发出指示！

announce_trap_went_off.en: It looked way easier in my handbook...
announce_trap_went_off.trans: 我的手册上写的要容易很多……

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: Woby, c'mere girl! It's okay, I'm me again!
announce_monkey_curse_changeback.trans: 沃比，没事的！我又是我了！

announce_insufficientfertilizer.en: I think it needs more nutrients.
announce_insufficientfertilizer.trans: 我觉得它需要更多养料。

no_ingredients.en: It looks like I need to find more supplies first.
no_ingredients.trans: 看来我需要先找齐材料。

no_station.en: I could probably do it if I had a station with the right tools.
no_station.trans: 要是具备了适当的工具和工作站，也许就能做。

no_tech.en: Um... I don't think I know how to make one of those yet...
no_tech.trans: 呃……我还不知道怎么制作那种东西……

describe_smoldering.en: Hurry, stomp it out before it catches fire!
describe_smoldering.trans: 快点，在它着火之前把它踩灭！

announce_monkey_curse_1.en: All of a sudden I can't stop thinking about bananas...
announce_monkey_curse_1.trans: 怎么我脑子里想的就只剩下香蕉了……

announce_pick_disease_warning.en: I'm pretty sure that's not how it's supposed to look.
announce_pick_disease_warning.trans: 我很确定这不是它应该有的样子。

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: Maybe it would be happier if it wasn't all alone?
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 给它找个伴，它会更开心吧？

announce_call_beef.en: Come here, girl! Or boy? It's hard to tell.
announce_call_beef.trans: 来吧，小姑娘！还是小伙子？真是看不出来。

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: It almost feels like I'm back home.
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 感觉好像回到了家乡一样。

announce_reviving_corpse.en: Don't worry! I have a badge in first aid!
announce_reviving_corpse.trans: 别担心！我得过急救的奖章！

announce_sacredchest_no.en: This thing is impossible to open!
announce_sacredchest_no.trans: 这个东西根本不可能打开！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: Good job {name}, I think that's the last one!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 干得好，{name}，最后一个也让你找到了！

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: It doesn't look like he's picking up any scents.
announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.trans: 看起来他没有捕捉到任何气味。

announce_ghostdrain.en: My head... I thought having ghosts around would be more fun.
announce_ghostdrain.trans: 我的头……我以为跟鬼魂玩会很有意思呢。

announce_inv_full.en: I already have too many supplies to carry.
announce_inv_full.trans: 我已经拿了很多补给品了。

announce_elixir_too_super.en: I don't think my tummy can handle that.
announce_elixir_too_super.trans: 我觉得我的肚子受不了那个。

announce_attach_buff_attack.en: Woah! I feel like I can take on the world!
announce_attach_buff_attack.trans: 喔！我感觉我可以跟全世界战斗了！

1.en: Let's find a better spot, Woby.
1.trans: 我们找个更好的地方吧，沃比。

3.trans: 我们换个地方吧试试吧。

describe_plantstressorseason.en: I don't think it likes this weather.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 我觉得它并不喜欢这个气候。

announce_deerclops.en: That has to be a Deerclops! I need to get a closer look!
announce_deerclops.trans: 那个一定就是独眼巨鹿了！我要靠近点看看！

announce_spooked.en: Yikes! That gave me quite the start!

announce_charlie_attack.en: Hey w-wait- I thought we could be friends!
announce_charlie_attack.trans: 嘿，等等——我以为我们能做朋友呢！

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: Aww, but the other trail looks so much more exciting...
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 明明另一条踪迹更刺激啊……

announce_klaus_callforhelp.trans: 他在召唤更多的怪兽来！好！！

announce_boat_sink.en: Better put my swimming badge to good use!
announce_boat_sink.trans: 好好利用一下我的游泳技能！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: I think he knows the way!

announce_wet.en: This is starting to get uncomfortable.

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: We need to make some room for other racers, Woby!
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我们得给其他选手腾点空间，沃比！

announce_klaus_unchained.en: Maybe he'll feel better with that chain gone.
announce_klaus_unchained.trans: 也许没了那条锁链，他会更舒服一点。

announce_adventurefail.en: Perseverance is the Pinetree Pioneer way!
announce_adventurefail.trans: 坚持不懈是松树先锋队员的必备品质！

announce_no_trap.en: Huh. I thought for sure there would be a trap.
announce_no_trap.trans: 哈。我还以为会有陷阱呢。

announce_washed_ashore.trans: 沃比……？噢，好的，你没事就好！

announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 有什么正在地底下挖东西！

3.en: Hey... I think this might not be safe.
3.trans: 嘿……这个有可能不太安全。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Can I play too? Uh... I mean, use my Pioneer tracking expertise?
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 我也可以玩吗？呃......我是说，使用我的先锋追踪技术？

announce_townportalteleport.en: Do you think I'll be the same person when I come out the other side?
announce_townportalteleport.trans: 你觉得我从另一边出来以后还会是一样的我吗？

announce_ticoon_dead.en: I-it's okay Woby, he's just taking a nap! Let's keep going.
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 没，没事，沃比，他只是想睡会儿！我们继续走吧。

announce_accomplishment_done.en: If I were back home, I'd get a badge for that!
announce_accomplishment_done.trans: 我要是在家的话，会得到一个奖章呢！

invalid.en: I don't think that's safe to eat.

spoiled.en: Ugh, what did I just eat?

generic.en: Being outdoors makes everything taste better!
generic.trans: 在户外活动活动，什么东西都变的好吃了！

announce_pirates_arrive.en: What's that music? Did someone bring a radio?
announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 那是什么音乐？有人带了收音机吗？

announce_torch_out.en: Uh oh... this is usually the part when something bad happens.
announce_torch_out.trans: 呃哦……一般到这时候故事会有一个不好的转折。

quagmire_announce_lose.en: Oh well, we can just try again right? Right...?
quagmire_announce_lose.trans: 哦，我们可以再试一次，对吗？对不对……？

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: I guess he lost the scent.

announce_repelled.en: Look at those defenses! how does he do that?
announce_repelled.trans: 看看这种坚固的防御！他是怎么做到的？

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: You can go faster, we trained for this! Or did we...
announce_carrat_error_walking.trans: 你可以更快的，我们训练过的！应该训练过吧……

announce_off_script.en: Uh, I don't think that's in the script...
announce_off_script.trans: 呃，剧本里好像没这个内容……

announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.en: Do I still get the badge?

announce_nohungersiesta.en: Maybe if I have a snack first.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 先让我吃点零食也许就行。

1.en: Hey! Do you guys want to hear a story?

2.en: You're doing great, plants! Keep it up!

3.en: Don't worry, I'll be here to talk to you whenever you get lonely.
3.trans: 别担心，每当你寂寞的时候，我都会在这里陪你说话。

4.en: How are you doing today plants? Seen any new bugs lately?
4.trans: 今天还好吗，植物们？最近有看到什么新的虫子吗？

5.en: It's good to have someone to talk to. Thanks plants!
5.trans: 有个人可以倾诉的感觉真好。谢谢了，植物们！

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: There's too many footprints in this wet ground!
announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 这片湿地上有太多的脚印了！

announce_snowball_no_snow.en: We've run out of snow, Woby!

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: Look Woby, I think he's trying to get our attention!
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 沃比，他想引起我们的注意！

idol_med.en: Woby look! There's something in there!

seed_med.en: Woby look! There's something in there!

glass_med.en: Woby look! There's something in there!

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: I knew we shouldn't have gotten rid of that den...
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 我就知道不应该端掉那个窝……

announce_wetter.en: Did anyone remember to pack a towel?

announce_nodangergift.en: There's monsters around! I don't want to miss anything!
announce_nodangergift.trans: 周围有怪兽！我什么都不想错过！

announce_mosquitos.en: Zhey vant to suck our bloood!

announce_nodangersleep.en: I'm not scared! I just can't sleep...
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 我不是害怕！我只是睡不着……

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: Do you think it needs some water, Woby?
describe_plantstressormoisture.trans: 你觉得它需要浇水吗，沃比？
